la-kalbi.name: L.a. Kalbi

ingredients.prep: peeled, cored, cut into large chunks

ingredients.item: Toasted sesame seeds and thinly sliced scallions

ingredients.prep: red leaf, or Bibb lettuce, leaves separated, torn if large

instructions: Blitz garlic, Asian pear, and ginger to a smooth purée in a food processor or blender. (Or, finely grate garlic and ginger; grate Asian pear on large holes of a box grater.) Transfer purée to a medium bowl. Whisk in mirin, soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, black pepper, and ½ cup water until sugar is dissolved.

Arrange short ribs in a resealable plastic bag or baking dish. Pour marinade over and turn ribs to coat. Seal or cover and chill at least 4 hours and up to 12 hours.\
Do Ahead: Freeze ribs in marinade for up to 1 month.

Slice scallion pieces lengthwise into thin strips. Soak in a mesh strainer set inside a large bowl of ice water 10 minutes to remove some sharp bite and allow time to curl slightly. Swish scallions around with your hands to remove any sliminess, then drain well and pat dry. Wipe out bowl; return scallions to bowl.
Whisk vinegar, mirin, gochugaru, and sugar in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved; season with salt. Add dressing to scallions and toss to coat.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; oil grate. Remove short ribs from marinade and grill until well browned and slightly charred around edges, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a platter and top with sesame seeds and sliced scallions. Let rest 5 minutes, then cut meat into bite-size pieces with kitchen shears.
Arrange lettuce and perilla leaves (if using) on a second platter. Scoop rice into individual bowls.
To eat, stack a palm-size lettuce leaf and a perilla leaf in your hand. Top with rice, meat, and scallion salad and wrap into a tight bundle. Eat in one bite and repeat!

la-llorona-cocktail.name: La Llorona Cocktail
instructions: In a cocktail shaker filled with crushed ice, combine brandy, juices, and sugar. Cover, shake vigorously for 15 seconds, and strain into a cocktail glass. Top with a few drops of bitters. Add some dry ice for a spooky effect.

la-pina-mezcal-cocktail-with-pineapple-a.name: La Pina (mezcal Cocktail With Pineapple And Cilantro)

ingredients.prep: plus more ice cubes for the cocktail shaker

instructions: Put the large ice cube in an old-fashioned glass. Muddle the serrano chile with the cilantro leaves in a cocktail shaker. Add the mezcal, pineapple juice, simple syrup, lime juice, and ice cubes. Shake vigorously and strain over the large ice cube in the glass. Garnish with the pineapple leaf.

la-reine-sticks-teleculinaria.name: La Reine Sticks
instructions: Bata muito bem 100 g do açúcar com as gemas e a raspa de limão, até obter um creme fofo.
À parte, bata as claras com o restante açúcar até ficarem bem firmes. Envolva-as no preparado anterior, alternando com a farinha peneirada.
Coloque a massa anterior num saco de pasteleiro com boquilha lisa e forme tiras sobre um tabuleiro forrado com papel vegetal.
Bata com o tabuleiro na bancada para eliminar o ar da massa. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, por cerca de 15 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e polvilhe com açúcar em pó.

la-reine-sticks-with-chocolate-cream-tel.name: La Reine Sticks With Chocolate Cream
la-reine-sticks-with-chocolate-cream-tel.original_name: Palitos la reine com creme de chocolate
instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com o leite e deixe aquecer. Numa tigela, misture a farinha com o cacau e o açúcar. Junte as gemas e bata bem.
Adicione depois o leite em fio, mexendo sempre. Deite tudo para o tacho e leve novamente ao lume, mexendo sempre até engrossar. Retire e deixe arrefecer.

Depois de frio, coloque o creme dentro de um saco de pasteleiro com boquilha frisada. Disponha o creme sobre 12 palitos, polvilhe com um pouco de amendoim picado, cubra com os restantes palitos e sirva.

la-vina-cheesecake-in-air-fryer-pequerec.name: La Viña Cheesecake In Air Fryer
la-vina-cheesecake-in-air-fryer-pequerec.original_name: Tarta de Queso La Viña en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 280 g de nata líquida para montar

instructions: Ponemos todos los ingredientes en un bol amplio. Batimos con una batidora de varillas hasta que todo se encuentre integrado.

Preparamos el molde forrándolo con papel de horno que previamente habremos humedecido con agua y arrugado para que se adapte bien sin necesidad de recortarlo. Mientras precalentamos la freidora de aire a 160ºC durante 5 minutos.
Ponemos la masa de la tarta de queso en el molde. Si sobra mucho papel de horno recórtalo ligeramente para evitar que toque la resistencia de la freidora de aire.

Horneamos en nuestra airfryer a 160ºC durante 40 minutos. Una vez finalice verás que la superficie está dorada, y que la tarta todavía se bambolea, pero no te preocupes, es normal en este tipo de tarta de queso. Deja que repose durante media hora dentro de la freidora de aire.
Refrigeramos durante al menos dos horas en el frigorífico, y si puedes durante más tiempo o incluso de un día para otro, manteniéndola en el mismo molde.
Ahora ya solo nos queda sacar con cuidado la tarta del molde, despegar el papel de horno ¡y comernos esta deliciosa tarta de queso La Viña!
la-vina-cheesecake-in-air-fryer-pequerec.category: Recetas de Meriendas Fáciles, Recetas de Postres Caseros

la-vina-cheesecake-the-authentic-basque-.name: La Viña Cheesecake, The Authentic Basque Recipe
la-vina-cheesecake-the-authentic-basque-.original_name: Tarta de queso La Viña, la auténtica receta vasca

ingredients.item: 1 kg de queso crema tipo philadelphia (aproximadamente 4 tarrinas grandes)
500 ml de nata para montar (mínimo 35% m.g.) (2 tazas)
1 cucharada colmada de harina de trigo (unos 15 g)

instructions: En un bol grande ponemos el queso crema. Es importante que esté a temperatura ambiente para que se mezcle mejor. Batimos con varillas eléctricas o con una espátula hasta que quede cremoso.
Añadimos el azúcar y seguimos mezclando hasta que se integre. No hace falta batir mucho, solo lo justo para que no queden grumos.
Incorporamos los huevos, uno a uno. Vamos mezclando cada vez antes de añadir el siguiente. La masa va quedando cada vez más líquida, es normal.
Añadimos la cucharada de harina y la integramos bien. Es poca cantidad, pero ayuda a que la mezcla tenga un poco más de cuerpo.
Por último, vertemos la nata líquida. Removemos hasta obtener una mezcla homogénea y fluida. No hace falta batir demasiado, solo que todo se una bien.

Precalentamos el horno a 200 °C con calor arriba y abajo, sin ventilador. Mientras tanto, preparamos el molde. Usamos uno redondo desmontable de 24 cm y lo forramos con papel de horno. Para que se adapte bien, lo arrugamos primero y lo mojamos ligeramente con agua.

Vertemos la mezcla en el molde forrado. Lo llevamos al horno a media altura y horneamos durante unos 50-55 minutos. Veremos que se dora bastante por arriba y que el centro tiembla ligeramente si movemos el molde. Eso es justo lo que buscamos.

Sacamos del horno y dejamos enfriar a temperatura ambiente dentro del molde. Después, lo pasamos a la nevera un mínimo de 4 horas, aunque queda mejor de un día para otro. La textura se asienta y se intensifica el sabor.

labneh.name: Labneh
instructions: Line a fine-mesh sieve with a double layer of cheesecloth or paper towels, leaving some overhang; set over a medium bowl.
Place one 32-oz. container plain whole-milk yogurt in sieve and cover with overhang.
Chill at least 18 hours and, preferably, up to 3 days.
Uncover yogurt and transfer to another medium bowl; whisk until light and smooth, about 1 minute.
Transfer to an airtight container and chill.
Pour whey remaining in bowl into a 1-pint jar or airtight container (you should have about 1½ cups); cover and chill separately.
Labneh and whey can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled.

labneh-lebanese-yogurt.name: Labneh (lebanese Yogurt)
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt, olive oil, mint, dill, and kosher salt together in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate up to 12 hours.

labneh-and-lime-ice-cream-with-granola.name: Labneh And Lime Ice Cream With Granola

ingredients.item: Labneh (lebanese strained yogurt) or 1 cup plain whole-milk greek yogurt

instructions: If using Greek yogurt, set a fine-mesh sieve over a bowl; line with cheesecloth.
Place yogurt in sieve and let drain in refrigerator 4 hours (you should have ½ cup); discard drained liquid in bowl.
Pulse granola in a food processor to break up a bit.
Alternatively, roll granola up in a kitchen towel and gently crush with a rolling pin.
Whisk labneh (or strained yogurt), condensed milk, lime zest and juice, and salt in a medium bowl until smooth.
Using an electric mixer, beat cream in a medium bowl, starting on low speed and gradually increasing to medium-high as it thickens, until billowy and stiff peaks form, about 4 minutes.
Add a dollop of whipped cream to labneh mixture and mix in with a rubber spatula (this is just to lighten it so that the next stage—folding—is easier).

Add remaining whipped cream and fold in, running spatula down sides and along bottom of bowl, then lifting up through center and over top while rotating bowl to integrate without deflating, until very few streaks of labneh mixture remain.
Fold in granola; scrape ice cream base into a loaf pan that’s at least 8½x4½".
Cover with plastic wrap or an airtight silicone lid and freeze until solid, at least 8 hours.
To serve, transfer loaf pan to refrigerator and let ice cream soften 10 minutes before scooping into bowls.
Do ahead: Ice cream can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

labneh-cheese-cookies-lezzet.name: Labneh Cheese Cookies
instructions: 1. Tereyağı ve peyniri krema kıvamına gelinceye kadar mikserle çırpın.
2.  Şeker, vanilya, tuz, un ve bademi ekleyip yoğurun.
3.  Ele yapışmayan yumuşak bir hamur için gerekirse un ilavesi yapın.
4.  Hamuru rulo haline getirip streç filme sarın ve 40 dakika derin dondurucuda bekletin.
5.  Hamuru streç filmden ayırıp üzerine yumurta akı sürün.
6.  Ceviz, Antep fıstığı ve şekeri harmanlayıp hamurun etrafına bulayın.
8. 5 cm kalınlığında dilimleyip yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin ve 180 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında 18-20 dakika pişirin.
9.  Fırından çıkartıp soğumaya bırakın.
10.  Servis yapın.

labneh-shakshuka-appetizer-recipe-lezzet.name: Labneh Shakshuka Appetizer Recipe

ingredients.item: Patlıcan yerine kabak veya kırmızı biber de kullanabilirsiniz.
Domates sosu yerine taze rendelenmiş domates ve bir tutam şeker ekleyerek daha doğal bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.
Labne yerine süzme yoğurt veya krem peynir de kullanılabilir.
üzerine hafif kavrulmuş ceviz veya fındık serpiştirerek ekstra aromalı bir sunum yaratabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Patlıcanları alacalı soyup iri küpler halinde doğrayın.
2.  Tuzlu suda 15 dakika bekletip kurulayın.
3. Patlıcanları az zeytinyağıyla fırında ya da tavada kızartın.
4.  Altın renk alıp yumuşadığında kenara alın.
5. Ayrı bir tavada zeytinyağını ısıtın, sarımsağı ekleyip kısa süre çevirin.
6. Domates sosunu, tuz ve baharatları ekleyin; birkaç dakika kaynatın.
7. Kızaran patlıcanları sosun içine alıp nazikçe karıştırın ve ocaktan alın.
8. Labne, rendelenmiş sarımsak ve tuzu pürüzsüz olana kadar karıştırın.
9. Servis tabağının ortasına labneyi daire şeklinde yayın.
10. Ortasına patlıcanlı şakşukayı yerleştirin.
11. Üzerine zeytinyağı gezdirin, maydanoz ve pul biberle süsleyin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

labneh-with-zaatar-oil.name: Labneh With Za'atar Oil
instructions: Mix garlic and labneh in a medium bowl; season with salt.
Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium. Stir in za’atar and remove from heat. Let cool. Drizzle za’atar oil over labneh mixture and serve with warm pita.
Do Ahead: Labneh can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

labneh-the-middle-eastern-yogurt-cheese-.name: Labneh, The Middle Eastern Yogurt Cheese For Dipping
labneh-the-middle-eastern-yogurt-cheese-.original_name: Labneh, el queso de yogur de Medio Oriente para dipear

ingredients.item: Hilo de cocina o banda elástica

instructions: En un tazón, mezcla el yogur griego con la sal. Asegúrate de que estén bien incorporados. Coloca un colador o un paño de muselina sobre otro recipiente más grande para recolectar el suero que se desprenderá del yogur. Vierte el yogur en el colador o paño. Cubre el yogur con el colador o paño y coloca un peso encima para presionarlo ligeramente. Puedes usar un plato con algo pesado sobre él.

Deja que el yogur repose a temperatura ambiente durante aproximadamente 24 horas. Esto permitirá que el suero se separe y el yogur se espese. Después de 24 horas, retira el colador o paño y transfiere el labneh espeso a un recipiente limpio.

Si deseas agregar un toque de sabor adicional, puedes añadir un chorrito de aceite de oliva por encima y espolvorear hierbas frescas picadas, como menta o eneldo. El labneh está listo para ser disfrutado. Puedes servirlo como dip con pan pita, usarlo como aderezo para ensaladas o untarlo en sándwiches y bagels. ¡Las posibilidades son infinitas!
labneh-the-middle-eastern-yogurt-cheese-.category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

lace-cookies.name: Lace Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease with cooking spray.
Heat butter in a microwave-safe bowl in the microwave until melted.
Add sugar and stir to combine. Add beaten egg and mix well. Stir in oats, flour, vanilla, salt, and baking powder.
Drop spoonfuls of dough 3 inches apart onto the prepared baking sheet as the dough will spread.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden brown, about 8 minutes.
Let cookies cool completely before removing them from the baking sheet.

lacquered-rib-eye.name: Lacquered Rib Eye

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

ingredients.prep: preferably prime or as well-marbled as you can find

instructions: Bring vinegar, soy sauce, fish sauce, sugar, and garlic to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and gently simmer until reduced by about half (it will still be fairly loose and won’t yet coat a spoon), 6–8 minutes. Set sauce aside.

Prepare a grill for high indirect heat (for a charcoal grill, bank coals on one side of grill; for a gas grill, leave one or two burners off); oil grate with vegetable oil. Season steak generously with kosher salt. Grill over direct heat, turning every minute, until deeply browned on all sides (including standing it on its side with tongs to render fat cap), 6–8 minutes.

Move steak over indirect heat and grill, turning every 1–2 minutes and moving closer to or farther away from heat as needed to build even color, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of steak registers 100°, 10–12 minutes. Start basting steak. Continue to grill, turning and basting with a light coating of sauce and moving closer to or farther away from heat as needed to create a deep crust on steak without scorching, until very dark brown and thermometer registers 120° for medium-rare (internal temperature should climb to about 130° as steak rests), about 10 minutes. Transfer steak to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet and let rest 15–30 minutes.
Transfer steak to a cutting board and slice into thick strips. Arrange on a platter; drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with sea salt. Serve with lemon wedges.

lactation-cookies.name: Lactation Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and preheat to 325°. Whisk flour, brewer’s yeast, flaxseed meal, cinnamon, baking soda, and kosher salt in a medium bowl to combine.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar in another medium bowl until combined and creamy, about 1 minute. Add egg and vanilla extract and beat until incorporated and smooth, about 30 seconds. Add dry ingredients and mix on low speed until just combined, about 15 seconds. Add oats, figs, coconut, and 5 oz. chocolate and mix just until evenly distributed. Cover bowl and chill dough 30 minutes.

Using a #16 cookie scoop (about ¼ cup), portion out cookies and divide between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 3" apart. (Do not flatten; cookies will spread as they bake.) Press almonds and remaining 1 oz. chocolate into cookies, dividing evenly; sprinkle with sea salt.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until edges are firm and golden brown but centers are still soft, 18–22 minutes. Let cookies cool on baking sheets at least 15 minutes before eating.
Do ahead: Cookie dough can be made and portioned 3 months ahead; freeze on baking sheets until solid, then tightly wrap. Bake frozen cookies about 2 minutes longer than in recipe. Cookies can be baked 1 week ahead; store in an airtight container at room temperature.

lactation-friendly-cookies.name: Lactation-friendly Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Combine water and flaxseed in a small bowl; set aside to soak, 3 to 5 minutes.

Beat coconut oil, white sugar, and brown sugar together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Beat in 1 egg until completely blended. Add remaining 1 egg, flaxseed mixture, and vanilla; beat until smooth.

Combine flour, brewer's yeast, and salt in a separate bowl; add to sugar-egg mixture and beat until just incorporated, forming a dough. Fold in oats and cocoa nibs. Roll dough into small balls; arrange on baking sheets and flatten slightly.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 10 to 12 minutes.

lactose-free-banana-and-blueberry-muffin.name: Lactose-free Banana And Blueberry Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease 18 muffin cups with oil or line cups with paper liners.

Sift all-purpose flour, self-rising flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt together into a small bowl. Sift the flour mixture again into a larger bowl; stir in brown sugar and white sugar. Make a well in the centre of the flour mixture.

Lightly beat eggs with the vanilla extract in a bowl. Add milk and whisk until well combined. Whisk in vegetable oil in a slow stream. Mash bananas well with a fork; fold in until thoroughly combined.

Pour egg-banana mixture into the well of the flour mixture in a slow stream, stirring to combine using a metal spoon. Stir the mixture until just combined. Fold in blueberries. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 3/4 full.

Bake in the preheated oven until tops spring back when lightly pressed and a skewer inserted in the centre comes out clean, about 30 minutes. Allow muffins to stand in the cups for 3 to 5 minutes before turning them out on to a wire rack to cool.

lacy-cornmeal-pancakes-with-strawberry-c.name: Lacy Cornmeal Pancakes With Strawberry Compote
instructions: Cook strawberries, rum, sugar, salt, and 2 Tbsp. water (add ¼ cup water if not using rum) in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until strawberries are softened and juices have thickened and are syrupy, 20–25 minutes. Let compote cool completely before serving.
Do Ahead: Compote can be made 3 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.
Stir milk and vinegar in a small bowl. Let sit until milk curdles and sours, about 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk cornmeal, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
Whisk eggs into milk mixture, then add to dry ingredients and whisk vigorously to combine.

Melt 1½ tsp. butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Ladle ⅓ cup batter into skillet. Cook pancake until lacy and browned underneath, about 3 minutes. Flip and cook just until cooked through, about 1 minute. Transfer to a plate (or keep warm on a baking sheet in a 300° oven until ready to serve if desired). Working in 7 more batches, repeat process with remaining butter and batter to make a total of 8 pancakes.
To serve, divide pancakes among plates and spoon compote over.

lacao-baked-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Lacão Baked In The Oven
instructions: Arranje o joelho de porco e leve-o a cozer em água temperada com sal.

Escorra a carne, coloque-a num tabuleiro e junte os dentes de alho picados, a folha de louro, o vinho branco, o pimentão-doce, sal, piripíri, 300 ml da água da cozedura e o azeite. Envolva e deixe marinar durante 30 minutos.
Após o tempo indicado, leve o tabuleiro ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante 30 minutos. Sirva com legumes salteados.

ladenia-kimolou-argiro.name: Ladenia Kimolou

ingredients.item: 750 grαλεύρι σκληρό (ή για όλες τις χρήσεις)
1φακελάκι μαγιά στιγμής (ή ένα κύβο φρ. μαγιάς 25 γραµ.)
750 grαλεύρι σκληρό (ή για όλες τις χρήσεις)
1φακελάκι μαγιά στιγμής (ή ένα κύβο φρ. μαγιάς 25 γραµ.)

instructions: Κοσκινίζουμε πρώτα το σκληρό αλεύρι σε ένα μεγάλο μπολ ή λεκάνη.
Πασπαλίζουμε με την ξερή μαγιά και τη ζάχαρη (η ζάχαρη βοηθάει στην γρήγορη ενεργοποίηση της μαγιάς ).
Προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο και τρίβουμε-ψιχουλιάζουμε, το αλεύρι με τα υπόλοιπα υλικά, με τα δάχτυλα.
Λίγο λίγο προσθέτουμε το χλιαρό νερό και το αλάτι και ζυμώνουμε μέχρι να έχουμε μια ζύμη ομοιόμορφη, εύπλαστη, ελαφρώς υγρή, που δεν κολλάει στα χέρια.
Παίρνουμε 1 κουταλιά από το ελαιόλαδο στα χέρια, και αλείφουμε την ζύμη ολόγυρα.
Βάζουμε μέσα στο μπολ τη ζύμη με τις ενώσεις προς τα κάτω να ακουμπούν στο μπολ.
Σκεπάζουμε το μπολ καλά με μεμβράνη ή καθαρό βρεγμένο πανί και την αφήνουμε να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο και ν’ ανέβει, περίπου 45΄ έως 1 ώρα σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.

lady-belly-lezzet.name: Lady Belly
instructions: 1. Şerbeti için, su ile şekeri kaynatın.
2.  Ocağın altını kısıp limon suyunu ilave ederek tekrar kaynatın.
3.  Soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Tencereye su ve yağı aktarıp kısık ateşte yağ eriyinceye kadar bekletin.
5.  Kaynamaya yakın un ilave edip tahta kaşıkla karıştırarak 5 dakika pişirin.
6.  Ocağın altını kapatın.
7.  Soğuyunca yumurtaları ilave ederek karıştırıp 20 dakika dinlendirin.
8.  Hamurdan küçük parçalar koparıp elinizle ortası delik yuvarlaklar hazırlayın.
9.  Ayçiçeği yağını tavada ısıtın.
10.  Hazırladığınız hamurları bu yağda kızartıp soğuyan şerbetin içine atın.
11.  Şerbeti çekince, üzerlerine file Antep fıstığı serperek servis yapın.
12. Hanım Göbeği Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Şerbet soğuk, hamur ise sıcak olmalıdır.
13. Soğuyunca sertleşeceğinden dolayı ılıkken servis yapmanızı öneririz.
14. Hamurların çıtırlıklarını kaybetmemeleri için, şerbetin içerisinde çok fazla bekletmemeye özen gösterin.

lady-belly-recipe-lezzet.name: Lady Belly Recipe

ingredients.item: 1,5 su bardağı un (gerektikçe ekleyin, ele yapışmayan yumuşak bir hamur olmalı)

instructions: 1. Öncelikle şerbeti hazırlayın.
2.  Şeker ve suyu tencereye alın, karıştırarak kaynamaya bırakın.
3.  Kaynadıktan sonra altını kısın ve hafifçe yoğunlaşana kadar birkaç dakika daha pişirin.
4.  Ardından ocaktan alıp tamamen soğumaya bırakın.
5. Derin bir karıştırma kabında un dışında kalan tüm malzemeleri birleştirin.
6.  Karışım pürüzsüz hale gelince, unu yavaş yavaş eklemeye başlayın.
7.  Ele yapışmayan, yumuşak bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
8. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın, avuç içinde yuvarlayın.
9.  Ortalarına başparmağınızla hafifçe bastırarak çukur açın ve her birinin ortasına bir fındık yerleştirin.
10. Hazırladığınız tatlıları yağlı kâğıt serili tepsiye dizin.
11.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derecelik fırında yaklaşık 30 dakika, üzerleri altın rengi olana kadar pişirin.
12. Fırından çıkan sıcak tatlıların üzerine soğumuş şerbeti gezdirin.
13.  Tatlılar şerbeti çekinceye kadar dinlendirin ve servis edin.

lady-kiss-lezzet.name: Lady Kiss
instructions: 1. Tereyağı ile pudra şekerini hafif ve yumuşak bir kıvam alana kadar mikserle krema haline getirin.
2.  Yumurta sarısı, badem esansı, çekilmiş bademler ve unu ekleyip tamamen karışana kadar çırpın.
3.  Fırını önceden 160 dereceye ayarlayın.
4.  Fırın tepsisine yağlı kağıt serin.
5.  Hamurdan küçük parçalar koparın ve 40 adet yuvarlak yapın.
6.  Yuvarlak parçaları tepsiye aralıklı olarak yerleştirin.
7.  Kurabiyeleri yaklaşık 20 dakika kızarana kadar pişirin ve fırından çıkarın.
8.  Yağlı kağıtla birlikte ızgara telinin üzerine alın ve soğumaya bırakın.
9.  Sıcak suyun üzerine konulmuş bir kapta çikolatayı eritin.
10.  Soğutulmuş kurabiyeleri kağıdın üzerinden alın.
11.  20 tane kurabiyeye çikolatayı sürüp kalan 20 adedi de üzerlerine yerleştirip servis yapın.

ladybug-sandwich-lezzet.name: Ladybug Sandwich
instructions: 1. Tost ekmeklerini yuvarlak bir kalıpla kesin.
2.  Salamları ekmekleri kestiğiniz kalıpla 6 parça olacak şekilde kesin.
3.  Ayrıca her sandvicin üzerine koyacağınız salamları ise kanat şeklinde kesin.
4.  Zeytinlerin çekirdeklerini çıkarıp ikişer tane göz elde edin.
5.  Diğer zeytin halkalarını ise ortadan ikiye keserek ayaklarını elde edin.
6.  İki parça ekmek arasına  krem peyniri sürüp yuvarlak salam parçasını yerleştirin.
7.  İki parça ekmek arasına ayak oluşturacak şekilde zeytin parçalarını dizin.
8.  En üste kanat şeklindeki salamları yerleştirin.
9.  Pirinç patlaklarından yuvarlaklar keserek benek gibi üzerlerine dizin.
10.  Gözler için zeytin halkalarını dizip servis yapın.

lagana-argiro.name: Lagana
instructions: Διαλύουμε τη μαγιά σε ένα μικρό μπολ με λίγη από τη ζάχαρη και λίγο από το χλιαρό νερό. Αφήνουμε για 5 λεπτά μέχρι να ενεργοποιηθεί και να αφρίσει η επιφάνεια.
Διαλύουμε το αλάτι στο υπόλοιπο χλιαρό νερό. Κρατάμε 3 κ.σ. από το συνολικό λάδι στην άκρη.
Σε μεγάλο μπολ βάζουμε το αλεύρι και ανοίγουμε λακκούβα στη μέση.
Ρίχνουμε την ενεργοποιημένη μαγιά, το νερό (προσοχή να μην είναι καυτό) και το υπόλοιπο λάδι. Ανακατεύουμε με κουτάλα μέχρι να μαζευτεί η ζύμη σε μπάλα.

Αλευρώνουμε ή λαδώνουμε ελαφρά τα χέρια και ζυμώνουμε για λίγα λεπτά. Μεταφέρουμε τη ζύμη στον πάγκο και συνεχίζουμε το ζύμωμα, τραβώντας και διπλώνοντας τη ζύμη με τα χέρια κλειστά σε μπουνιές, ώστε να εγκλωβίζει αέρα.
Η ζύμη πρέπει να είναι απαλή και εύπλαστη. Όσο περισσότερο τη δουλεύουμε, τόσο πιο αφράτη γίνεται. Τη σχηματίζουμε σε μπάλα με τις ενώσεις προς τα κάτω και τη βάζουμε σε λαδωμένο μπολ.
Σκεπάζουμε και αφήνουμε να φουσκώσει για 1 ώρα και 30 λεπτά, μέχρι να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο. Αν βιαζόμαστε, την τοποθετούμε σε ζεστό σημείο ή σε χλιαρό φούρνο.
Ξεφουσκώνουμε απαλά τη ζύμη και τη χωρίζουμε σε 2 ίσα μέρη. Με λαδωμένα χέρια ανοίγουμε κάθε κομμάτι μέσα σε λαδωμένο ταψί, δίνοντάς του το επιθυμητό σχήμα.
Αλείφουμε την επιφάνεια με λίγο νερό, πασπαλίζουμε μπόλικο σουσάμι και πιέζουμε απαλά με τις παλάμες να κολλήσει. Επαναλαμβάνουμε και για το δεύτερο κομμάτι.

Σκεπάζουμε με καθαρή πετσέτα και αφήνουμε να φουσκώσουν ξανά για 30–45 λεπτά. Με τα ακροδάχτυλα κάνουμε βαθιές δαχτυλιές ή τρυπάμε ολόγυρα την επιφάνεια με βελόνα πλεξίματος ή σουβλί, μέχρι να φτάνει στον πάτο του ταψιού.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200°C, στον αέρα, για περίπου 30 λεπτά. Προς το τέλος του ψησίματος ψεκάζουμε ελαφρά με νερό για να γυαλίσουν.
Βγάζουμε τις πίτες καυτές και τις αφήνουμε σε σχάρα ή πάνω σε καθαρή πετσέτα για να αποβάλουν την υγρασία και να παραμείνουν τραγανές.

lagareiro-octopus-teleculinaria.name: Lagareiro Octopus
instructions: Para preparar este polvo à lagareiro, ligue o forno a 180 graus. Numa panela, coza o polvo num pouco de água juntamente com 3 colheres (sopa) do azeite, o louro, a cebola cortada em metades e os cravinhos. Deixe cozer até que fique macio, depois retire e reserve.
Lave as batatinhas e disponha-as num tabuleiro com sal grosso por cima. Leve ao forno aproximadamente 25 minutos, depois retire-as, sacuda-lhes o sal e dê-lhes um murro para abrirem.
Disponha o polvo numa travessa, junte as batatas, regue com o restante azeite, junte o alho picado finamente e leve ao forno até ferver. Retire do forno e sirva de imediato.

lagareiro-octopus-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Lagareiro Octopus - Recipe
instructions: Coloque o polvo numa panela, junte a cebola lavada e cubra com água. Leve ao lume e deixe cozer, até que fique macio (cerca de 50 minutos). Após esse tempo, desligue o lume, retifique o caldo de sal e deixe repousar durante 20 minutos.
Lave as batatas e coloque-as num tabuleiro. Polvilhe-as com sal grosso e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 45 minutos.

Retire o polvo da água e disponha-o noutro tabuleiro. Descasque os dentes de alho, lamine-os e junte ao polvo. Regue com o azeite, polvilhe com pimenta e leve também ao forno até que fique douradinho.
Retire o polvo do forno e regue-o com o vinagre. Dê um murro às batatas e junte-as ao polvo. Sirva tudo decorado com pimentos morrone e coentros picados.

lagareiro-style-cod-with-punched-potatoe.name: Lagareiro-style Cod With Punched Potatoes
lagareiro-style-cod-with-punched-potatoe.original_name: Bacalhau à lagareiro com batatas a murro
instructions: Lave as batatas, escorra-as e deite-as num tabuleiro. Salpique-as com sal e asse-as em forno, pré-aquecido a 170ºC, durante 45 minutos.
Grelhe bem as postas de bacalhau num grelhador de fogão. Retire, deixe arrefecer e lasque grosseiramente. Reserve.
Coza os grelos em água temperada com sal. Escorra-os bem e salteie-os numa frigideira com um fio do azeite e 1 dente de alho picado.
Descasque os restantes alhos e lamine-os. Aqueça o restante azeite num tachinho, junte os alhos laminados e deixe fritar sem deixar queimar.
Dê "um murro" nas batatas e coloque-as numa travessa. Junte os grelos e o bacalhau, regue com o azeite anterior bem quente e sirva.

lagareiro-style-octopus-with-punched-pot.name: Lagareiro-style Octopus With Punched Potatoes
lagareiro-style-octopus-with-punched-pot.original_name: Polvo à lagareiro com batatas a murro
instructions: Numa panela, coloque o polvo, a água, um pouco de azeite, a cebola, descascada e cortada em quartos, e a folha de louro. Leve ao lume e deixe cozer até que fique macio (cerca de 45 minutos). Retire e reserve.

Lave as batatas e disponha-as num tabuleiro, regadas com um pouco de azeite e salpicadas com sal. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante cerca de 30 minutos. Retire-lhes o excesso de sal e dê-lhes um murro para abrirem.

Escorra depois o polvo e coloque-o num tabuleiro. Disponha as batatas à volta, regue com o azeite, adicione os alhos, descascados e picados e leve ao forno, até alourar. Retire, polvilhe com salsa picada e sirva quente.

lagareiro-style-octopus-with-red-wine-te.name: Lagareiro-style Octopus With Red Wine
lagareiro-style-octopus-with-red-wine-te.original_name: Polvo à lagareiro com vinho tinto
instructions: Coloque o polvo numa panela com um pouco de água e leve ao lume. Quando começar a ferver, contabilize 15 minutos e depois retire do lume. Transfira o polvo para um coador, passe-o por água fria e deixe arrefecer.
Lave bem as batatinhas e deite-as num tabuleiro. Tempere-as com bastante sal grosso e leve-as ao forno, pré-aquecido a 185ºc, até ficarem cozidas.
Lave os pimentos, retire-lhes as sementes e corte-os em tiras. Descasque e corte as cebolinhas ao meio e os alhos em rodelas. Corte o polvo em pedaços grandes.

Disponha o polvo num tabuleiro, tempere-o com o azeite, os alhos, o vinho, o louro, tomilho, o colorau, sal e pimenta. Junte as cebolinhas e mexa. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 190ºc, durante 15 minutos.

Dê um ""murro"" às batatinhas e junte-as ao polvo, após o tempo indicado anteriormente. Disponha também os pimentos por cima e leve novamente ao forno por mais 15 minutos. Sirva com grelos ou espinafres, previamente cozidos e salteados.

lagos-roasting-lezzet.name: Lagos Roasting
instructions: 1. Soğan ve sarımsağı ufak doğrayıp bir tavada az miktarda ayçiçeği yağı ile soteleyin.
2.  Biberleri ayıklayın ve küp şeklinde doğrayıp ilave edin.
3. Balığı sotelenmiş sebzelere ekleyip tuz ve karabiberle tatlandırın.
4.  İsteğe göre acı pul biber serpiştirip servis yapın.

lagos-skewers-with-bay-leaves-lezzet.name: Lagos Skewers With Bay Leaves
instructions: 1. Lezzet Davet sofralarınız için harika tarifler sonuyor.
2.  Lagos filetoyu kuşbaşı doğrayın.
3.  Zeytinyağı, tuz ve karabiber ile marine edin.
4.  İri doğranmış biber, kırmızı soğan, defne yaprağı, sarımsak, domates ve limon ile şişe dizin.
5.  Pişirip, kekikli ve sarımsaklı zeytinyağı ile servis yapın.

lahmacun.name: Lahmacun

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Ras-el-hanout, a Moroccan spice blend, and Aleppo pepper are available at specialty foods stores and some supermarkets.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion, garlic, and serrano chile and cook, stirring often, until beginning to brown, about 4 minutes. Add tomatoes, breaking them up with your hands, piquillo peppers, brown sugar, vinegar, and cumin; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring often and mashing with a potato masher (or a spoon), until thickened, 15–20 minutes. Let cool slightly, then purée in a blender until smooth; season with salt and pepper to taste.

Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened, 5–8 minutes. Add lamb, beef, Aleppo pepper, ras-el-hanout, and cumin; season with salt and pepper. Cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a plate and let cool.

Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 500°. Cut dough into 4 pieces. Working with 1 piece at a time and keeping remaining pieces covered, gently stretch dough into 12” rounds and transfer to parchment-lined baking sheets. (If dough springs back, let rest 10 minutes, then stretch again, resting as needed, until dough is thin.)

Spread each round of dough with a layer of tomato sauce; season with salt and pepper and top with a thin layer of meat mixture. Working in batches, cook lahmacun until crusts are browned and crisp, 10–12 minutes.
Toss parsley and lemon juice in a small bowl. Top each lahmacun with parsley mixture and drizzle with oil.
DO AHEAD: Sauce and meat mixture can be made 1 day ahead. Cover separately and keep chilled.

lahmacun-in-a-pot-lezzet.name: Lahmacun In A Pot
instructions: 1. Hamur için, unu geniş bir yoğurma kabına alın.
2.  Su, maya ve bir çay kaşığı kadar tuzu ekleyin ve kulak memesi kıvamında bir hamur elde edecek şekilde yoğurun.
3.  Üzerini nemli bir bezle örtün ve mayalanması için 1 saat kadar dinlendirin.
4.  İç harcı için ince kıydığınız soğan ve kıymayı zeytinyağında soteleyin.
5.  Kıymanın rengi dönmeye başladığında küp doğradığınız domates ve ince kıydığınız maydanozu ilave edin.
6.  Tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırıp ocaktan alın.
7.  Mayalanan hamuru 10 eşit bezeye ayırın.
8.  Bezeleri merdane yardımıyla tek tek açın.
9.  Açtığınız bezelerin üzerine kıymalı harçtan yayın.
10.  Lahmacunu geniş bir tencereye alın.
11.  Orta ateşte kapağı kapalı olarak tek tek pişirin.
12.  Altı hafif kızarıp pişince servis tabağına alın.
13.  Tüm lahmacunlar piştikten sonra yanında maydanoz, soğan, domates ve limon dilimleriyle servis yapın.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

lahmacun-recipe-lezzet.name: Lahmacun Recipe

ingredients.item: 300 gram orta yağlı kıyma (dana veya kuzu karışık)
2 adet domates (kabukları soyulmuş, ince doğranmış veya rendelenmiş)

instructions: 1. Unu geniş bir kaba alın.
2.  Ortasını açıp maya, şeker, tuz ve ılık suyu ekleyin.
3.  Yavaş yavaş karıştırarak ele hafif yapışan ama yumuşak bir hamur elde edin.
4.  Üzerini örtüp ılık bir yerde 45 dakika mayalanmaya bırakın.
5. Tüm iç malzemelerini bir kapta karıştırın.
6.  Kıymanın her yere eşit dağılması için elinizle yoğurur gibi karıştırın.
7.  Hafif akışkan bir kıvamda olmalı; çok katıysa az miktarda su ekleyin.
8. Mayalanan hamuru 6 eşit bezeye ayırın.
9.  Her bezeyi unlayarak ince ve yuvarlak şekilde (yaklaşık 25 cm çapında) açın.
10. Hazırladığınız kıymalı karışımdan her hamurun üzerine ince bir tabaka halinde yayın.
11.  Kenar boşluğu bırakmayın.
12. Fırında: 250°C’ye ısıtılmış fırında, alt-üst ayarda 7–8 dakika kadar pişirin.
13. Tavada: Döküm veya sac tavayı ısıtın, lahmacunu tavaya alın, kapağını kapatarak 4–5 dakika pişirin.

lahmacun-the-turkish-pizza-that-revoluti.name: Lahmacun, The Turkish Pizza That Revolutionizes Social Networks
lahmacun-the-turkish-pizza-that-revoluti.original_name: Lahmacun, la Pizza Turca que revoluciona las Redes Sociales

ingredients.item: 400 g de carne picada de cordero o ternera

instructions: En un bol grande, mezcla la harina, la sal y el azúcar. Disuelve la levadura en el agua tibia y deja reposar por unos minutos hasta que esté espumosa.

Agrega la mezcla de levadura y el aceite de oliva a la harina. Amasa hasta obtener una masa suave y elástica, aproximadamente 10 minutos. Cubre el bol con un paño húmedo y deja reposar en un lugar cálido hasta que la masa haya duplicado su tamaño, aproximadamente 1 hora.

Mientras la masa reposa, prepara el relleno. En un bol grande, mezcla la carne picada, los tomates, el pimiento, la cebolla, el ajo, la pasta de tomate y las especias. Asegúrate de que todos los ingredientes estén bien combinados.

Precalienta el horno a 250°C y coloca una bandeja para hornear dentro para que también se caliente. Divide la masa en bolas del tamaño de una nuez y estira cada una en una superficie ligeramente enharinada hasta que estén muy delgadas.
Coloca las bases estiradas en la bandeja caliente y extiende una capa delgada de la mezcla de carne sobre cada una.
Hornea durante 8-10 minutos o hasta que los bordes estén crujientes y dorados.

lahore-delis-chai.name: Lahore Deli's Chai
instructions: Bring cardamom, fennel seeds, and 1 cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Boil 5 minutes, then reduce heat to medium and whisk in milk and add tea (if using bags, cut open and add tea loose). Simmer, whisking occasionally, until tea is fragrant and a creamy light brown, 8−10 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve; discard solids. Sweeten tea as desired.

lakhmatjoon-argiro.name: Lakhmatjoon

ingredients.item: 500 γραμ. αλεύρι για όλες τις χρήσεις
350 γραμ.  κιμά αρνίσιο ή ανάμεικτο αρνί και μοσχάρι
500 γραμ. αλεύρι για όλες τις χρήσεις
350 γραμ.  κιμά αρνίσιο ή ανάμεικτο αρνί και μοσχάρι

instructions: Ξεκινάμε να φτιάξουμε το πολίτικο λαχματζούν, βάζοντας πρώτα το αλεύρι και τη μαγιά σε μπολ.
Ανακατεύουμε και προσθέτουμε νερό περίπου 1,5 φλ. και το αλάτι και ζυμώνουμε.
Αφήνουμε την ζύμη σε λαδωμένο μπολ να φουσκώσει για περίπου 1 ώρα.

Βάζουμε τον κιμά στη σανίδα κοπής, προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι, την ντομάτα, το σκόρδο, το μαϊντανό, πάπρικα, αλάτι – πιπέρι, μπούκοβο και με το μαχαίρι κόβουμε τα υλικά ξανά και ξανά (το μίγμα απλώνεται με το κόψιμο, το μαζεύουμε με το μαχαίρι και συνεχίζουμε).
Στο τέλος το μίγμα θα γίνει σαν να ζυμώθηκε και θα αλλάξει χρώμα. Ιδανικά θα ήταν αν μπορούσαμε να φυλάξουμε το μίγμα στο ψυγείο σκεπασμένο για 30΄.
Χωρίζουμε τη ζύμη σε κομμάτια μικρά ή μεγάλα, ανάλογα πόσο μεγάλα τα θέλουμε.
Ανοίγουμε σε λεπτό φύλλο την ζύμη με πλάστη και με τα δάχτυλα.
Την βάζουμε σε λαδωμένη λαμαρίνα.
Απλώνουμε από λίγη γέμιση, με τα δάχτυλα. Φροντίζουμε γύρω – γύρω να αφήσουμε κενό στη ζύμη (όχι γέμιση).
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο 200 – 220°C για 15-20΄ να ροδίσουν καλά.
Καίμε το βούτυρο στο τηγάνι και μόλις βγουν από τον φούρνο περιχύνουμε με καυτό βούτυρο.
Στύβουμε λεμόνι.
Σερβίρουμε με γιαούρτι.
Μπορούμε να ετοιμάσουμε τη συνταγή και με έτοιμες πίτες.

lalaggia-manis-argiro.name: Lalaggia Manis

ingredients.item: Μέλι ή κανελοζάχαρη  για το σερβίρισμα
Μέλι ή κανελοζάχαρη  για το σερβίρισμα

instructions: Zεσταίνουμε ελαφρώς το ελαιόλαδο να γίνει χλιαρό.
Ρίχνουμε σε ένα μπολ το αλεύρι και το ραντίζουμε με το ζεστό λάδι. Το πασπαλίζουμε με το αλάτι.
Τρίβουμε στις παλάμες το αλεύρι με το λάδι να βραχεί ελαφρά.
Προσθέτουμε τη μαγιά και το χλιαρό νερό και δουλεύουμε το μείγμα με ελαφρώς λαδωμένα χέρια μέχρι να αποκτήσουμε μια εύπλαστη και απαλή ζύμη.
Τη μεταφέρουμε σε λαδωμένο μπολ, τη σκεπάζουμε και την αφήνουμε σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο, για μία ώρα περίπου.
Πλάθουμε ένα μεγάλο χοντρό κορδόνι χωρίς να αλευρώσουμε τον πάγκο – αν η ζύμη κολλάει, λαδώνουμε ελαφρώς τα χέρια μας.
Στη συνέχεια, το κόβουμε σε λεπτές φέτες και πλάθουμε την καθεμία σε ένα χοντρό φιτίλι.
Αφήνουμε 10 λεπτά να ξεκουραστούν και πλάθουμε ξανά σε πολύ λεπτά κορδόνια.
Τα τυλίγουμε σε διάφορα σχήματα ή τα διπλώνουμε στα τέσσερα.
Ζεσταίνουμε σε ένα μεγάλο βαθύ τηγάνι λάδι, να φτάσει τους 170°C.
Ρίχνουμε σε δόσεις τα λαλάγγια στο καυτό λάδι και τα τηγανίζουμε για 1½-2 λεπτά, μέχρι να γίνουν τραγανά και να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.
Τα βγάζουμε με τρυπητή κουτάλα σε σχάρα να στραγγίσουν από το λάδι.
Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγη κανελοζάχαρη όσο είναι ακόμη καυτά, ώστε να κολλήσει πάνω τους.
Εναλλακτικά, τα σερβίρουμε σκέτα ή με λίγο μέλι και τα συνοδεύουμε με τυρί.

lalaped-lezzet.name: Lalaped
instructions: 1. Yoğurdu derin bir kaba alın.
2.  Yumurta, süt, tereyağı ve bir tutam tuz ekleyip çırpın.
3.  Un ve kabartma tozunu harmanlayıp yoğurtlu karışıma ilave edin ve hızla karıştırın.
4.  Derin bir tavada sıvıyağı kızdırın.
5.  Karışımdan kaşık kaşık dökerek kızartın.
6.  Lokmaları tencereye alıp soğutun.
7. Şerbet için şeker ve suyu kaynatın.
8.  Soğumuş lokmaların üzerine sıcak şerbeti dökün.
9.  Şerbeti çekince servis tabaklarına alın.
10.  Çekilmiş ceviz içi serpip servis yapın.
11.  Afiyet olsun.
12. Klasik lokma tatlısı tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

lamb-gosht-biryani.name: Lamb (gosht) Biryani
instructions: Place basmati rice in a large container and cover with several inches of cool water; let stand 30 minutes. Drain.

Heat 1/4 cup oil in a large skillet over medium heat; add cloves, cardamom pods, and cinnamon sticks and cook in the hot oil until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add onions; cook and stir until onions are lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Stir garlic paste and ginger paste into onion mixture; cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Sprinkle cilantro and mint over onion mixture and cook 1 minute more.
Add lamb chops to the skillet; season with salt. Cook lamb until chops are browned on both sides, about 20 minutes.

Stir in tomatoes, green chile peppers, and ground red pepper; continue cooking until oil begins to separate from the sauce, about 10 minutes. Add yogurt and lemon juice; cover and cook until the lamb is tender, about 15 minutes. Add some water as needed to keep mixture from getting too dry.
Place rice, 7 ½ cups water, and 1 teaspoon salt in a saucepan; bring to a boil and simmer until rice is nearly done yet a little chewy, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain any excess water.
Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a small skillet; add sliced onion and cook until lightly browned.
Layer about ½ of the rice in the bottom of a deep pot with a lid. Spoon the lamb masala mixture over the rice. Spread fried onion over lamb masala. Top with remaining rice.

Stir saffron and warm milk together in a small bowl; pour over top layer of rice. Cover the pot with the lid and place the pot over low heat; cook until the rice is thoroughly cooked, about 15 minutes.
Serve and enjoy!

lamb-and-broccoli-stew.name: Lamb And Broccoli Stew

ingredients.prep: stems reserved for another use, cut into small florets

ingredients.item: Flat-leaf parsley and fresh tarragon leaves

instructions: Whisk sugar, ¾ cup salt, and 10 cups water in a large bowl until salt and sugar dissolve. Add lamb, cover, and chill for at least 12 hours and up to 2 days.

Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat. Add onions, garlic, rosemary sprig, thyme sprig, and bay leaf. Cook, stirring often, until onions are golden brown and soft, 10-15 minutes. Remove pot from heat and add wine, stirring and scraping up any browned bits from bottom of pan. Return pot to heat and simmer until wine is reduced by half, about 3 minutes.
Remove lamb shoulder from brine; add to pot, along with broth. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer gently, partially covered and skimming fat occasionally, until lamb is fork-tender, 5-6 hours.

Transfer lamb to a platter and remove bones. Cut or shred meat into bite-size pieces. If needed, boil cooking liquid in pot until reduced to 6 cups, 15-30 minutes. Season sauce with salt, if needed. Return lamb to pot. DO AHEAD: Lamb can be prepared 3 days ahead. Let cool slightly, then chill until cold. Cover and keep chilled. Discard fat and reheat before serving.

Place eggs in a small saucepan and add water to cover by 1-inch. Bring to a boil and remove from heat. Cover and let sit for 3 minutes. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water and let cool completely. Peel.

Combine eggs, garlic, 3 tablespoons lemon juice, and ½ teaspoons salt in a blender. With the motor running, gradually add oil, blending until a creamy sauce forms. Season garlic emulsion with salt and more lemon juice, if desired.
Cook broccoli in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Drain; rinse under cold water.
Divide stew among bowls and garnish with broccoli, parsley, tarragon, and garlic emulsion.

lamb-and-cabbage-stew-with-fresh-shell-b.name: Lamb And Cabbage Stew With Fresh Shell Beans

ingredients.item: Canned crushed tomatoes with added puree

ingredients.prep: quartered, cored, cut into 1/4-inch slices (about 7 cups)

ingredients.item: Shelled fresh shell beans (such as cranberry
ingredients.prep: cannellini, flageolet, or pinto; from about 1 pound unshelled) or one 15-ounce can cannellini, rinsed, drained

instructions: Heat small skillet over medium-high heat. Add coriander and caraway seeds to dry skillet; toast until aromatic and slightly darker in color, stirring frequently, about 3 minutes. Finely grind in mortar with pestle or in spice mill. Transfer spice mixture to medium bowl. Add mint, salt, turmeric, crushed red pepper, and 1 tablespoon oil; mix to paste. Add lamb; toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 8 hours or overnight.

Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in large pot over medium heat. Add lamb mixture and onions; sauté until outside of meat is no longer pink and onions begin to soften, about 8 minutes. Add crushed tomatoes, garlic, cinnamon stick, and bay leaf. Bring to simmer. Add carrots, then cabbage; sprinkle with coarse salt and pepper. Add 1 1/2 cups water and 2 tablespoons lemon juice to pot; stir to combine. Bring to boil. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer until meat and cabbage are tender, stirring occasionally, 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours.

Meanwhile, place fresh beans, if using, in small saucepan. Add pinch of coarse salt and just enough water to cover beans. Simmer uncovered until just tender, 10 to 30 minutes, depending on kind of bean. Drain.

Remove cinnamon stick and bay leaf from stew. Add cooked beans (or canned beans, if using) and remaining 1 tablespoon lemon juice. Simmer 5 minutes to allow flavors to blend. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Refrigerate uncovered until cool; cover and keep chilled. Rewarm over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Stir parsley into stew. Divide stew among bowls. Sprinkle with ground cumin.

lamb-and-feta-frittata.name: Lamb And Feta Frittata

ingredients.item: Mild red pepper flakes and more torn herbs

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Combine garlic, za’atar, 1 Tbsp. oil, ½ tsp. lemon zest, and 1 tsp. lemon juice in a small bowl. Add lamb, season with salt, and mix well.
Gently whisk eggs and ¼ cup yogurt in a medium bowl; season with salt and black pepper. Stir in scallions, kale, cilantro, feta, basil, and tarragon.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium well-seasoned cast-iron or nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add small pinches of lamb mixture evenly across skillet and cook, undisturbed, until well browned, about 2 minutes. Toss and continue to cook, breaking up clumps with a spoon, until just cooked through, about 2 minutes more.

Pour in egg mixture and gently shake pan to distribute. Cook, pulling in edges with a rubber spatula to keep them from sticking to sides of pan and shaking pan occasionally, until edge of frittata has set evenly, about 3 minutes.
Transfer to oven and bake frittata until top is set but a small 1" circle of egg in the center still wobbles when shaken, 12–14 minutes.
Dollop with yogurt, sprinkle with red pepper, and top with lemon zest and herbs. Serve right out of skillet.

lamb-and-rice-stuffed-grape-leaves.name: Lamb And Rice Stuffed Grape Leaves
instructions: Place ground lamb, rice, 1/4 cups olive oil, mint, currants, pine nuts, salt, pepper, cumin, cinnamon, oregano, and egg in a bowl. Mix together thoroughly with a fork. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
Gently unroll and separate grape leaves. Rinse in cold water to remove brine. Drain. Reserve broken or less-than-perfect leaves to line pot.

Place grape leaves on work surface with smooth side down (ribs of leaves up). Place a rounded tablespoon of lamb-rice filling near bottom-center of grape leaf. Fold bottom sections of leaf over mixture, fold over sides, and roll toward the top of the leaf into a firm cylinder. Don't roll too tightly or leaves may burst when rice cooks.

Drizzle 1 tablespoon olive oil into pot; line bottom of pot with 1 or 2 layers of reserved grape leaves. Place dolmas in pot by arranging them along the sides, then working toward the center to cover the bottom. Leave enough space between dolmas to allow for expansion, but close enough to hold their shapes when cooking. If necessary, stack another layer on top of the first so they all fit. Pour in lemon juice and 2 teaspoons olive oil.

Invert a small plate and then a larger plate over the dolmas to weigh them down while they cook and prevent them from shifting. Pour in hot chicken broth. Bring to a simmer, uncovered, over medium-high heat. As soon as liquid is heated through and starting to bubble (2 to 4 minutes), reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and cook 35 minutes. Remove plates and check for doneness. Dolmas should look a bit puffed up, and a fork should pierce them easily. If not quite done, continue cooking without the weights: cover the pot and simmer until rice is tender, 10 to 15 minutes longer.
Serve warm or chilled. Garnish with curls of lemon zest, if desired.

lamb-and-shrimp-kebabs.name: Lamb And Shrimp Kebabs

ingredients.item: Boneless leg of lamb or top round

instructions: Chill lamb in freezer for 10 minutes. Place in a food processor and pulse until finely ground. Transfer to a large bowl.

Sprinkle 1 teaspoon salt over garlic and chop, occasionally smearing mixture with side of knife, until paste forms. Mix garlic paste, onion, cilantro, cumin, pepper flakes, black pepper, and remaining 1 tsp. salt into lamb, blending well. Add shrimp; mix to combine.

Measure 2 tablespoons lamb mixture; roll between your palms to form a 2"-long oval. Slide skewer halfway into lamb mixture, pressing to adhere. Repeat with remaining lamb mixture and skewers. DO AHEAD Can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

Build a medium-hot fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to high. Brush kebabs with oil and grill, turning occasionally, until nicely charred and just cooked through, about 6 minutes per side. Serve with Red Harissa.

lamb-and-winter-squash-soup.name: Lamb And Winter Squash Soup

ingredients.prep: cilantro sprigs, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Season lamb on all sides with salt. Let sit for 1 hour at room temperature or chill, uncovered, for up to 12 hours (longer is better; overnight works great).
Preheat oven to 400°. Roast chile on a rimmed baking sheet until puffy and it smells toasty, about 2 minutes. Remove seeds and place chile in a blender along with 1 cup hot water.

Heat broiler. Scatter onion and garlic on same rimmed baking sheet. Broil, undisturbed, until blackened on top (don’t worry if they get super dark), 12–14 minutes. Pop garlic out of skins and place garlic and onion in blender with chile. Purée until smooth but still speckled with chile; set aside.

Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Working in batches, cook lamb, turning occasionally until brown on all sides, 12–14 minutes total. Using a slotted spoon, transfer lamb to a plate. Carefully pour off oil and return lamb to pot. Add bay leaves, allspice, coriander, cumin, and oregano and cook, stirring to coat lamb, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Pour in 6 cups water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a bare simmer; mostly cover with lid (you want a little space for steam to escape) and cook, stirring occasionally, until lamb is tender, 60–75 minutes.
Add squash to stew and cook until almost tender, 6–8 minutes. Stir in onion-chile purée, season with salt, and cook 10 minutes to let flavors meld. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Ladle stew into bowls and top with feta and cilantro. Serve with lime wedges.
Do Ahead: Stew (without feta and cilantro) can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Add feta and cilantro just before serving.

lamb-and-zucchini-dumplings.name: Lamb And Zucchini Dumplings

ingredients.prep: finely chopped, white and green parts

instructions: In a small bowl, soak the peppercorns in ⅓ cup of lukewarm water for at least 1 hour, then strain out and discard the peppercorns. Wrap the zucchini in a clean cheesecloth or tea towel and squeeze to wring out excess moisture.

In a medium bowl, add the lamb and slowly pour in the peppercorn-infused water, a few drops at a time, and use your hands to mix it in well until the water is fully absorbed. Add the scallions, wine, ginger, soy sauce, and salt, and mix well until fully incorporated. Gently fold in the zucchini and mix until well combined.
Holding a wrapper in your palm, use a fork to add about 1 tablespoon of the filling to the center of the wrapper, then lightly pat down the filling with the fork to get rid of any air bubbles.

Fold the dumpling into a half-moon, pinching it shut with your thumbs and index fingers, then press the center of the dumpling while pulling on the corners to push out any air bubbles and shape it into a curved crescent. Inspect the dumpling for any holes and pinch them shut. Repeat with the rest of the wrappers to make 24 dumplings.

In a small bowl, whisk together the flour, vinegar, and 1 cup of water until combined to make a slurry. Brush the oil in a medium cast-iron or nonstick skillet and heat over medium-high heat until the oil starts to shimmer. Add 6 dumplings with the sealed edges lying flat in the pan, spacing them 1 inch apart, then slowly pour in just enough of the slurry to come one-third of the way up the dumplings. Partially cover the pan, leaving a small gap for steam to escape.

Increase the heat to high and cook for 2 minutes for cast iron (1 minute for nonstick). Lower the heat to medium for 2 minutes for cast iron (3 minutes for nonstick). Then lower the heat to low for 2 to 3 minutes for cast iron (3 minutes for nonstick).

Cook until the water has evaporated, leaving a paper-thin disk of golden-brown starch on the bottom of the pan. Remove from the heat and slide a thin, flexible spatula around the rim of the pan to loosen the edges of the starch disk, then carefully slide the spatula underneath and flip the disk onto a plate in one piece, crispy side up. Serve immediately, then clean the skillet and repeat with the remaining dumplings.

lamb-arm-with-cream-sauce-lezzet.name: Lamb Arm With Cream Sauce
instructions: 1. Kuzu kol etine tuz, karabiber serpiştirin ve genişçe kesilmiş yağlı kağıdın ortasına yerleştirin.
2.  Soğanı piyazlık doğrayıp küçük parçalar halinde kesilmiş tereyağı ile birlikte etin üzerine ekleyin.
3.  Taze kekik yapraklarını da serpiştirip- veya etin üzerinde derin kesikler yapıp yaprakları kesik yerlere yerleştirebilirsiniz- kağıdı katlayarak kapatın ve büyük güvecin içerisine yerleştirin.
4.  Kapağını kapatın.
5.  Güveci ocağa yerleştirip kısık ateşte et iyice yumuşayıncaya kadar yaklaşık 2.
6. 5-3 saat pişirin.
7.  Etin üzerindeki kağıdı açın ve 200 dereceye ayarlanmış fırın ızgarasında üzeri kızarıncaya kadar pişirmeye devam edin.
8.  Etin dibinde biriken suyu süzgeçten geçirerek bir sos tenceresine aktarın ve orta ateşte kaynamaya bırakın.
9.  Tuz, karabiber ile tatlandırın.
10.  Un ile soğuk suyu bir kasede pürüzsüz olacak şekilde çırpın.
11.  Et suyunu azar azar ekleyerek karıştırın ve 3-4 dakika kaynatın.
12.  Kremayı ilave edin ve 1-2 dakika sonra sosu ocaktan alın.
13.  İri parçalara ayrılmış eti servis tabağına aktarın.
14.  Üzerine sosu gezdirip taze kekik ile süsleyerek servis yapın.
15. Yumuşaklığı ile özel gecelerin kurtarıcısı olan fırında kuzu kol tarifine göz atmayı unutmayın.

lamb-arm-with-tomato-sauce-lezzet.name: Lamb Arm With Tomato Sauce
instructions: 1. Kemiksiz kuzu kol etini kabuğu soyulmuş sarımsak ve tane karabiber ile birlikte tencereye alın.
2.  Kısık ateşte pişirin.
3.  Et sulanmaya başladığında rendelenmiş domatesi ekleyin.
4.  Kısık ateşte pişirmeye devam edin.
5.  Et yumuşamaya başladığında tuz ilave edin.
6.  Sıcak veya ılık servis yapın.
7. Dilerseniz, fırında kuzu kol tarifine göz atabilirsiniz.

lamb-baby-food.name: Lamb Baby Food
instructions: Place lamb shank in a saucepan, cover with water, and add thyme. Cover and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook until meat is falling off bone, 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Transfer lamb and 16 ounces cooking liquid to two separate containers. Place in the refrigerator to chill, 1 hour to overnight. Discard remaining cooking liquid.
Skim off any solidified fat from chilled cooking liquid and discard.

Remove meat from bone and place in a food processor. Discard bone, excess fat, and tendons. Add 2 1/2 ounces cooking liquid to meat and process until a fine, even texture is achieved, adding more liquid as needed.

lamb-braised-in-pomegranate.name: Lamb Braised In Pomegranate

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Generously season lamb chops with salt and black pepper.
Heat vegetable oil in a Dutch oven over high heat. Place lamb chops in Dutch oven and cook until browned on all sides, about 8 minutes. Transfer lamb to a plate and reduce heat to medium.
Stir onion and a pinch of salt into the Dutch oven; cook until onions are slightly golden, about 3 minutes. Stir in garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Pour pomegranate juice into the Dutch oven and scrape any browned bits off of the bottom of the pot. Pour in balsamic vinegar, increase heat to high, and bring to a boil.

Stir mint leaves, rosemary, and red pepper flakes into pomegranate juice mixture. Continue to boil until liquid is reduced by half, about 10 minutes. Return lamb and any accumulated juices to the Dutch oven, spoon pomegranate mixture over lamb, and cover.
Cook in the preheated oven until lamb is fork tender, about 2 hours.

Transfer lamb to a plate and set the Dutch oven on the stovetop over high heat. Bring pomegranate mixture to a boil; cook, skimming any fat that accumulates, until liquid is reduced by 1/3, about 5 minutes.
Stir in honey and season with salt and black pepper. Return lamb to the Dutch oven; stir to combine. Garnish with pomegranate seeds, sliced mint leaves, and pumpkin seeds.

lamb-bulgogi-with-asian-pear-dipping-sau.name: Lamb Bulgogi With Asian Pear Dipping Sauce

ingredients.item: Boned butterflied leg of lamb (about 51/2 pounds; from one 61/2- to 7-pound bone-in leg)

instructions: Place green onions, sugar, chopped garlic, and sliced ginger in processor and blend until finely chopped, stopping occasionally to scrape down sides of bowl. Transfer mixture to medium bowl. Add soy sauce, mirin, Asian sesame oil, toasted sesame seeds, and black pepper; whisk marinade to blend. Pour 1 cup marinade into 15x10x2-inch glass baking dish. Open boned leg of lamb like book; add to baking dish, arranging in single layer. Pour remaining marinade over lamb, spreading to cover evenly. Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours and up to 1 day, turning lamb occasionally.

Puree Asian pear and chopped green onions in processor until smooth. Add soy sauce, mirin, and sugar and process until sugar dissolves. Add Asian sesame oil and 2 tablespoons toasted sesame seeds; process until sesame oil is incorporated (most sesame seeds will remain intact). Transfer sauce to 2-cup measuring cup. Season sauce to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Dipping sauce can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.

Coat grill rack with nonstick spray; prepare barbecue (medium heat). Thread jalapeño chile halves onto 2 metal skewers, dividing equally. Thread garlic cloves onto another metal skewer, spacing slightly apart. Place jalapeño and garlic skewers on plate and set aside.

Remove lamb from marinade and place on prepared grill with some marinade still clinging to surface (discard marinade in dish). Grill lamb until meat is cooked to desired doneness, about 15 to 20 minutes per side for medium (if lamb begins to burn, slide large sheet of heavy-duty aluminum foil underneath and continue to grill). Transfer lamb to work surface and let rest 10 minutes.
While lamb rests, grill jalapeños, garlic, and trimmed green onions until slightly charred and tender, 3 to 4 minutes per side. Transfer to work surface.

Place kochujang (hot pepper paste) in small bowl. Stir dipping sauce and divide among 8 small dishes. Arrange butter lettuce leaves on large serving platter to cover. Thinly slice grilled lamb and arrange over lettuce leaves. Cut garlic cloves lengthwise in half. Cut green onions into 2-inch pieces. Arrange jalapeños, garlic, and green onions around lamb. Sprinkle remaining 2 tablespoons toasted sesame seeds over lamb. Serve grilled lamb and vegetables with hot pepper paste. Allow guests to spread very small amounts of kochujang over lettuce leaves, arrange lamb and vegetables in lettuce leaves, then wrap filling with lettuce leaves and dip into sauce.

lamb-burger-meatballs-lezzet.name: Lamb Burger Meatballs
instructions: 1. Hamburgerin içinin sulu olması için kıymayı mümkün olduğunca iri çektirin.
2.  Kıyma ve taze karabiber ile arzu ettiğiniz baharatları bir kaba alarak 10 dakika yoğurun ve 2 saat süreyle dinlemeye bırakın.
3. Soğanı bir tavaya alarak karamelize olana kadar kavurun ve soğumaya bırakın.
4. Dinlendirdiğiniz hamburger harcını, hamburger ekmeğinin çapından biraz daha büyük ve kalınlığı 2 cm.
5.  olacak şekilde köfte yapın.
6.  Ekmeğin boyutuna göre şekil verdiğiniz köfteyi kızgın haldeki tavada veya ızgarada orta ateşte, her bir yüzünü 4 ila 5 dakika süreyle bir kez çevirerek pişirin.
7.  Pişmesine yakın köftenin üzerine cheddar peynirini ilave ederek erimesini bekleyin.
8.  Ekmeğin alt kısmına karamelize soğanı yayın ve üzerine köfteyi koyduktan sonra turşuyu ilave ederek üstünü kapatıp servis edin.

lamb-burgers.name: Lamb Burgers

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced; plus  0.25 cup chopped fennel fronds (optional)

instructions: Place capers in a small bowl and pour in warm water to cover. Let soak 20 minutes. Drain, rinse, and pat dry. Coarsely chop.
Whisk capers, mayonnaise, oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, mustard, and garlic in a medium bowl; taste and season with salt and more lemon juice, if desired.
Do Ahead: Aioli can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Shape lamb into 4 patties about 1" thick, season with salt, and let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, ideally cast iron, over medium. Cook lamb patties, working in batches if needed, until browned (they won’t take on as much color as a beef burger), 5–7 minutes. Turn and cook until browned on second side, about 5 minutes for medium-rare. Transfer patties to a plate and let rest 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss celery, fennel, fennel fronds (if using), onion, lemon juice, dried mint, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl. Season slaw with salt and pepper.
Generously spread aioli on cut sides of buns and build each burger with a lamb patty, 3 or 4 boquerones, and a mound of slaw. This is a messy burger, so the bib is not optional.

lamb-burgers-with-lemon-caper-aioli-and-.name: Lamb Burgers With Lemon-caper Aioli And Fennel Slaw

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced; plus 1/4 cup chopped fennel fronds (optional)

instructions: Place capers in a small bowl and pour in warm water to cover. Let soak 20 minutes. Drain, rinse, and pat dry. Coarsely chop.
Whisk capers, mayonnaise, oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, mustard, and garlic in a medium bowl; taste and season with salt and more lemon juice, if desired.
Shape lamb into 4 patties about 1" thick, season with salt, and let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, ideally cast iron, over medium. Cook lamb patties, working in batches if needed, until browned (they won’t take on as much color as a beef burger), 5–7 minutes. Turn and cook until browned on second side, about 5 minutes for medium-rare. Transfer patties to a plate and let rest 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss celery, fennel, fennel fronds (if using), onion, lemon juice, dried mint, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl. Season slaw with salt and pepper.
Generously spread aioli on cut sides of buns and build each burger with a lamb patty, 3 or 4 boquerones, and a mound of slaw. This is a messy burger, so the bib is not optional.
Aioli can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

lamb-burgers-with-yogurt-sauce-and-arugu.name: Lamb Burgers With Yogurt Sauce And Arugula

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Using your hands, crumble 1¼ lb. ground lamb into small pieces into a large bowl, scattering in a single layer across bottom and partway up sides of bowl. (This makes it easier to disperse the seasonings evenly without overworking the meat.) Using a Microplane, finely grate 1 lemon over meat; set lemon aside. Finely grate 2 garlic cloves into bowl. Sprinkle in 1 tsp. ground coriander, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper.

Finely chop ¼ cup (packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems and scatter half over lamb. Set remaining cilantro aside for making yogurt sauce. Toss ground lamb mixture with your hands just until combined—you don't want to overwork the meat mixture, otherwise it can become tough. Divide meat into 4 equal portions. Hold 1 portion in the palm of your hand, then gently pat down to make a patty that’s about ¾"-thick and just a bit wider than your buns (if you have small hands, it might be easier to do this on a cutting board). Place patty on a large plate and repeat with remaining portions.

Spoon ½ cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt into a measuring glass or small bowl. Cut reserved lemon in half, and squeeze juice from 1 half into yogurt. Add 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt, ¼ tsp. freshly ground black pepper, and reserved cilantro. Using a small whisk or fork, mix until oil is fully incorporated.

Heat a large cast-iron or stainless-steel skillet over medium. Spread 4 Tbsp. room-temperature unsalted butter over cut sides of 4 hamburger buns, preferably whole wheat. Working in 2 batches, toast buns, buttered side down, in skillet until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer to plates.

Increase heat to medium-high and add 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil to skillet. Once oil begins to shimmer, arrange lamb patties in skillet and cook until a dark brown crust forms on bottom side, about 5 minutes. Using a spatula, flip burgers and cook until browned and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 135° for medium. Transfer to a plate and let rest at least 5 minutes.

Place 4 cups baby arugula in a clean large bowl. Drizzle remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil over, then squeeze juice from remaining lemon half over. Season with remaining ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt and ¼ tsp. freshly ground black pepper and toss to combine.

Spread about 1 Tbsp. yogurt sauce on bottom half of each toasted bun. Top with a small handful of dressed arugula. Place patties on top of arugula. Spread 1 Tbsp. yogurt sauce over patties and close up hamburgers. Serve with remaining arugula salad alongside.

lamb-cage-on-a-bed-of-spinach-lezzet.name: Lamb Cage On A Bed Of Spinach
instructions: 1. Tuz, karabiber, hardal, taze baharatlar ve 2 yemek kaşığı ayçiçeği yağı ile pirzolaları iyice harmanlayın.
2.  Bir gün marine olması için bu şekilde üzerini kapatıp buzdolabında bekletin.
3.  Ispanak yapraklarını orta boy bir tencerede tuzlu suyla haşlayıp soğuk sudan geçirin ve suyunu iyice sıkın.
4.  Kalan ayçiçeği yağını tavaya alın.
5.  İnce doğranmış soğan, sarımsak, tuz, karabiber ve renkli biberleri soteleyin.
6.  Kremayı ilave edip ıspanaklarla iyice harmanlayın.
7.  Marine olan pirzolaları kızgın tavada arkalı önlü kızartın.
8.  150 dereceye ayarlı fırında 15 dakika daha pişirin ve ıspanakla birlikte servis yapın.

lamb-chanfana-teleculinaria.name: Lamb Chanfana
instructions: Corte o borrego em pedaços médios e deite-os para uma panela de barro ou de cerâmica.

À parte, misture o azeite, a banha, a cebola cortada em rodelas, os dentes de alho picados, os cravinhos e o louro. Deite sobre a carne, regue com o vinho, tempere com sal e pimenta, tape e leve ao forno a 180°C durante cerca de 3 horas.
Não mexa na carne enquanto a carne cozinha e, apenas se necessário, adicione mais vinho para que não queime.
Retire do forno e sirva com o molho e acompanhado com batatas cozidas e salada mista.

lamb-chops-lezzet.name: Lamb Chops
instructions: 1. Taze kekik, pul ve kırmızı biber ile tuzu 1’er çay kaşığı olacak şekilde etlerinin üstüne gezdirdikten sonra zeytinyağını ekleyip marinasyonun ete işlemesi için masaj yapın ve en az 2 saat dinlendirin.
2. Tavayı 5 dakika ısıtın ve eti tavaya alın.
3.  Eti tavaya koyduğunuz an “Cızzzz” sesi gelmelidir.
4.  Yüksek ateşte her iki yüzü de 3’er dakika mühürleyin ve sonrasında damak zevkine göre pişme derecesini ayarlayın.

lamb-chops-and-spinach-and-turnip-puree.name: Lamb Chops And Spinach And Turnip Purée
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Cook turnips in a large saucepan of boiling, salted water until tender, 10-15 minutes. Drain. Return to pan; add cream. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until cream coats turnips, about 4 minutes. Purée turnip mixture in a food processor or with an immersion blender until smooth. Cover and keep warm.
Meanwhile, heat 1 teaspoon oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Season lamb with salt and pepper. Cook fat side down until brown, 5-8 minutes.

Turn lamb over. Tuck 4 thyme sprigs under; place in oven. Roast until an instant-read thermometer inserted into center registers 52°C for medium-rare, 15-25 minutes. Let rest on a plate for 10 minutes.
Drain fat from skillet; add Marsala. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, stirring and scraping up browned bits from bottom of skillet, until reduced by half, 5-8 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 teaspoons oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and remaining thyme sprig; stir until beginning to brown, about 1 minute; discard garlic and thyme sprig. Add spinach by the handful, tossing and allowing it to wilt slightly between additions. Season with salt and pepper. Cook until tender, about 4 minutes.
Cut lamb between bones into chops and serve with spinach, turnip purée, and Marsala sauce.

lamb-chops-and-vegetables-in-foil.name: Lamb Chops And Vegetables In Foil

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Place 1 large piece heavy-duty aluminum foil vertically on a work surface and 1 large piece heavy-duty aluminum foil horizontally on top, large enough to cover 1 lamb chop and vegetables.
Place 1 lamb chop in middle of foil; rub with 1/2 tablespoon garlic, 1/6 rosemary, salt, and pepper. Repeat with remaining chops.
Stack 1/6 each mushrooms, carrots, zucchini, and onion on top of each chop. Place 1 tablespoon butter on each chop then drizzle each with 1 teaspoon lemon juice. Top each with 1 square feta cheese.
Wrap top piece of foil around lamb chop and vegetables, followed by bottom piece; tightly seal each package.
Bake in the preheated oven until lamb is cooked but still pink in the center and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 60°C (60 degrees C).

lamb-chops-in-the-air-fryer-lezzet.name: Lamb Chops In The Air Fryer
instructions: 1. Öncelikle derin bir karıştırma kabında marinasyon sosunu hazırlayın ve içine kuzu pirzolalarını ekleyin.
2.  Etin her tarafına sosu güzelce yedirin ve yarım saat kadar dinlendirin.
3.  Dinlenme süresinin sonunda, önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece air fryer’da pirzolaları 15-20 dakika süreyle pişirin.
4.  Pişirdikten sonra sıcak olarak servis edin.

lamb-chops-in-the-oven-or-in-the-air-fry.name: Lamb Chops In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
lamb-chops-in-the-oven-or-in-the-air-fry.original_name: Chuletas de cordero al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 2 cucharadas aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: En un bol, mezclamos la miel, la mostaza, el ajo muy picado, el aceite, sal, pimienta y las hojas de tomillo.
Untamos bien las chuletas con esta mezcla, por ambos lados. Si tenemos tiempo, las dejamos reposar 1 hora en la nevera para que cojan sabor.
Precalentamos el horno a 200 ºC. Colocamos las chuletas en una bandeja de horno forrada con papel vegetal, separadas entre sí.
Horneamos unos 20 minutos, dándoles la vuelta a mitad de cocción. El tiempo puede variar ligeramente según el grosor.

lamb-chops-in-tomato-sauce.name: Lamb Chops In Tomato Sauce

ingredients.item: Finely chopped parsley leaves and thin stems
. aleppo pepper flakes or substitute 1/4 tsp. red pepper flakes
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise and thinly sliced crosswise into half moons

instructions: In a large bowl, stir 2 tbsp. of the oil with the finely chopped parsley, garlic, lemon zest, Aleppo pepper, turmeric, and cinnamon. Season lamb chops with salt and pepper, and rub marinade all over chops. Let sit 15 minutes at room temperature.
Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine the shallots and 1 tbsp. of the red wine vinegar. Let shallots marinate at least 10 minutes and up to 30 minutes.

In a large high-sided skillet, heat two tbsp. of the oil over medium-high and add the lamb chops in a single layer. Cook, turning halfway through, until the lamb is golden on both sides and medium-rare, about 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate. Drain fat from skillet and wipe skillet clean.
Add the tomato sauce to the skillet and return to medium heat. Bring the tomato sauce to a simmer, stirring a few times, then remove from the heat and keep warm.
Toss the cucumbers and remaining roughly chopped parsley into the shallot mixture and stir in the remaining 2 tbsp. of oil. Season with salt.
Stir the yogurt with the remaining 2 tsp. of red wine vinegar. Season with salt.

Dollop yogurt and warm tomato sauce on bottom of 4 plates. Top with cucumber salad and lamb. Drizzle any extra dressing in cucumber salad bowl over lamb and sprinkle with more Aleppo. Serve immediately.

lamb-chops-recipe-lezzet.name: Lamb Chops Recipe

ingredients.item: 8 adet kuzu pirzola (yaklaşık 150–180 g her biri)
1 tatlı kaşığı taze biberiye veya kekik
1 yemek kaşığı tereyağı (isteğe bağlı, ekstra lezzet için)

instructions: 1. Kuzu pirzolaları bir kaba alın.
2.  Zeytinyağı, sarımsak, biberiye/kekik, tuz, karabiber ve kırmızı toz biber ile harmanlayın.
3.  Dilerseniz bu aşamada 30 dakika veya 2–3 saat buzdolabında bekletebilirsiniz.
4. Izgara yapıyorsanız, önceden ısıtılmış ızgarada pirzolaları her iki tarafı 5–7 dakika olacak şekilde kızartın.
5. Tavada pişirecekseniz, orta-yüksek ısıda ısıtılmış tavaya biraz zeytinyağı ve tereyağı ekleyin, pirzolaları altın rengi olana kadar pişirin.
6. Pişen pirzolaları servis etmeden önce 3–5 dakika dinlendirin, böylece etin suyu içinde kalır ve daha yumuşak olur.
7. Yanına dilimlenmiş limon, taze kekik veya biberiye ve ızgara sebzeler ile servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

lamb-chops-scottadito-with-charred-cherr.name: Lamb Chops Scottadito With Charred Cherry Tomatoes
instructions: Combine garlic, rosemary, and ¼ cup oil in a large bowl. Working one at a time, pound lamb chops between 2 sheets of plastic wrap to about ¼" thick; trim any excess fat. Season with salt and pepper and add to marinade; turn to coat. Cover and chill at least 2 hours and up to 1 day.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Remove lamb chops from marinade and wipe off marinade. Grill lamb chops, turning often and moving around on grill as needed, until charred on both sides, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a platter.
Drizzle tomatoes with oil; season with salt and pepper. Grill in a grill basket or large cast-iron skillet until lightly charred and blistered, about 4 minutes.
Serve tomatoes alongside lamb.

lamb-chops-with-balsamic-reduction.name: Lamb Chops With Balsamic Reduction
instructions: Mix rosemary, thyme, basil, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl; rub onto chops, coating both sides. Place chops onto a plate, cover, and let sit for 15 minutes.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chops in the hot skillet until no longer pink in the center, about 3 1/2 minutes per side for medium-rare. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 63°C (63 degrees C). Transfer to a serving platter and keep warm.

Add shallots to the skillet; cook and stir until just browned, 2 to 3 minutes. Pour vinegar into the pan and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits of food off the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon. Add broth; cook and stir until sauce has reduced by half, about 5 minutes.
Remove sauce from the heat and stir in butter until melted.
Serve over chops. Enjoy!

lamb-chops-with-curried-cauliflower.name: Lamb Chops With Curried Cauliflower
instructions: Steam cauliflower until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Transfer to bowl; sprinkle with salt and pepper.

Sprinkle lamb with salt, pepper, and 3/4 teaspoon curry powder. Heat oil in medium skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté lamb to desired doneness, 4 to 5 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer to plates. Pour off oil from skillet.

Add 1 1/4 teaspoons curry powder and flour to skillet; whisk 15 seconds. Add broth, cream, and chutney. Boil until thick, whisking, 2 minutes. Add cauliflower and half of green onions; toss to heat through.
Spoon curried cauliflower over lamb. Sprinkle with remaining green onions.

lamb-chops-with-fresh-herbs-and-roasted-.name: Lamb Chops With Fresh Herbs And Roasted Figs
instructions: Combine herbs in small bowl. Rub lamb with olive oil, half of chopped herbs, and garlic; cover and chill overnight.

Preheat oven to 218°C. Heat grapeseed oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Sprinkle lamb with salt and pepper; sear until brown on both sides, 5 minutes total. Transfer lamb to large rimmed baking sheet; roast to desired doneness, about 20 minutes for medium-rare. Transfer lamb to cutting board; let rest 5 to 10 minutes. Maintain oven temperature; reserve baking sheet for figs.
Place figs and thyme sprigs on baking sheet. Sprinkle with remaining herbs and drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil. Roast in oven at 218°C for 10 minutes.
Cut lamb racks into individual chops; arrange on plates and place figs alongside.

lamb-chops-with-greens-and-sorrel-salsa-.name: Lamb Chops With Greens And Sorrel Salsa Verde

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into pieces

instructions: Pat lamb dry; season with salt and pepper. Let sit at room temperature 1 hour.

Meanwhile, purée sorrel, mint, parsley, lemon zest, red pepper flakes, about 1 garlic clove, and ⅓ cup oil in a blender, scraping down sides as needed, until mixture is smooth. Season salsa verde with salt and pepper; set aside.
