Gently toss orange pieces and fennel with lemon juice in a medium bowl; season lightly with salt.
Tear the meat off the bones in large pieces and mound on a platter. Arrange citrus and fennel salad next to meat. Top meat with more rosemary and drizzle pan juices over.
Do Ahead: Lamb can be roasted 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Gently reheat, covered, in a 300° oven until warmed all the way through, at least 1 hour, before serving.

lamb-shoulder-with-patoud-argiro.name: Lamb Shoulder With Patoud

ingredients.item: 300 grσπανάκι ή σέσκουλα πλυμένα και χοντροκομμένα
300 grσπανάκι ή σέσκουλα πλυμένα και χοντροκομμένα

instructions: Ζεματάμε πρώτα τη συκωταριά για 6-8 λεπτά και αφού κρυώσει την ψιλοκόβουμε.
Σε βαθύ τηγάνι ή πλασοτέ κατσαρόλα, ζεσταίνουμε το μισό ελαιόλαδο και μαραίνουμε σε χαμηλή φωτιά για λίγα λεπτά το ξερό κρεμμύδι και τα φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια.
Προσθέτουμε την ψιλοκομμένη συκωταριά και την αφήνουμε να σοταριστεί για 5-6 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το ρύζι και τον πελτέ και ανακατεύουμε.
Σβήνουμε με το κρασί.
Προσθέτουμε τα σέσκουλα και 1 φλ. νερό.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι και σιγοβράζουμε μέχρι η γέμιση να πιει όλα τα υγρά και να μείνει στεγνή.
Τέλος πασπαλίζουμε με τα φρέσκα μυρωδικά και αφήνουμε τη γέμιση να κρυώσει.

lamb-shoulder-with-polenta-and-beans.name: Lamb Shoulder With Polenta And Beans

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: white and pale-green parts only, halved lengthwise, sliced crosswise  0.25” thick, divided

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Blend basil and oil in a food processor until smooth. Place lamb in a roasting pan. Season generously with salt and pepper and rub basil purée all over. Cover with foil, and cook until fork-tender, 3–3½ hours. Increase oven temperature to 500°. Remove foil and roast lamb until golden brown, 10–15 minutes. Let rest 30 minutes. Pour pan juices into a measuring cup and skim; set jus aside.

Reduce oven temperature to 325°. Mix thyme, shallot, garlic, polenta, cream, and 3 cups broth in a 13x9x2” baking dish; season with salt and pepper. Cover with foil and bake, without stirring, until polenta is softened and liquid is almost completely absorbed, 60–75 minutes. Thin polenta with more broth, if needed.
Bring sugar, vinegar, chili paste, 1 tsp. salt, and ⅓ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Add half of leeks, reduce heat, and simmer until soft, 8–10 minutes. Drain; set leeks aside.

Wipe out saucepan. Cook bacon over medium heat until fat renders and bacon is crisp, about 5 minutes; transfer to a paper towel–lined plate. Add remaining uncooked leeks to saucepan and cook, stirring often, until soft, 8–10 minutes. Add beans, bacon, and reserved boiled leeks and cook until heated through, about 3 minutes; season with salt and pepper.
Untie lamb and thinly slice. Divide polenta among bowls. Top with lamb, beans, and herbs; drizzle with jus.

lamb-skewers-recipe-comedera.name: Lamb Skewers Recipe
instructions: Iniciamos esta preparación cortando la cebolla y los pimientos en trozos grandes. Por otro lado, el limón procederemos a cortarlos en rodajas.
En un tazón grande, mezcla el aceite de oliva, el ajo picado, las hierbas frescas picadas, sal y pimienta.
Agrega los cubos de cordero al tazón y mezcla bien para que se impregnen de la marinada. Cubre y refrigera por al menos 1 hora.
Precalienta la parrilla o el asador a fuego medio-alto.
Ensarta los cubos de cordero marinados en brochetas alternando con trozos de cebolla, pimiento y rodajas de limón.
Asa las brochetas en la parrilla caliente durante unos 10-15 minutos, girándolas ocasionalmente para que se cocinen uniformemente y se doren por todos lados.
Retira las brochetas del fuego y deja reposar unos minutos antes de servir.

lamb-skewers-with-vegetable-couscous-lez.name: Lamb Skewers With Vegetable Couscous

ingredients.item: Yarım çay bardağı esmer toz şeker

instructions: 1. Kuzu şişlerin sosu için balzamik sirke, esmer toz şeker, ezdiğiniz sarımsak, ince kıydığınız biberiye ve tuzu bir sos tenceresine alın.
2.  Sos kaynayıncaya kadar yüksek ateşte pişirin.
3.  Kaynadıktan sonra altını kısıp sos kıvam almaya başlayıncaya kadar 5-6 dakika daha pişirin.
4.  Kuşbaşı kuzu etleri ve arpacık soğanları şişlere sıra sıra dizin.
5.  Şişleri yayvan bir kaba alın ve pişirdiğiniz sosu üzerine gezdirin.
6.  Kuzu şişleri 20 dakika sosun içinde bekletin.
7.  Marine olan şişleri sosuyla beraber bir fırın kabına alın.
8.  Önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında 20-25 dakika pişirin.
9.  Sebzeli kuskus için yemeklik doğradığınız soğanı zeytinyağında pembeleşinceye kadar soteleyin.
10.  Küp doğradığınız kabak, sarı biber ve havucu ilave edin.
11.  İnce doğradığınız yeşil soğan, kuskus ve et suyunu ekleyip kapağı kapalı olarak 10-15 dakika pişirin.
12.  Küp doğradığınız konserve kırmızı biber ve ince kıydığınız yeşillikleri ilave edin.
13.  Karıştırıp ocaktan alın.
14.  Sebzeli kuskusu bir servis tabağına alın.
15.  Üzerine kuzu şişleri yerleştirin.
16.  Üzerine şişleri pişirdiğiniz balzamik sirkeli sostan az bir miktar gezdirip sıcak servis yapın.

lamb-skewers-with-vegetables-lezzet.name: Lamb Skewers With Vegetables
instructions: 1. Pilav için pirinci bol suyla yıkayıp süzün.
2.  Tereyağını pilav tenceresinde eritin.
3.  Pirinci ekleyip, sürekli karıştırarak 5 dakika kavurun.
4.  Sıcak suyu ilave edin.
5.  Bir taşım kaynatıp ateşi kısın.
6.  Pirinçler suyunu çekene kadar pişirin.
7.  Ocaktan alıp haşlanmış mısırları ekleyin.
8.  Harmanlayıp demlenmeye bırakın.
9.  Diğer tarafta hazır kuzu çöp şişleri fırın ızgarasında pişirin.
10.  Servis tabağına aldığınız mısırlı pilavın üzerine yerleştirin.
11.  İsteğe göre taze soğan, kırmızıbiber ve kiraz domateslerle süsleyip servis yapın.

lamb-sliders.name: Lamb Sliders
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill to medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Mix garlic, cumin, coriander, allspice, salt, and pepper together in a bowl; add lamb and mix well. Form mixture into 2-ounce patties.

Grill patties on the preheated grill until cooked through, 2 to 3 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 71°C (70 degrees C). Place rolls on the grill and heat until toasted, 1 to 2 minutes.
Layer spinach, tzatziki sauce, lamb patty, red onion, and feta cheese in each roll, creating a slider.

lamb-souvlaki.name: Lamb Souvlaki
instructions: Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, oregano, garlic, salt, and pepper together in a medium bowl.
Add cubed lamb and stir until lamb is coated with marinade. Cover and refrigerate 3 hours, or overnight.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate. Thread marinated lamb onto skewers, reserving any remaining marinade.
Grill skewers until desired doneness, 10 to 12 minutes, basting with the reserved marinade and turning occasionally for even cooking.
Serve and enjoy!

lamb-stew.name: Lamb Stew

ingredients.item: " stick cinnamon or  0.5 tsp. ground cinnamon

ingredients.prep: mint leaves, and/or finely chopped preserved lemon (for serving; optional)

instructions: Coarsely chop cauliflower and pulse in a food processor until about the size of grains of rice (or, you can very finely chop with a knife instead). You should have about 2 cups.

Heat oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Cook cauliflower, stirring often, until golden brown all over and charred in spots, 6–8 minutes. Remove from heat; season with salt and pepper. Let cool in skillet.
Mix yogurt, mint, and lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Yogurt can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Season lamb shanks very generously all over with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Working in 2 batches, cook lamb shanks in a single layer, turning occasionally, until browned all over, 8–12 minutes per batch. As the shanks finish cooking, transfer to a large plate.

Reduce heat to medium; add onions and garlic, cut side down, to the same pot and cook, tossing onions occasionally, until onions are browned in spots and garlic is golden brown, about 5 minutes. Add cinnamon and crushed coriander and cook, stirring constantly, until spices are very fragrant, about 1 minute. Add harissa paste and cook, stirring often and scraping bottom of pot, until vegetables are coated and paste is slightly darkened in color, about 2 minutes. Add 7 cups water, stirring to release any bits stuck on bottom of pot. Season generously with salt and pepper and bring to a simmer. Return lamb shanks to pot and bring stew back up to a simmer. Cover with a lid, leaving slightly askew so steam can escape, and cook, adjusting heat to maintain a very gentle simmer and skimming foam from surface as needed, until meat is tender and easily pulls away from bones, 1½–2 hours.

Transfer lamb shanks to a cutting board and let cool 10–15 minutes; keep liquid at a simmer. Pull meat from bones and tear into bite-size pieces. Add bones back to pot as you go. Transfer meat to a medium bowl and cover with plastic wrap.

Simmer bones in broth, uncovered, until liquid is thick and very flavorful, 25–30 minutes. Remove from heat; add meat back to pot and let cool uncovered (bones and all) until no longer steaming. Cover pot and chill stew at least 12 hours (you can skip this step, but it will dramatically improve the flavor).

Uncover stew and spoon off half to three-quarters of fat on the surface; discard. Gently reheat stew until barely simmering. Pluck out and discard bones and garlic heads (don't worry about any cloves that may have escaped into stew). Taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Ladle into bowls and serve with Toasted Cauliflower Crumbs, Mint Yogurt, harissa, and olives, mint leaves, and/or preserved lemon as desired.
Do Ahead: Stew can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

lamb-stew-traditional-recipe-teleculinar.name: Lamb Stew - Traditional Recipe
instructions: Arranje e corte o borrego em pedaços, deite-os numa tigela, tempere com sal, pimenta, 3 dentes de alho picados, as folhas de louro e o vinho tinto e deixe marinar no frio de um dia para o outro.

Leve um tacho ao lume com o azeite, deixe aquecer, junte as cebolas e o restante alho picados e deixe refogar um pouco. Junte a carne escorrida, mexa e deixe cozinhar durante 5 minutos. Adicione depois o colorau, os cominhos e a marinada e deixe cozinhar lentamente, acrescentando água aos poucos se necessário, até a carne ficar macia.
Rectifique o sal, tempere com piripiri, retire do lume, adicione folhas de hortelã a gosto e sirva com batatas cozidas ou pão frito.

lamb-stew-recipe-lezzet.name: Lamb Stew Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 kg kuzu kuşbaşı eti (tercihen but kısmından)
3 yemek kaşığı sıvı yağ veya 2 yemek kaşığı tereyağı
2 adet orta boy domates (rendelenmiş veya doğranmış)
1 su bardağı sıcak su veya et suyu
Taze kekik veya defne yaprağı (isteğe bağlı)
Klasik kuşbaşı kuzu eti yerine dana eti veya kuzu incik kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir tat için tavuk göğsü veya hindi eti tercih edilebilir.
Zeytinyağı veya ayçiçek yağı ile değiştirilebilir.
Daha zengin bir lezzet için tereyağı + sıvı yağ karışımı kullanılabilir.
Beyaz soğan yerine kırmızı soğan veya arpacık soğan tercih edilebilir.
Soğan miktarı damak tadına göre artırılabilir veya azaltılabilir.
Sarımsak yerine sarımsak tozu veya granül sarımsak kullanılabilir.
Taze domates yerine konserve domates veya rendelenmiş domates kullanılabilir.
Salça yerine biber salçası veya karışık domates-biber salçası ekleyebilirsiniz.
Dolmalık biber yerine sivri biber veya kırmızı biber kullanılabilir.
Acı sevenler için jalapeno veya acı biber ekleyebilirsiniz.
Tuz ve karabiber yerine pul biber, isot veya kırmızı toz biber ile tatlandırabilirsiniz.
Taze kekik veya defne yaprağı aroma artırır; bunları kuru otlarla değiştirebilirsiniz.
Sıcak su yerine tavuk veya et suyu kullanmak yemeğe daha yoğun lezzet katar.

instructions: 1. Geniş bir tencerede sıvı yağı veya tereyağını ısıtın, kuşbaşı kuzu etlerini ekleyip her tarafı hafifçe kahverengi olana kadar kavurun.
2. Doğranmış soğanları ve sarımsağı ekleyip soğanlar yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
3. Domates salçasını ekleyip kısa bir süre kavurduktan sonra doğranmış veya rendelenmiş domatesleri ekleyin.
4. Tuz, karabiber, pul biber ve isteğe bağlı kekik/defne yaprağını ekleyin.
5. Sıcak su veya et suyunu ekleyip tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
6. Kısık ateşte 1,5–2 saat yavaşça pişirin; et iyice yumuşadığında ocaktan alın.
7. İsteğe bağlı olarak üzerine ince kıyılmış maydanoz serpiştirerek servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

lamb-stew-with-butternut-squash.name: Lamb Stew With Butternut Squash
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Season lamb with salt.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Cook and stir 1/2 the lamb cubes in hot oil until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer browned meat with a slotted spoon to a plate, reserving drippings in the pot. Add remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the Dutch oven. Cook and stir second 1/2 the lamb cubes until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer lamb to plate. Reduce heat to medium-low.

Cook and stir onion, carrots, and garlic in Dutch oven until slightly softened, 3 to 5 minutes. Stir lamb cubes and any accumulated juices, tomatoes, beef stock, thyme, and rosemary into onion mixture and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits of food off of the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon. Cover Dutch oven with an oven-proof lid.

Cook stew in the covered Dutch oven in the preheated oven until the lamb is tender, 2 to 3 hours. Stir butternut squash cubes into stew, recover the Dutch oven, and return to the preheated oven until squash is tender, 20 to 25 minutes.

lamb-stew-with-potatoes-comedera.name: Lamb Stew With Potatoes

ingredients.item: 1  kilo de costilla o paletilla de cordero
2   tomates rojos grande o 2 tazas de puré de tomate
1  vaso de vino blanco seco o vino tinto

instructions: Comenzaremos por lavar bien los dientes de ajo, sin pelarlos. También lavaremos el pimiento, retiraremos el resto de rama, y lo abriremos para quitar las semillas y las partes blancas internas. Luego, lo cortaremos en cuadros.
En el caso de las patatas, las pelaremos y las picaremos en cubos. También pelaremos la cebolla y la picaremos de la misma forma. Finalmente, pelaremos los ajos y los picaremos menudamente.
Hay una última cosa que hacer, respecto a los vegetales. Si has decidido utilizar un tomate entero en lugar de puré de tomate, tendrás que lavarlo y que picarlo en trozos.
Luego, necesitaremos una cacerola grande (antiadherente). También podemos utilizar una paellera. Allí vamos a calentar un chorro generoso de aceite.

Prepararemos un plato cubierto de una capa de harina.  Gracias a este, podremos salpimentar cada pieza del cordero y luego rebozarla, antes de freírla en el aceite que acabamos de calentar. El objetivo será, puntualmente, dorar cada costilla por ambos lados.
Cuando las costillas estén doradas, las retiraremos del calor y las reservaremos. Si hace falta, dependiendo del tamaño de la olla o paellera, haremos esta cocción en varias tandas.
Al retirar las costillas, podemos depositarlas en un plato cubierto con una hoja de papel absorbente, para eliminar el exceso de grasa.
Sin apagar el aceite, agregaremos el ajo para sofreírlo. Los dejaremos cocinarse un par de minutos, removiendo con frecuencia, y luego incorporaremos la cebolla.
Dejaremos que se cocine tres minutos más, y entonces agregaremos el pimiento.

Espera un par de minutos e incorpora el tomate. Entonces, mezcla todos los ingredientes y condimenta la salsa. Añade la guindilla, el pimentón dulce, un toquecito de sal, una cucharadita de pimienta en polvo, la hoja de laurel. También vamos a agregar el vino y enseguida, mezclaremos todo muy bien.
Dejaremos que la salsa se cocine por cinco minutos más, para que el alcohol se reduzca.
Pasado este tiempo, añade las patatas en trozos.  Luego, las cubriremos con caldo de carne. Si hace falta más líquido para cubrir las patatas, podemos añadir un poco de agua adicional.

Vuelve a incorporar el cordero y deja que la caldereta se cocine durante 40 minutos, a fuego medio-bajo. Vigila la cocción frecuentemente, para asegurarte de los ingredientes no se deshidraten. Si te parece que empiezan a secarse, agrega más agua para compensar lo que se ha evaporado.
Mientras se cocina el cordero, lava muy bien el perejil. Escúrrelo y luego pica las ramas muy finamente.
Cuando se termine el tiempo de cocción, la caldereta de cordero estará lista para servirse. Al momento de hacerlo, espolvorea con el perejil picado.

lamb-stew-with-vegetables-lezzet.name: Lamb Stew With Vegetables
instructions: 1. Sarımsakları temizleyin.
2.  Güvecin içini 1 diş sarımsakla ovup 1-2 kaşık sıvıyağla yağlayın.
3.  Sebzeleri temizleyip yıkayın.
4. Fasulyeleri ikiye kesin.
5.  Patates, domates ve biberleri doğrayın.
6.  Soğanları temizleyin.
7.  Eti kekikle harmanlayıp güvece alın.
8.  Sırasıyla soğan, fasulye, biber, patates ve domatesleri ekleyin.
9. Tuz, karabiber, su ve kalan yağı ilave edip güvecin üzerini alüminyum folyo ile kapatın.
10.  160 dereceye ayarlı fırında 1 saat pişirin.
11.  Sıcak olarak servis yapın.
12. Afiyet olsun.
13. Dilerseniz, klasik kuzu güveç tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

lamb-stewed-with-vegetables-teleculinari.name: Lamb Stewed With Vegetables
instructions: Arranje o peixe e tempere-o com sal, pimenta e sumo de limão. Reserve durante 15 minutos.
Arranje a couve, retirando a parte mais dura; descasque as batatas e as cenouras e corte-as em cubinhos.
Refogue a cebola e os alhos, descascados e picados, num tacho com o azeite quente, depois junte o louro e a polpa de tomate, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar, durante 5 minutos.

Junte as batatas e as cenouras, cubra com água quente e cozinhe por 15 minutos. Após esse tempo, adicione a couve e deixe cozinhar por mais 12 minutos. Por fim, acrescente o peixe e termine de cozinhar (cerca de 15 minutos). Sirva a corvina, decorada com salsa.

lamb-stir-fry-with-pomegranate-and-yogur.name: Lamb Stir-fry With Pomegranate And Yogurt

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Toast cumin and coriander seeds in a small dry skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 1 minute. Let cool, then finely chop. Toss lamb with cumin, coriander, paprika, garlic, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl to coat; season with salt and pepper. Cover and chill 15 minutes.
Whisk yogurt and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high heat. Working in batches, cook lamb, tossing occasionally, until browned, about 5 minutes per batch; transfer to a plate with a slotted spoon.

Add onion to skillet and cook, stirring often, until beginning to brown and soften, about 3 minutes. Add ½ cup water; season with salt and pepper and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is tender and water is evaporated, about 3 minutes. Return lamb to skillet and toss to combine. Season with salt and pepper.
Serve lamb over rice, topped with yogurt, pomegranate seeds, pistachios, and herbs.
DO AHEAD: Lamb can be marinated 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

lamb-tagine.name: Lamb Tagine

ingredients.prep: excess fat trimmed, cut into 2" pieces

instructions: Pat lamb dry with paper towels, then season on all sides with salt. Let sit at room temperature 1 hour, or chill, uncovered, up to 12 (longer is better; overnight works great).

Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Working in batches, cook lamb, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides, 12–14 minutes total. Using a slotted spoon, transfer lamb to a plate. Add yellow onion and 2 Tbsp. water to pot and cook, stirring occasionally and scraping browned bits from bottom of pot, until onion is slightly softened, 8–10 minutes. Add ginger, garlic, bay leaves, raisins, and ⅓ cup almonds. Cook, stirring occasionally, until garlic is softened, about 3 minutes.

Return lamb to pot and add tomato paste, cinnamon, cumin, red pepper flakes, turmeric, and cardamom. Cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture is fragrant and tomato paste has darkened and is beginning to stick to bottom of pot, about 3 minutes. Pour in 6 cups water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and bring to a bare simmer. Cover partially with lid (you want a little space for steam to escape) and cook, stirring occasionally, until lamb is tender and liquid has thickened, 60–75 minutes. Remove from heat; taste and adjust seasoning with salt.
Meanwhile, toast remaining 2 Tbsp. almonds in a small dry skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until golden brown, 4–6 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let cool before coarsely chopping.
Toss red onion and mint in a small bowl. Squeeze out juice from lemon over; season with salt. Toss again to coat.
Ladle stew into bowls. Top with chopped almonds and onion salad.

lamb-tagine-with-chickpeas-and-apricots.name: Lamb Tagine With Chickpeas And Apricots

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Place chickpeas in a medium saucepan. Add water to cover by 2". Let soak overnight.

Drain chickpeas; return to same saucepan. Add 2 whole garlic cloves and cinnamon stick. Add water to cover by 2". Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium and simmer until chickpeas are tender, about 45 minutes. Drain; set aside.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high heat. Season lamb with salt and pepper. Working in batches, brown lamb on all sides, about 4 minutes per batch. Transfer lamb to a medium bowl. Add onion to pot; reduce heat to medium, season with salt and pepper, and sauté until soft and beginning to turn golden, about 5 minutes. Add chopped garlic, Ras-el-Hanout , and ginger. Stir for 1 minute. Add tomatoes and lamb with any accumulated juices. Bring to a boil. Add 2 1/2 cups stock. Return to a boil, reduce heat to low, partially cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until lamb is tender, about 1 hour 30 minutes.
Stir in chickpeas; simmer until heated through, about 10 minutes. Stir in apricots; simmer until heated through, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Spoon couscous onto a large, shallow platter, forming a large well in center. Spoon tagine into center. Sprinkle cilantro over.

lamb-tandoori-lezzet.name: Lamb Tandoori
instructions: 1. Özel günlerimize uygun yemek tarifleri arasında üst sıralarda bulunan yemeğimize başlayalım.
2.  Tereyağını eritip kuzu kolu tavada önlü arkalı hafif kızartın ve tencereye aktarın.
3.  Soğanları, defne yaprağını ve tane biberleri serpiştirip üzerini 2 parmak geçecek kadar su ekleyin.
4.  Tuz ile tatlandırın.
5.  Kısık ateşte 3 saat ya da et iyice yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
6.  Pişen eti fırın kabına aktarın ve üzerini folyo ile örterek 200 dereceye ayarlı fırında 30-35 dakika daha pişirin.
7.  Sıcak servis yapın.
8. Pilavda kullandığınız firik ve bulgur miktarını damak zevkinize göre azaltıp fazlalaştırabilirsiniz.

lamb-tartare.name: Lamb Tartare

ingredients.item: . (or more) finely chopped preserved lemon peel

instructions: Cut loin from rack of lamb; discard bones or reserve for another use. Trim any silver skin from meat; discard. Cut meat into ¼”-thick slices. Stack two or three slices and cut into ¼”-thick strips, then crosswise into small cubes. Place meat in a medium bowl and press plastic wrap directly onto surface of meat; chill until ready to serve.

Just before serving, combine lamb, capers, mint, preserved lemon peel, and shallot in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper and mix gently to combine. Divide tartare between 2 plates and top each with an egg yolk. Drizzle with oil, squeeze lemon juice over, and sprinkle with more salt. Serve with toast.
DO AHEAD: Lamb can be cut 2 hours ahead. Keep chilled.

lamb-tenderloin-with-fennel-and-citrus-l.name: Lamb Tenderloin With Fennel And Citrus
instructions: 1. Soğanı yemeklik doğrayın.
2.  Zeytinyağında soteleyin.
3.  Rezeneleri ilave edin.
4.  Biraz daha kavurup 1 su bardağı portakal suyunu ve tuz ile karabiberi ilave ederek diri kalacak kıvamda pişirin.
5.  Diğer tarafta ayçiçek yağını tavada ısıtın.
6.  Bonfileleri ilave edip 1-2 dakika pişirin.
7.  Şarabı ilave edip 1-2 dakika daha pişirin.
8.  Kalan portakal suyunu ilave edip pişirmeye devam edin.
9.  Son olarak kremayı ekleyip 1 dakika daha pişirip ocağı kapatın.
10.  Servis tabağına önce rezeneleri alın.
11.  Üzerine bonfileleri ilave edin.
12.  Bonfilenin tavada kalan sosunu üzerine gezdirin.
13.  Portakal dilimleri ile süsleyip servis yapın.

lamb-with-apricots-argiro.name: Lamb With Apricots
instructions: Σοτάρουμε πρώτα σε μία κατσαρόλα το κρέας για 4 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει.
Το βγάζουμε σε πιατέλα και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι , το σκόρδο και τα αφήνουμε για 5 λεπτά.
Ξαναβάζουμε το κρέας στην κατσαρόλα και σβήνουμε με το κονιάκ.
Προσθέτουμε το ζωμό, το ξύσμα, το χυμό πορτοκάλι, το μέλι, την κανέλα.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Σκεπάζουμε και αφήνουμε το φαγητό να βράσει σε χαμηλή φωτιά για 1 ώρα.
Ανοίγουμε το καπάκι και ρίχνουμε τα βερίκοκα κομμένα στη μέση, καθώς και το δυόσμο, και αφήνουμε να βράσει για ακόμα 30 λεπτά, μέχρι η σάλτσα να μελώσει.
Λίγο πριν κατεβάσουμε το φαγητό από τη φωτιά ρίχνουμε τα αμύγδαλα , ανακατεύουμε και σερβίρουμε.

lamb-with-artichokes.name: Lamb With Artichokes

ingredients.prep: quartered, and/or 4–6 watermelon and/or purple radishes, thinly sliced
labneh, or plain whole-milk Greek yogurt (for serving)
a tart, citrusy spice generally sold in ground form, can be found at Middle Eastern markets, specialty foods stores, and online.

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 275°. If lamb is tied or trussed, remove any twine or netting. Sprinkle lamb all over with 3 Tbsp. sumac, 5 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 Tbsp. pepper.

Reroll lamb so the fattier side is on top (it doesn’t have to be tight; you can just close it back up like a book). Using 3–4 pieces of kitchen twine, tie lamb in 2" intervals to close. Place bottom halves of both garlic heads, cut side up, in the center of a 13x9" baking dish and set lamb, fat side up, on top (the garlic acts as a makeshift, better-tasting wire rack). Scatter cloves from remaining top halves of garlic heads around lamb, then tuck artichokes and sprigs from ½ bunch oregano around. Pour in wine and oil; season vegetables with salt and pepper. Roast lamb and artichokes until a thermometer inserted into the thickest part of lamb registers 135° for medium-rare, 2–2½ hours.

Remove lamb and artichokes from oven and increase temperature to 500° (taking the lamb out while the oven heats up prevents the meat from overcooking).Once oven temperature is at 500°, slide baking dish back into oven and roast until fat on lamb is golden brown and artichokes are sizzling and starting to crisp around the edges, 10–12 minutes. Carefully transfer lamb to a cutting board and let rest at least 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, scatter half of mint leaves over artichokes and toss well to coat. Toss radishes, shallot, and vinegar in a small bowl to combine; season radish salad with salt and pepper.

Thinly slice lamb and arrange on a platter or serve directly on cutting board and spoon some of the artichoke mixture and any pan juices over. Scatter sesame seeds, oregano leaves, more sumac, and remaining mint on top.
Spoon some aioli into a bowl and serve lamb with radish salad, aioli, and remaining artichoke mixture alongside.
Do Ahead: Lamb and artichokes can be roasted 3 hours ahead. Let sit at room temperature. Reheat artichokes just before serving.

lamb-with-artichokes-and-yogurt-in-the-o.name: Lamb With Artichokes And Yogurt In The Oven
lamb-with-artichokes-and-yogurt-in-the-o.original_name: Αρνί µε αγκινάρες και γιαούρτι στο φούρνο

ingredients.item: 1½ kgαρνί κομμένο σε μερίδες, χεράκι ή μπούτι
1½ kgαρνί κομμένο σε μερίδες, χεράκι ή μπούτι

instructions: Πλένουμε καλά το κρέας, για να απομακρύνουμε τυχόν κοκαλάκια από το ταλιάρισμα (τον τρόπο κοπής).
Το τοποθετούμε σε μεγάλο μπολ, στύβουμε το λεμόνι και αλείφουμε καλά το αρνί με τον χυμό του.
Περιχύνουμε με το μισό ελαιόλαδο από τη συνολική ποσότητα της συνταγής και πασπαλίζουμε με αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά, ώστε το κρέας να μαριναριστεί ομοιόμορφα, και μεταφέρουμε σε ταψί μαζί με τα υγρά που έχουν μείνει στο μπολ.
Ραντίζουμε το αρνί με λίγο νερό.
Σκεπάζουμε το ταψί με καπάκι ή αλουμινόχαρτο και το τοποθετούμε στη χαμηλή σχάρα του φούρνου.
Ψήνουμε σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στις αντιστάσεις, στους 200°C για περίπου 1 ώρα και 45 λεπτά.
Καθαρίζουμε τις τρυφερές αγκινάρες από τα εξωτερικά σκληρά φύλλα και τις ζεματάμε σε αλατισμένο νερό που βράζει, για περίπου 1-2 λεπτά. Τις στραγγίζουμε.
Ξεσκεπάζουμε το ταψί και βάζουμε ανάμεσα τις αγκινάρες ολόκληρες ή κομμένες στη μέση. Συνεχίζουμε το ψήσιμο για 15’, να ροδίσει και να μαλακώσει καλά το αρνί.
Σε ένα μπολ χτυπάμε τα αυγά με σύρμα χειρός.
Προσθέτουμε το γιαούρτι, το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο, αλάτι, πιπέρι, τα μυρωδικά και τα φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια ψιλοκομμένα.
Ρίχνουμε λίγες κουταλιές από τα υγρά του ταψιού (από το ψήσιμο του αρνιού), ώστε να αραιώσει ελαφρώς το γιαούρτι.
Ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά μέχρι να έχουμε μια ομοιογενή κρέμα γιαουρτιού.
Μόλις ψηθεί το κρέας και ροδίσει, το περιχύνουμε με την κρέμα γιαουρτιού.
Ξαναβάζουμε το ταψί στον φούρνο, ξεσκέπαστο, και συνεχίζουμε το ψήσιμο για περίπου 20 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει η επιφάνεια και να σχηματιστεί ελαφριά κρούστα.
Σερβίρουμε το φαγητό όσο είναι ζεστό.

lamb-with-cauliflower-puree-lezzet.name: Lamb With Cauliflower Puree
instructions: 1. Kuzu kolu sığacağı bir fırın kabına koyup her tarafına zeytinyağı sürün, tuz ve karabiber serpin.
2.  Defne yaprağı, biberiye, kekik, sarımsaklar ve suyu ekleyin.
3.  Fırın kabını önce pişirme kağıdı, ardından alüminyum folyoyla kaplayın.
4.  Dilerseniz kapaklı döküm tencere de kullanabilirsiniz.
5. Kuzuyu önceden 180 derecede ısıtılmış fırında, et kemiklerden rahatlıkla ayrılana dek, yaklaşık 2-2.
6. 5 saat pişirin.
7.  Kuzu ılınınca, kemiklerinden ayırarak lime lime edin.
8. Kuzunun pişme suyunu ince süzgeçten süzdürün ve küçük bir tavaya aktarın.
9.  Küçük bir kasede 1 tatlı kaşığı nişasta ve 3-4 yemek kaşığı suyu karıştırıp kuzunun pişme suyuna ekleyin.
10.  Dilerseniz bu aşamada, sosa 1/2 çay bardağı kırmızı şarap da ekleyebilirsiniz.
11.  Sürekli karıştırarak bir taşım kaynatın ve 1-2 dakika kısık ateşte pişirin.
12.  Nişasta sosun koyulaşmasını sağlayacaktır.
13.  Dilediğiniz kıvama ulaşınca ocaktan alın.

lamb-with-curry-and-almonds-argiro.name: Lamb With Curry And Almonds

ingredients.item: 1 kgαρνάκι από μπούτι κομμένο σε μπουκιές
1 kgαρνάκι από μπούτι κομμένο σε μπουκιές

instructions: Σε βαθύ τηγάνι, στο ελαιόλαδο, ροδίζουμε τα κομμάτια του αρνιού από όλες τις πλευρές για λίγα λεπτά.
Τα τοποθετούμε σε μικρό πυρίμαχο σκεύος ή σε μικρό ταψί.
Στο ίδιο ελαιόλαδο προσθέτουμε τα κρεμμύδια και ολόκληρο το σκόρδο για λίγα λεπτά σε μέτρια φωτιά, ίσα να γίνουν διάφανα.
Προσθέτουμε τα αμύγδαλα, πασπαλίζουμε με το κάρυ και το κύμινο και τέλος ρίχνουμε την ντομάτα.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Αφήνουμε να βράσουν 5΄ και περιχύνουμε τη σάλτσα κρεμμυδιών στο αρνί.
Σκεπάζουμε με λαδόκολλα και αλουμινόχαρτο και ψήνουμε σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200°C για 1 ώρα και 15΄.
Αφαιρούμε το αλουμινόχαρτο και τη λαδόκολλα και συνεχίζουμε το ψήσιμο για 25΄, μέχρι να πιει το κρέας τα υγρά του.

lamb-with-flower-milk-shepherds-argiro.name: Lamb With Flower Milk (shepherd's)
instructions: Κόβουμε με μαχαίρι πρώτα το κρέας μας σε μερίδες.

Το βάζουμε στην κατσαρόλα με το λάδι και το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι και το τσιγαρίζουμε σε σιγανή φωτιά μέχρι να βγάλει τα ζουμιά του και να μαλακώσει. Αν θέλει λίγο ψήσιμο ακόμα, προσθέτουμε ένα ποτήρι κρασί.
Μόλις ψηθεί βάζουμε το ανθόγαλο (τσίπα), το ανακατεύουμε και το σερβίρουμε ζεστό.
Για το αρνάκι με ανθόγαλο μπορούμε να αντικαταστήσουμε το ανθόγαλο με στραγγιστό γιαούρτι.

lamb-with-potatoes-lezzet.name: Lamb With Potatoes
instructions: 1. Kuşbaşı kuzu etlerini yapışmaz yüzeyli bir tencereye alarak yüksek ateşte mühürleyin.
2.  Rengi iyice kahverengi olmaya başlayınca yemeklik doğradığınız soğan, küp doğradığınız patates ve kerevizi ilave edip 3-4 dakika daha pişirin.
3.  Küp doğradığınız domates, haşlanmış nohut ve et suyunu ekleyin.
4.  Tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırın.
5.  Etler suyunu çekip iyice yumuşayana kadar yaklaşık 45 dakika pişirin.
6.  Ocaktan alın ve ince kıyılmış maydanozu ilave edip karıştırın.
7.  Sıcak servis yapın.

lamb-with-quinces-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Lamb With Quinces In The Oven

ingredients.item: 2 kgαρνίσιο μπούτι με κόκαλο ή ενιαίο κομμάτι αρνί χεράκι-σπάλα
2 σκελ.σκόρδο ολόκληρες με την φλούδα τους
1/2 κ.γ.από σπόρους-κόκκους κύμινο, κάρδαμο, κόλιανδρο, μαύρο πιπέρι
2 kgαρνίσιο μπούτι με κόκαλο ή ενιαίο κομμάτι αρνί χεράκι-σπάλα
2 σκελ.σκόρδο ολόκληρες με την φλούδα τους
1/2 κ.γ.από σπόρους-κόκκους κύμινο, κάρδαμο, κόλιανδρο, μαύρο πιπέρι

instructions: Αφήνουμε το κρέας να έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο. Θα ψήσουμε στους 170ºC στις αντιστάσεις (ψήνουμε στην κάτω σχάρα) ή 160ºC στον αέρα (ψήνουμε στη μεσαία σχάρα).
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι στο αρνί.
Το σοτάρουμε σε καυτό τηγάνι να ροδίσει ελαφρά.
Καθαρίζουμε τα κυδώνια , φλούδα και καρδιά και τα κόβουμε κυδωνάτα.
Βάζουμε το αρνί σε γάστρα ή σε σκεύος που σκεπάζεται στον φούρνο.
Αραδιάζουμε τα κυδώνια ολόγυρα.
Περιχύνουμε με το ζωμό.
Βάζουμε σε μπολ τη μαυροδάφνη, την κρέμα βαλσαμικoύ και τα μπαχαρικά. Τα ανακατεύουμε.
Περιχύνουμε τα υλικά στη γάστρα.
Αν έχουμε μπόλια την ξεπλένουμε και την βάζουμε σε χλιαρό νερό να μαλακώσει και να ανοίξει σαν ύφασμα.
Καλύπτουμε το αρνί, το σκεπάζουμε δηλαδή με την μπόλια. Είναι κάτι που θα του δώσει έξτρα νοστιμιά αλλά αν δεν βρείτε, δεν πειράζει, γίνεται μια χαρά και χωρίς αυτήν.

lamb-with-tomato-and-garlic-argiro.name: Lamb With Tomato And Garlic
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε σε μια πλασωτέ κατσαρόλα το μισό ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε τα ξερά κρεμμύδια για 5-6 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το κρέας και το ροδίζουμε για 5-6 λεπτά.
Συμπληρώνουμε ζεστό νερό τόσο όσο να σκεπάζει το αρνάκι και βράζουμε για μία ώρα σε μέτρια ένταση, να μην εξατμίζονται να υγρά.
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε στο τέλος του βρασμού.
Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες, τις κόβουμε σε φέτες και τις στρώνουμε στη βάση ενός μέτριου ταψιού.
Προσθέτουμε τα φρέσκα κρεμμυδάκια.
Ακουμπάμε επάνω το μισοβρασμένο κρέας και το περιχύνουμε με τους ζωμούς του.
Βάζουμε ανάμεσα στις πατάτες τα δύο κομμάτια σκόρδου, προσθέτουμε τη φρέσκια ρίγανη και καλύπτουμε τα υλικά με λεπτές φέτες ντομάτας.
Τέλος, ραντίζουμε με το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο.
Ψήνουμε το φαγητό σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 180°C, στον αέρα, για περίπου μία ώρα, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν το κρέας και οι πατάτες και να μείνει το φαγητό σχεδόν με το λάδι του.
Σερβίρουμε με σαλάτα εποχής.

lamb-wrap-with-pistachio-lezzet.name: Lamb Wrap With Pistachio
instructions: 1. Pazıları çok hafif haşlayın.
2.  Fıstıkları kavurun.
3.  Zeytinyağı ile kekiği karıştırın.
4.  Patlıcanları alacalı soyup boyuna dilimleyin.
5.  Biberlerin çekirdeklerini temizleyip boyuna ikiye kesin.
6.  Patlıcanları ve biberleri kızartın.
7. Etlere tuz ve karabiber serpiştirin.
8.  Pazıları etlerin üzerine yayın, fıstıkları yerleştirip rulo şeklinde sarın ve şişe dizin.
9.  Kızartılmış biber, rulo şeklinde sarılmış patlıcan dilimleri ve limon dilimlerini yan yana dizin.
10.  Şişlerin üzerini kekikli zeytinyağı karışımından sürün.
11.  Yağlanmış fırın ızgara telinin üzerine yerleştirin.
12.  200 dereceye ayarlı fırında yarım saat pişirin.
13.  Sıcak servis yapın.

lamb-eggplant-and-arugula-tart-lezzet.name: Lamb, Eggplant And Arugula Tart
lamb-eggplant-and-arugula-tart-lezzet.original_name: Kuzu Etli, Patlıcanlı Ve Rokalı Tart

ingredients.item: 6 kare milföy hamuru (ya da 375 g milföy hamuru-tek parça)

instructions: 1. Fırını önceden 200 dereceye ayarlayıp ısıtın.
2.  Milföy hamurlarını birleştirip merdane yardımıyla dikdörtgen olacak şekilde açın.
3.  Milföy hamurunu yağlı kağıt üzerine sererek fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
4.  Keskin bir bıçak yardımıyla kenarlarını 2 cm kadar içeriden çizin.
5.  Ortasını çatalla delin.
6. Süt ve feta peynirinin yarısını rondoda çekin.
7.  Milföy üzerine döküp patlıcanları, eti ve kırmızı biberleri koyun.
8.  Kalan feta peynirini de üzerine gezdirerek, önceden ısıtılmış fırında 20-25 dakika pişirin.
9.  Roka ve dukkah ekleyerek servis yapın.

lamb-bacon-burgers-with-spicy-aioli.name: Lamb-bacon Burgers With Spicy Aioli

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Whisk egg yolk and mustard in a medium bowl to combine. Whisking constantly, gradually drizzle in oil, drop by drop at first; keep going until aioli is thickened and smooth. Whisk in chipotle, garlic, lemon zest, and lemon juice; season with salt. Cover and chill.
Do Ahead: Aioli can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 225°. Toss tomatoes, thyme, and 1 Tbsp. oil on a baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Arrange tomatoes cut side down and roast until skin is slightly browned and beginning to separate from flesh, 75–85 minutes. Let cool, then slip off skins.

While tomatoes are roasting, freeze bacon until almost frozen through, about 40 minutes (this will help it chop cleanly in the food processor). Pulse bacon in a food processor, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until very finely chopped, about 1 minute.
Transfer bacon to a medium bowl and gently mix in ground lamb, oregano, sage, and 1 ½ tsp. salt just to combine. Divide meat into 4 equal portions and gently shape into ¾"-thick patties.

Heat a grill pan or a cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Cook patties until lightly charred and medium-rare, about 2 minutes per side. Generously spread buns with aioli and build burgers with patties, roasted tomatoes, and mozzarella.
Toss arugula in another medium bowl with vinegar and remaining 2 tsp. oil; season with salt and pepper.
Serve burgers with arugula alongside.
*Raw egg is not recommended for the elderly, pregnant women, children under 4, and people with weakened immune systems.

lambrokouloura-or-bright-bread-argiro.name: Lambrokouloura Or Bright Bread
instructions: Ρίχνουμε σε ένα μπολ το γιαούρτι. Ζεσταίνουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα το γάλα μέχρι για να γίνει χλιαρό (κάτω από 40°C). Το αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά και το αδειάζουμε στο γιαούρτι ανακατεύοντας με το σύρμα μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθούν πλήρως.
Προσθέτουμε τα αυγά χτυπημένα και τα ανακατεύουμε όλα μαζί με το σύρμα.
Ανακατεύουμε στον κάδο του μίξερ το αλεύρι, τη μαγιά, το αλάτι, το μαχλέπι, τη ζάχαρη και τη μαστίχα.

Ανοίγουμε στο κέντρο μια λακκούβα, όπου ρίχνουμε το μείγμα γιαουρτιού-αυγών. Δουλεύουμε αρχικά στη χαμηλή ταχύτητα μέχρι να βραχεί το αλεύρι και στη συνέχεια δυναμώνουμε την ένταση του μίξερ στο μέτριο και χτυπάμε τα υλικά για 4 λεπτά μέχρι να ενοποιηθούν σε ζύμη και να καθαρίσουν τα τοιχώματα του κάδου.
Λίγο λίγο και με το μίξερ πάντα σε λειτουργία, ρίχνουμε με σταθερή ροή κλωστής το χλιαρό βούτυρο. Δυναμώνουμε το μίξερ και δουλεύουμε τη ζύμη για 2-3 λεπτά σε δυνατή ταχύτητα.
Στο τέλος πρέπει να είναι εύπλαστη, ελαστική και να μην κολλάει στα δάχτυλα. Δεν προσθέτουμε επιπλέον αλεύρι.

Με βουτυρωμένα χέρια βγάζουμε τη ζύμη από τον κάδο και μαζεύουμε τις ενώσεις από κάτω. Τη μεταφέρουμε σε λαδωμένο μπολ, τη σκεπάζουμε με μεμβράνη ή βρεγμένη πετσέτα και την αφήνουμε σε ζεστό σημείο, μακριά από ρεύματα αέρα, για μία ώρα, να ξεκουραστεί και να φουσκώσει – ο χρόνος εξαρτάται από τη θερμοκρασία του χώρου.

Χωρίζουμε τη ζύμη σε τρία ίσα μέρη τα οποία πλάθουμε σε μακριά  και λεπτά κορδόνια. Τα πλέκουμε μεταξύ τους σε μακριά πλεξούδα (σαν λεπτό τσουρέκι) πιέζοντας με τα χέρια μας τις ενώσεις στις δύο άκρες να κολλήσουν.
Τυλίγουμε την πλεξούδα σε σπείρα δίνοντας έτσι στη λαμπροκουλούρα το χαρακτηριστικό στρογγυλό σχήμα της.
Βάζουμε στο κέντρο της ένα κόκκινο αυγό και τη μεταφέρουμε σε ταψί 30 εκ. βουτυρωμένο ή στρωμένο με αντικολλητικό χαρτί.
Σκεπάζουμε τη λαμπροκουλούρα και την αφήνουμε σε ζεστό μέρος για περίπου μία ώρα, να διπλασιαστεί σχεδόν σε όγκο.
Χτυπάμε το ασπράδι του αυγού και αλείφουμε ολόγυρα την κουλούρα.

Την πασπαλίζουμε με σουσάμι και την αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 10 λεπτά ακόμα. Την ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 180°C, στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, για περίπου 40 λεπτά να ροδίσει. Την αφήνουμε σε σχάρα μέχρι να κρυώσει τελείως.

lambs-in-a-blanket-with-cilantro-yogurt.name: Lambs In A Blanket With Cilantro Yogurt

ingredients.item: Sheet frozen puff pastry (one 14-oz. package or half a 17.3-oz. package)

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook sausage, turning occasionally, until browned, about 4 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain; let cool.

Roll out puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to 1/8" thick. Cut into 2x1 1/2" strips. Working one at a time, brush edges of short sides of strips with egg wash and roll around sausage; press to seal. Place, seam side down, on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet as you go.
Brush pastry with egg wash and sprinkle with sesame seeds and sea salt. Bake until pastry is golden and puffed, 15–18 minutes.
Meanwhile, blend yogurt, cilantro, lemon juice, garlic, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a food processor until smooth; season with kosher salt and pepper.
Serve pastries with cilantro yogurt alongside for dipping
Do ahead: Dip can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Sausages can be rolled in pastry 4 hours ahead; cover and chill. Brush with egg and top with sesame seeds and sea salt just before baking.

lamego-style-oven-rice-teleculinaria.name: Lamego-style Oven Rice
lamego-style-oven-rice-teleculinaria.original_name: Arroz de forno à moda de Lamego
instructions: Corte o chouriço em rodelas e o bacon em tiras e aloure tudo num tacho com com o azeite, sobre lume baixo.
Adicione depois os dentes de alho, ligeiramente esmagados, e deixe alourar. Pouco depois, junte as cebolas picadas e deixe refogar em lume brando.

Adicione 800 ml de água e a salsa e tempere com sal e pimenta. Acrescente o arroz, envolva e passe tudo para um recipiente de barro. Cubra com papel de alumínio e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, por cerca de 20 minutos.

lamia-cheese-pie-argiro.name: Lamia Cheese Pie
instructions: Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε ταψιί 35 εκατοστών για πιτα.
Λαδώνουμε το ταψί και ακτινωτά απλώνουμε 3 φύλλα χωριάτικα, ραντίζοντάς τα με ελαιολαδο.
Τρίβουμε τα τυριά σε μπολ και τα πασπαλίζουμε με μπόλικο πιπέρι.
Σε άλλο μπολ, χτυπάμε τα αυγά με το γάλα και το ελαιολαδο.
Στρώνουμε 1 φύλλο κρούστας, ελαφρά τσαλακωμένο, πάνω στα χωριάτικα φύλλα.
Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο τυρί και περιχύνουμε με 1 φλ. μίγμα γάλα-αυγών.
Επαναλαμβάνουμε 4 στρώσεις με τσαλακωμένα φύλλα (εναλλάξ χωριάτικο και κρούστας), τυριά και μίγμα γόλα-αυγών.
Καλύπτουμε την πίτα με τα άλλα 2 φύλλα κρούστας, ελαφρά τσαλακωμένα.
Γυρνάμε τις άκρες προς τα μέσα και περιχύνουμε με το υπόλοιπο μίγμα αυγών.
Τρυπάμε την επιφάνεια με πιρούνι.
Δεν τρυπάμε τη βάση της πίτας.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 180°C βαθμούς, στις αντιστάσεις, για περίπου 1 ώρα και 10 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει καλά και να ξεκολλήσει από το ταψί.

lamingtons.name: Lamingtons

ingredients.item: About 2 cups (160 grams) shredded unsweetened coconut

instructions: To make the cake: At least one day before serving, center a rack in the oven and preheat it to 177°C. Butter a 9-inch square cake pan and dust with ﬂour, or use baker’s spray. Line the bottom of the pan with parchment paper. Have a sifter or strainer at hand.
If your eggs are still cool to the touch, put them in a bowl of hot water for 5 minutes—warmed eggs beat more voluminously than cold eggs and you want volume.
Whisk the ﬂour, baking powder and salt together. Put the melted butter in a small bowl.

Working in the bowl of a stand mixer ﬁtted with a whisk attachment, or in a large bowl with a hand mixer, beat the sugar and eggs together on medium-high speed until they triple in volume, about 4 minutes; when you lift the whisk, the batter should form a ribbon as it falls into the bowl. If you’re using a stand mixer, remove the bowl. Grab a big ﬂexible spatula, sift or strain one third of the ﬂour mixture over the eggs and sugar and gently fold it in. Repeat twice more, until all of the ﬂour is in. No matter how gentle you are, the batter will deﬂate—it’s the nature of the cake.

Stir two or three spoonfuls of the batter into the melted butter and then gradually fold the butter mixture into the batter in the bowl. As you fold, check the bottom of the bowl—the butter has a tendency to lurk there: Find it and fold it in. Scrape the batter into the pan and jiggle the pan to level it.

Bake for 26 to 29 minutes, or until the cake is golden, is starting to come away from the sides of the pan and springs back when gently prodded; a tester inserted into the center of the cake will come out clean. Transfer the pan to a rack and wait for 5 minutes, then run a table knife around the edges of the pan to loosen the cake. Unmold the cake onto the rack, carefully peel away the paper and let cool to room temperature. Lightly cover the cake—you can put a kitchen towel over it—and leave it out overnight. (The cake can be wrapped in plastic and kept at room temperature for up to 2 days.)

To cut the cake and get ready to finish it: Unwrap the cake if necessary and place it right side up on a cutting board. The top will have crowned in baking, so use a long serrated knife and a gentle sawing motion to level the cake. Cut the cake into 16 squares, each about 2¼ inches on a side. Place the cubes on a rack set over a piece of parchment or a baking sheet—the sauce will drip—and prepare your dipping and coating station: Put some of the coconut in a shallow bowl—work with a little at a time, so that if you get chocolate sauce in it (almost inevitable), you’ve got backup. Have four table forks at hand—two for dipping and two for turning the chocolate-coated cake cubes in the coconut.

To make the sauce: Bring the butter and water to a boil—I do this in the microwave. Sift or strain the confectioners’ sugar and cocoa together into a bowl—a deep narrow one is best. Pour the boiling water–butter mixture into the bowl and stir with a ﬂexible spatula to blend.

To dip and coat the cake: One by one, drop the cubes of cake into the sauce, turning each one around with two forks until it’s coated on all sides. Lift up the cube, letting any excess sauce drip back into the bowl, and return the cube to the rack. After you’ve dipped two or three cubes, one by one, coat each of the dipped cubes with coconut, using two clean forks to turn the cubes around in the coconut. Continue working in batches until all of the cubes are dipped and coated. If the sauce thickens as you work, thin it with drops of very hot tap or boiling water.
Leave the Lamingtons on the rack to set for an hour or so before serving.
You can wrap the Lamingtons well and keep them at room temperature for 3 days or so. Yes, they’ll be drier, but they’ll still be so good.

lan-phams-herbed-roasted-onions.name: Lan Pham's Herbed-roasted Onions
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 204°C. Cut each onion into quarters, keeping the root end still intact so wedges hold together.
2. In a large bowl, combine the lemon juice, mustard, garlic, thyme, salt, and pepper. Slowly whisk in the olive oil.

3. Add the onions to the bowl and mix well. Transfer the onions to a baking dish or sheet in a single layer. Bake for 30 to 45 minutes, until tender and browned at the edges. Toss the onions as necessary during cooking to ensure even browning.
4. Remove onions from the oven and transfer to a serving platter. Sprinkle with the cilantro.

landose-recipe-lezzet.name: Landöşe Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 su bardağı un (kontrollü ekleyin, hamurun kıvamına göre)
Sıvı yağ + biraz sert yağ karışımı (daha hafif bir doku için)
Pudra şekeri (daha pürüzsüz bir doku için)
Esmer şeker veya hindistan cevizi şekeri (hafif karamelimsi tat)
Tatlandırıcı kullanmak isteyenler için stevia veya eritritol
Tarçın, muskat veya portakal kabuğu rendesi ile farklı aroma
Tam buğday unu (daha yoğun ve besleyici)
Yulaf unu veya badem unu (glutensiz versiyonlar için)
Karbonat + 1 çay kaşığı limon suyu (hamurun kabarması için)
Glutensiz tariflerde kabartma tozu kullanmak daha kolaydır
Susam, hindistan cevizi veya kıyılmış fındık/ceviz

instructions: 1. Oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağı ve şekeri mikserle krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
2. Karışıma vanilyayı ekleyip, ardından yumurtaları teker teker ilave ederek homojen bir karışım elde edin.
3. Ayrı bir kapta un, kabartma tozu ve tuzu karıştırdıktan sonra eleyerek yumurtalı karışıma katın ve yumuşak bir hamur elde edin.
4. Hamuru kurabiye kalıbı veya sıkma torbası yardımıyla şekillendirin ve önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 10-12 dakika, hafif altın rengi alana kadar pişirin.
5.  Afiyet olsun.

laotian-style-chicken-and-rice-salad.name: Laotian-style Chicken And Rice Salad

ingredients.item: -oz. can or jar thai red curry paste (preferably maesri)

instructions: Place 1 medium red onion, thinly sliced, and one 3" piece ginger, peeled, cut into thin matchsticks, in a medium bowl of ice water and let soak while you prepare the chicken and rice.
Using your hands, toss 2 cups cooled cooked jasmine rice and half of one 4-oz. can or jar Thai red curry paste (no need to be exact) in a medium bowl to coat. Set aside.
Stir 3 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. fish sauce, and 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. sugar in a large bowl until sugar is dissolved.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add 1 lb. ground chicken and spread into a thin, even layer; season with kosher salt. Cook, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, about 5 minutes. Add remaining 2 oz. Thai red curry paste and cook, stirring and breaking up into bite-size pieces, until chicken is cooked through, about 2 minutes. Transfer to bowl with dressing.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in same skillet. Add reserved rice mixture and press into an even layer. Cook, undisturbed, until golden and crisp underneath, 6–8 minutes. Continue to cook, breaking up rice into large pieces, 1–2 minutes. Remove from heat.

Drain red onion and ginger; add to bowl with chicken, along with 1 small serrano chile, thinly sliced, 1 cup salted dry-roasted peanuts, 1 cup (packed) cilantro leaves, ½ cup (packed) mint leaves, and rice. Toss well to combine.
Transfer salad to a platter. Serve with lettuce leaves for wrapping and lime wedges for squeezing over.

lapardana-teleculinaria.name: Lapardana
instructions: Descasque a batata, corte-a em rodelas e coza-as em água com sal, juntamente com a couve. Escorra e reserve a água de cozedura.
Coloque as postas de bacalhau num tabuleiro e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, até ficarem assadas.

Parta o pão em pedaços e demolhe-os na água que reservou. Leve ao lume um tacho com azeite, os dentes de alho picados, o pão escorrido e um pouco de pimenta e mexa. Junte as couves e batatas e deixe cozinhar até obter uma açorda.
Disponha a açorda numa travessa funda, coloque por cima o bacalhau assado e regue com azeite. Sirva bem quente.

lapas-argiro.name: Lapas
instructions: Για να χυλώσει σωστά και να βγει όλο το άμυλο που θα δώσει κρεμώδη υφή χρησιμοποιούμε ιδανικά ρύζι γλασέ.
Σε μια μικρή κατσαρόλα βάζουμε το νερό και λίγο αλάτι κατά βούληση.
Μόλις πάρει βράση το νερό προσθέτουμε μέσα το ρύζι.
Χαμηλώνουμε την εστία και σε χαμηλή προς μέτρια φωτιά σιγοβράζουμε το ρύζι μέχρι να μαλακώσει, να χυλώσει και να αποβάλει όλο το άμυλο.
Ανακατεύουμε συχνά γιατί πιάνει στην κατσαρόλα.
Μόλις βράσει και μαλακώσει το ρύζι θα πάρει κρεμώδη υφή το νερό.
Τότε προσθέτουμε το λάδι και διορθώνουμε το αλάτι.
Ανακατεύουμε και σβήνουμε την εστία.
Στύβουμε μέσα λίγο λεμόνι και σερβίρουμε σε βαθύ πιάτο όσο είναι ζεστός.
Σε πολλούς αρέσει πιο ζουμερός και σε πολλούς αρέσει πιο πηχτός αυτό είναι καθαρά θέμα επιλογής του καθενός.

larb-gai-chicken-larb.name: Larb Gai (chicken Larb)

ingredients.prep: pulla chiles, or chiles de árbol, stemmed

ingredients.item: Thinly sliced (root to stem) red onion or shallots
Coarsely chopped cilantro leaves with tender stems

ingredients.prep: peeled lengthwise in striped segments, cut crosswise into  0.5" slices

instructions: Roast 2 cups dried bird chiles, pulla chiles, or chiles de árbol, stemmed in a dry wok over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until they turn a deep, dark crimson (almost brown) and give off a sweet and earthy smell (not burnt). The process shouldn’t take more than 10 minutes, but it pays to be vigilant in making sure they toast evenly and slowly.

Remove from heat and let sit until cool enough to handle. Transfer to a food processor, blender, or spice grinder and grind until slightly finer than the crushed red pepper you’d find at a pizza shop. Be careful not to breathe in any chile dust when you remove the lid.
Do Ahead: Roasted chile powder can be made 3 months ahead. Store in a sealed container in a cool, dry place.

Cook 1 cup uncooked glutinous rice or jasmine rice in a dry wok over medium heat, stirring occasionally at first, then more frequently as it browns. Once you smell the toasting rice, stir in 1¼" piece fresh galangal, cut into thin coins, 1 Tbsp. thinly sliced lemongrass, and 2 makrut (Thai) lime leaves. Continue to cook until rice develops a deep amber golden hue, about the same color as brown rice, 15–20 minutes. Let cool.

Transfer rice mixture to a food processor or spice grinder and pulse until mixture is the consistency of granulated sugar.
Do Ahead: Toasted rice powder can be made 1 month ahead. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.

Place ¾ lb. ground chicken in a small saucepan and cover with water. Cook over medium heat, stirring, until chicken is opaque but still soft. Using a spatula or spoon, break meat into small clumps. Drain off water, then stir in 3 Tbsp. fish sauce and 1 tsp. sugar until sugar is dissolved. Let cool.

Add seasonings, in this order, giving a quick toss after each addition: 1½ Tbsp. Roasted Chile Powder, ½ cup thinly sliced (root to stem) red onion or shallots, ¼ cup thinly sliced green onions, 12 mint leaves, torn, ½ cup coarsely chopped cilantro leaves with tender stems, and 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice. Once you’re ready to serve, add 1 Tbsp. Toasted Rice Powder at the last moment. Serve with the leaves from 2 small wedges green cabbage, ½ cucumber, peeled lengthwise in striped segments, cut crosswise into ½" slices, and 16 green beans, trimmed (uncooked), and cooked sticky rice alongside.
Editor’s Note: This recipe first appeared on Bon Appétit in October 2017. Head this way for more of our favorite Thai recipes →

larb-salad-eggs.name: Larb Salad Eggs
instructions: Season the eggs with salt and pepper to taste.
Place 2 cucumber slices on each egg half. Top with pickled cabbage.
Add a dash of fish sauce to each egg and top with mint, cilantro, Thai basil, and red chili, if using.
Enjoy!

larsens-lobster-rolls.name: Larsen’s Lobster Rolls
instructions: Pour water into a large pot to come 3” up the sides. Cover and bring to a boil.
Add lobsters, reduce heat to medium, and re-cover pot. Steam lobsters for 15 minutes.
Using tongs, remove lobsters from pot and transfer to a large bowl. Pour in ice water to cover; let cool completely.
Break off lobster tails.
Pull off the flippers and use your thumb to push the tail meat up and out of the shell from the bottom (like a push-up pop).
Crack claws with the back of a knife and remove meat.
Chop tail and claw meat into ½” pieces and place in a medium bowl.
Mix in mayonnaise and celery; season with salt and pepper to taste.
Divide lobster salad among buns.
If preparing ahead, the lobster salad can be made up to 2 days in advance. Cover and chill before serving.

las-vegas-galbi-korean-style-beef-ribs.name: Las Vegas Galbi (korean-style Beef Ribs)
instructions: Place ribs in a large bowl of water; soak for 1 hour. Drain ribs and return to the bowl.

Combine Asian pear, onion, kiwi, and garlic in a food processor and puree. Transfer to a bowl and stir in soy sauce, brown sugar, honey, sesame, oil, and black pepper. Pour marinade over ribs in the bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator, turning once, at least 8 hours or overnight.
Strain marinade and discard.
Preheat grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate. Grill ribs until crispy outside and meat is no longer pink, about 8 minutes per side.

lasagna.name: Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350ºF (180ºC). Grease a 9 x 13-inch (22 x 33 cm) baking dish lightly with nonstick spray.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef and marinara sauce.
In a separate large bowl, combine the ricotta, Parmesan, parsley, basil, salt, pepper, and olive oil.

Spread 1 cup of the meat sauce over the bottom of the prepared baking dish. Top with 5 cooked lasagna noodles, overlapping as needed to completely cover the sauce. Spread 2 cups of the ricotta mixture over the noodles. Top with 1 cup of mozzarella cheese. Repeat with the remaining meat sauce, noodles, ricotta, and mozzarella to make 2 more layers.

Bake the lasagna for 25–30 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the sauce is bubbling up through the layers. Turn the broiler to high and broil for 1–2 minutes, until the top layer of cheese is bubbly and golden brown.
Let the lasagna cool for 30-45 minutes, then serve.
Enjoy!

lasagna-alla-norma-lasagna-with-eggplant.name: Lasagna Alla Norma (lasagna With Eggplant, Tomato, And Cheese)

ingredients.item: One 28-ounce can whole peeled tomatoes in the juices
ingredients.prep: blended, or one 24-ounce bottle tomato passata
for frying1 pound fresh lasagna noodles or one 1-pound box dried lasagna noodles

ingredients.item: Fresh lasagna noodles or one 1-pound box dried lasagna noodles

ingredients.prep: cut into 1/4-inch pieces and blotted dry with towels

instructions: Arrange eggplant slices in a single layer on wire racks set in rimmed baking sheets. Sprinkle lightly all over on both sides with salt, then let stand until eggplants look dewy with water and some water has dripped below, about 20 minutes. Blot well with clean towels to remove all excess water.

Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, heat olive oil with garlic clove over medium heat until garlic begins to sizzle. Reduce heat to medium low and continue to cook until garlic is just beginning to turn golden, about 4 minutes. Remove garlic clove and discard. Add blended canned tomatoes (or passata) along with the basil and bring to a simmer over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer and cook, stirring often, until thickened and no longer watery (this may take almost no time at all for some passata products, or up to 20 minutes for waterier canned tomatoes). Remove from heat and season with salt. Set aside.

In a 12-inch cast iron or stainless-steel skillet, heat about 1/4 inch of oil over medium-high heat until shimmering. Working in batches, fry eggplant, turning once, until golden on both sides. Carefully transfer to paper towels to drain well, blotting to soak up any excess oil as you go. Repeat with remaining eggplant, adding more oil to skillet if necessary. Set aside.

Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Prepare an ice bath in a large mixing bowl. Working in batches to avoid crowding the pot, boil lasagna noodles until just shy of al dente, about 2 minutes less than cooking instructions for fresh lasagna noodles or 3 minutes less than package instructions for dry lasagna noodles. Using a strainer and tongs, carefully transfer to ice bath to chill, then drain and blot lightly with towels. Repeat with remaining pasta.
Preheat oven to 191°C (190°C) and set rack in middle position. In a medium mixing bowl, whisk ricotta until very smooth and creamy. Season with salt.

In a 2-quart baking dish, spoon a thin layer of tomato sauce all over, spreading it evenly to coat bottom. Cutting cooked lasagna noodles as needed to fit the baking dish, arrange the pasta in a single, even layer. Dollop and gently spread a thin layer of ricotta all over pasta (it doesn't need to cover every inch, but should be evenly enough distributed that it will melt and spread when baked). Scatter a small handful of mozzarella all over, then pieces of fried eggplant in a single, even layer. Top with another thin layer of sauce, then a sprinkle of grated ricotta salata and a dusting of Parmigiano-Reggiano. Repeat this layering until the baking dish is full, making sure to top the final layer of pasta only with tomato sauce, ricotta, ricotta salata, and Parmigiano-Reggiano. (Note: You may not use up all the components, but you should make sure to use all the eggplant and ricotta when layering the dish.)

Set baking dish on a rimmed baking sheet (to catch any drips) and bake until fully heated through and lasagna is very lightly browned on top, about 30 minutes. Let rest for 15 minutes to cool and settle, then slice and serve, sprinkling torn fresh basil leaves on top.

lasagna-bolognese.name: Lasagna Bolognese

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Pulse onion, carrot, and celery in a food processor until finely chopped.

Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add beef, pork, pancetta, and vegetables; cook, breaking up meat with a spoon, until moisture is almost completely evaporated and meat is well browned, 25–30 minutes; season with salt and pepper.

Add wine to pot and bring to a boil, scraping up browned bits from bottom of pot, about 2 minutes. Add milk; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until moisture is almost completely evaporated, 8–10 minutes. Add tomatoes and 2 cups broth; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, adding water by ½-cupfuls if sauce looks dry, until flavors meld and sauce thickens, 2½–3 hours.
Let sauce cool, then cover and chill at least 12 hours or up to 2 days. (Letting the sauce sit will give it a deeper, richer flavor.)
DO AHEAD: Sauce can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Whisk salt and 3 cups flour in a large bowl, make a well in the center, and crack eggs into well. Mix eggs with a fork, then slowly mix in flour until a shaggy dough forms. Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead, dusting lightly with flour if sticky, until smooth, about 5 minutes (it will be fairly stiff). Wrap in plastic; let sit until dough holds an indentation when pressed, 1–2 hours.

Set pasta maker to thickest setting; dust lightly with flour. Divide dough into 4 pieces. Working with 1 piece at a time and keeping remaining dough wrapped in plastic as you work, flatten dough into a narrow rectangle (no wider than mouth of machine); pass through rollers. Fold dough as needed to fit and run through again. Repeat without folding, adjusting machine to thinner settings after every pass and dusting with flour if sticky, until pasta sheet is 1/16” thick (setting 8 on most machines). Place pasta sheets on a lightly floured surface and cut crosswise into 16 8”-long noodles.

DO AHEAD: Dough can be made 1 day ahead; chill. Bring to room temperature before rolling out, about 1 hour. Noodles can be made 1 day ahead. Stack on a baking sheet with a piece of parchment paper between each layer. Cover with plastic wrap and chill.

Heat butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat until foaming. Add flour and cook, whisking constantly, 1 minute. Whisk in warm milk, ½-cupful at a time. Bring sauce to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, whisking often, until the consistency of cream, 8–10 minutes; add nutmeg and season with salt. Remove from heat, transfer to a medium bowl, and press plastic wrap directly onto surface; let cool slightly.
DO AHEAD: Béchamel can be made 1 day ahead. Keep covered and chill.
Reheat the sauces. Combine Bolognese sauce and remaining 1 cup broth in a large saucepan over medium heat, and heat until sauce is warmed through.
Meanwhile, if you made the béchamel ahead of time, heat in a medium saucepan over low heat just until warmed through (you don’t want to let it boil).

Working in batches, cook fresh lasagna noodles in a large pot of boiling salted water until just softened, about 10 seconds. Remove carefully with tongs and transfer to a large bowl of ice water; let cool. Drain noodles and stack on a baking sheet, with paper towels between each layer, making sure noodles don’t touch (they’ll stick together).
Preheat oven to 350°. Coat a 13x9” baking dish with butter.

Spread ¼ cup béchamel in the prepared baking dish. Top with a layer of noodles, spread over a scant ¾ cup Bolognese sauce, then ½ cup béchamel, and top with ¼ cup Parmesan. Repeat process 7 more times, starting with noodles and ending with Parmesan, for a total of 8 layers. Place baking dish on a rimmed baking sheet and bake lasagna until bubbling and beginning to brown on top, 50–60 minutes. Let lasagna sit 45 minutes before serving.

DO AHEAD: Lasagna can be assembled 12 hours ahead. Cover and chill. Let sit at room temperature 2 hours before baking. Cook, covered with foil until the last 20 minutes, then finish cooking uncovered.

Homemade pasta is great: It's rich and can be rolled very thin. But of course it's not your only option: Fresh store-bought: Available in the refrigerated section of specialty stores and Italian grocers. Usually a bit thicker than what our recipe calls for but still a good choice. Buy 1½ pounds. Sizes vary by shop; if needed, trim the noodles during assembly to fill the pan without much overlap. Dried: If you spot imported dried egg noodles, they're worth the splurge, but standard supermarket durum wheat will work just fine (avoid no-boil, though). Supermarket noodles are thicker, so make fewer layers. Cook 24 noodles (1–1½ boxes) per package instructions; divide sauces evenly among 6 layers. Trim noodles as needed.

lasagna-dough-lezzet.name: Lasagna Dough
instructions: 1. Unu derin bir kaba alın.
2.  Ortasını açıp tuz, yumurtalar ve zeytinyağını ekleyip yoğurun.
3.  Hamur toparlanmıyorsa 1-2 yemek kaşığı su ekleyip yoğurmaya devam edin.
4.  5-6 dakika iyice yoğurun.
5.  Üzerini kapatıp 30 dakika dinlendirin.
6.  Makarna açma makineniz var ise hamurunuzu önce 1 numarada açın.
7.  Daha sonra sırayla 4-5 numaralarda da 1-2 kere açın.
8.  Son olarak en ince, yani 8 numara ile açıp inceltin ve lazanya yaprakları elde edin.
9.  Makineniz yok ise hamuru üzerine un serperek merdane yardımıyla açın.
10.  Yufka kalınlığında açıp istediğiniz büyüklüklerde kesin.
11.  Tencerede bol su kaynatın.
12.  Kaynayan suda lazanya yapraklarını 1-2 dakika haşlayıp süzgeç yardımıyla tabağa alın.

lasagna-in-air-fryer-pequerecetas.name: Lasagna In Air Fryer

ingredients.item: 1/2 kilo de carne mixta de ternera y cerdo
Sal, nuez moscada y pimienta negra

instructions: Pelamos las zanahorias y la cebolla y picamos En una cazuela alta pochamos con un poco de aceite de oliva virgen extra. Cuando comiencen a dorarse incorporamos la carne, mezclamos y cocinamos hasta que la carne cambie de color Incorporamos el vino tinto, dejamos unos cinco minutos para que se evapore el alcohol Añadimos la leche, una pizca de sal, nuez moscada y pimienta negra Mezclamos y dejamos cocinar unos cinco minutos. Añadimos el tomate triturado y dejamos cocinar a fuego suave unos 40 minutos.

Para hacer la salsa bechamel, en una cazuela ponemos una cebolla picada con un poco de sal y pochamos en aceite de oliva virgen extra Cuando comience a dorarse añadimos la harina, cocinamos y agregamos la leche poco a poco, sin dejar de remover, hasta obtener una bechamel ligera. Apagamos el fuego y trituramos bien con la batidora.

Ponemos en la fuente el tomate frito, encima una lámina de lasaña precocida, sobre la pasta ponemos una capa de salsa boloñesa, otra de pasta, otra de salsa boloñesa, otra de pasta y una última de boloñesa. Vertemos bechamel sobre la última capa de boloñesa, cubrimos la superficie con queso rallado. .

Ponemos dentro de la freidora de aire. Para ello necesitáis un recipiente apto. Yo en este caso he utilizado un recipiente de pyrex, apto para elevadas temperaturas, con el tamaño exacto de mi freidora de aire Cosori, de 5,5 litros.
Cocinamos la lasaña a 180ºC durante 10-15 minutos, hasta que tenga el dorado perfecto.

lasagna-in-the-oven-easily-with-cheeses-.name: Lasagna In The Oven Easily With Cheeses
lasagna-in-the-oven-easily-with-cheeses-.original_name: Λαζάνια στο φούρνο εύκολα με τυριά

ingredients.item: 400 grψιλοκομμένη ντομάτα ή ντομάτα στον χυμό τη
400 grψιλοκομμένη ντομάτα ή ντομάτα στον χυμό τη

instructions: Σοτάρουμε τον κιμά στο καυτό ελαιόλαδο σε δυνατή φωτιά για 5′, μέχρι να ροδίσει και να στεγνώσει.
Ρίχνουμε το βούτυρο, το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι, το καρότο και σοτάρουμε για 3′.
Στη συνέχεια προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο, τον πελτέ, την πάπρικα, τη ρίγανη, το δαφνόφυλλο και σοτάρουμε για 1’.
Σβήνουμε με το κρασί κaι αφήνουμε για 1´ να εξατμιστεί στο μισό.
Προσθέτουμε τις ντομάτες, το ζωμό ( ή νερό), λίγο αλάτι και πιπέρι. Σκεπάζουμε και βράζουμε για 15-20’. Πρέπει η σάλτσα να είναι ζουμερή.

lasagna-recipe-in-a-pot-lezzet.name: Lasagna Recipe In A Pot

ingredients.item: Soğan yerine arpacık soğan veya pırasa kullanılabilir.
Havuç yerine kabak rendesi veya tatlı patates ekleyebilirsiniz.
Hafif bir tarif için sütlü un sosu kullanabilirsiniz.
Kremasız, vegan bir alternatif için badem sütü veya soya sütü ile hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Tereyağı yerine zeytinyağı veya margarin kullanılabilir.
ön haşlama yapmadan direkt sosun içinde pişirebileceğiniz “hazır lazanya yaprakları” tercih edebilirsiniz.
Baharatları çeşitlendirmek için kekik, fesleğen veya taze biberiye ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Yayvan bir tencereyi orta ateşte ısıtın ve içine zeytinyağını ekleyin.
2.  İnce doğranmış soğanları tencereye alıp, soğanlar hafifçe yumuşayıp şeffaflaşana kadar kavurun.
3. Rendenin ince tarafıyla rendelediğiniz havucu ekleyin ve soğanlarla birlikte karıştırarak birkaç dakika soteleyin.
4. İnce doğranmış sarımsakları ilave edin ve aromaları ortaya çıkana kadar karıştırın.
5. Küçük parçalar halinde doğranmış kereviz sapı ve mantarları tencereye ekleyin.
6.  Mantarlar hafif yumuşayıncaya kadar kavurun.
7. İnce doğranmış taze biberiyeyi ekleyip birkaç tur karıştırın.
8. Kıymayı tencereye alın, tuz ve karabiberle tatlandırın ve kıymayı ezerek renk alana kadar pişirin.
9. Rendelenmiş domatesleri ekleyin, tuz, karabiber ve toz şekeri de ilave ederek kısık ateşte sosun aromalarının birleşmesini sağlayın.
10. Pişmiş bolonez sosun üzerine lazanya yapraklarını uzun kenarları dik olacak şekilde yerleştirin.
11.  Üzerine hazırladığınız beşamel sosu gezdirin ve katmanları bu şekilde oluşturun.
12. Tencerenin kapağını kapatın ve lazanya yaprakları yumuşayana kadar orta ateşte pişirin.
13. Yapraklar tamamen yumuşadıktan sonra kremayı ekleyin ve nazikçe karıştırarak çorbamsı bir dokuyu önleyin.
14. Rendelenmiş taze kaşar peynirini üstüne serpiştirin, tencerenin kapağını kapatın ve peynirler eriyene kadar birkaç dakika bekleyin.
15. Sıcak olarak servis edin ve istersen yanında taze yeşillik veya salata ile sunabilirsiniz.

lasagna-recipe-with-instant-ramen-comede.name: Lasagna Recipe With Instant Ramen
lasagna-recipe-with-instant-ramen-comede.original_name: Receta de lasaña con ramen instantáneo

ingredients.item: Queso para derretir al gusto ((mozzarella, cheddar, etc.))

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180°C o 177°C
Coloca una capa de ramen y cúbrela de salsa de tomate y queso
Repite este paso dos veces más hasta crear tres capas de ramen, salsa y queso
Cubre de queso la superficie de tu lasaña y hornea hasta que el queso se funda bien
Disfruta

lasagna-roll-ups.name: Lasagna Roll-ups
instructions: 1. Boil the lasagna noodles in a large pot of salted water until al dente. Drain, rinse with cold water to cool, and lay flat on a sheet of foil. Set aside.
2. In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the onion, mushrooms, bell pepper, and garlic and sauté for 4 to 5 minutes, until the vegetables are starting to soften.

3. Remove the veggie mixture from the pan. Add the ground beef to the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until it's totally browned. Drain the excess fat and add the diced tomatoes, tomato paste, 1/2 teaspoon of the salt, 1/2 teaspoon of the pepper, and the veggie mixture. Stir to combine. Let the mixture simmer on low heat for 30 minutes.

4. To make the filling, combine the ricotta, 1/2 cup of the mozzarella, 3/4 cup of the Parmesan, the eggs, the remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon pepper, 3 tablespoons of the parsley, and 3 tablespoons of the basil. Stir to combine.

5. To assemble, spoon a thin layer of sauce into the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch baking pan OR five 6-inch disposable foil loaf pans. Spread 2 to 3 tablespoons of the ricotta filling on each noodle and roll them up so that the cheese is on the inside of the roll. Lay them sideways in the pans (four will fit in each loaf pan, or you can fill a 9 x 13-inch pan with the roll-ups). Top evenly with the remaining sauce, mozzarella, and Parmesan.
6. Follow the instructions to freeze below. If you're making the roll-ups right away, preheat the oven to 191°C, place the pan(s) on a baking sheet, and bake for 20 minutes, until hot and bubbly.
7. Serve with salad and a hunk of bread. Convenient and wonderfully good!

lasagna-sheets.name: Lasagna Sheets
instructions: Place flour on a marble or wooden work surface. Make a well in the center and crack in eggs; add salt.

Gently beat eggs using a fork, incorporating surrounding flour, until mixture is runny. Bring remaining flour into the mixture using a bench scraper until dough forms a ball. Mix in water, 1 tablespoon at a time, if dough feels too stiff.
Knead dough with your hands by flattening, stretching it, and folding the top towards the center. Turn 45 degrees and repeat until dough is soft and smooth, about 10 minutes.
Shape dough into a ball. Place in a bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate until firm, 30 minutes to 1 hour.

Divide dough into 3 equal portions. Take one piece and flatten it a bit with your hands. Dust a work surface with flour and roll dough out using a rolling pin 5 to 6 times. Turn dough 45 degrees and roll out again, 5 to 6 times. Keep rolling and turning in the same way until dough is evenly very thin. When you hold up the dough, you should be able to see your fingers through it.

Cut pasta dough into rectangular sheets to fit your baking dish using a pastry wheel or a knife. Transfer lasagna sheets to a floured kitchen towel and let air-dry for about 30 minutes before assembling.

lasagna-skillet-pasta.name: Lasagna Skillet Pasta
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic to the pan, stirring often, until soft. Move the onions and garlic to the edges of the pan. Add ground beef, McCormick® Dried Oregano, salt, and pepper to the center of the pan, breaking up the meat into smaller pieces. Let the beef sit undisturbed for a moment so the beef browns slightly. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until almost no pink remains.

Add tomato paste to the pan and stir to combine. Add crushed tomatoes and chicken stock to skillet. Bring to a boil and add noodles to skillet, stirring so noodles are submerged. Lower heat to medium, cover with a lid, and cook for about 10 minutes, until noodles are al dente.

Remove from heat, then stir in shredded mozzarella. Spoon dollops of ricotta over the pasta, cover with lid, and let sit for a few minutes until ricotta melts slightly. Sprinkle fresh basil over pasta and serve.
Enjoy!

lasagna-soup.name: Lasagna Soup
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the onion and cook until softened and golden brown, about 7 minutes. Add the garlic and cook, stirring constantly, until aromatic, about 1 minute.

Add the ground beef and cook, breaking up the meat with a wooden spoon, until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes. Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring constantly, until combined, about 1 minute.
Add the salt, pepper, oregano, thyme, rosemary, crushed tomatoes, and chicken stock and bring to a low boil, stirring to combine.
Add the lasagna noodles and cook until al dente according to package instructions.
Ladle the lasagna soup into bowls and top with a dollop of ricotta.
Enjoy!

lasagna-with-asparagus-leeks-and-morels.name: Lasagna With Asparagus, Leeks, And Morels

ingredients.item: Leeks (white and pale green parts only)

ingredients.prep: rinsed, coarsely chopped, or 5 ounces fresh shiitake mushrooms, stemmed

instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add leeks; cook until wilted, stirring often, about 4 minutes. Transfer to medium bowl. Melt remaining 1 tablespoon butter in same skillet. Add asparagus, mushrooms, and thyme. Sprinkle with salt and pepper; sauté until asparagus is crisp-tender, stirring often, about 4 minutes. Add to bowl with leeks and toss to distribute evenly. Add broth, cream, and bay leaf to same skillet and boil over high heat until slightly thickened, about 6 minutes. Sprinkle flour over and whisk to blend. Boil until sauce thickens, about 1 minute, whisking until smooth. Remove from heat. Stir in nutmeg; discard bay leaf. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Vegetables and sauce can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Coat four 2-cup shallow oval or round baking dishes with nonstick spray. Break off corners of noodles to fit flatly into dishes. Spoon ¼ cup sauce into each dish. Place 1 noodle atop sauce. Scatter ¼ cup vegetable mixture over, spreading in even layer. Drizzle 2 tablespoons sauce over. Sprinkle rounded tablespoonful cheese over each. Repeat layering 2 more times with noodles, vegetables, sauce, and cheese. Drizzle remaining sauce over lasagnas.

Cover each dish tightly with foil. Place on rimmed baking sheet and bake until noodles are tender, about 40 minutes. Uncover and bake until sauce is bubbling and cheese begins to brown, about 6 minutes. Let stand at room temperature 5 minutes before serving.

lasagna-with-cheeses-argiro.name: Lasagna With Cheeses
instructions: Σε κατσαρόλα μέτρια ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι για 4 – 5’ ανακατεύοντας, μέχρι να γίνει διάφανο χωρίς να πάρει καθόλου χρώμα.
Προσθέτουμε το σπασμένο σκόρδο και σοτάρουμε για 1’ και έπειτα προσθέτουμε τον πελτέ και τρίβοντας τον στην κατσαρόλα σοτάρουμε για 1’.
Σπάμε τις ολόκληρες ντομάτες εμπορίου ζουλώντας με τα χέρια ή με κουτάλα και τις προσθέτουμε.

Προσθέτουμε 1/2 φλ. νερό να αραιώσει η σάλτσα, ρίχνουμε το κοτσάνι βασιλικού, τη ρίγανη, το θυμάρι και το δαφνόφυλλο και σιγοβράζουμε για 20’ μέχρι να μελώσει η σάλτσα. Ανακατεύουμε να λιώσουν οι ντομάτες.
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε στο τέλος και εάν χρειάζεται προσθέτουμε μία πρέζα ζάχαρη στην σάλτσα ντομάτας.
Όταν μελώσει η σάλτσα ντομάτας αφαιρούμε το δαφνόφυλλο και το κοτσάνι βασιλικού.

lasagna-with-chicken-and-tomatoes-lezzet.name: Lasagna With Chicken And Tomatoes
instructions: 1. Tereyağını tavada eritin.
2.  Üzerine yemeklik doğradığınız sarımsak ve biberleri ekleyip soteleyin.
3.  Küp şeklinde doğradığınız tavuk etlerini ve ikiye kestiğiniz mantarları ekleyip pişirmeye devam edin.
4.  200 ml kremayı, mısırları, tuzu ve karabiberi ilave edip 3-4 dakika pişirin.
5.  Fırın kabını yağlayın.
6.  2 lazanya yaprağını kaba yerleştirin.
7.  Üzerine tavuk etli harçtan yayın.
8.  Kaşar peyniri serpin.
9.  Kalan lazanya yapraklarına da aynı işlemi uygulayın.
