If needed, turn heat down and continue cooking until internal temperature reaches 74°C.
Serve warm.

lemon-chicken-orzo-soup.name: Lemon Chicken Orzo Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Stir in orzo and return to a boil. Cook pasta uncovered until partially cooked through but not yet soft, about 5 minutes; drain and rinse with cold water until cooled completely.

Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add carrots, celery, and onion; cook and stir until vegetables begin to soften and onion becomes translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic; cook and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute more. Season mixture with thyme, oregano, bay leaf, salt, and black pepper; continue cooking another 30 seconds before pouring chicken broth into the pot.
Bring broth to a boil. Partially cover the pot, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer until vegetables are just tender, about 10 minutes.

Stir orzo, lemon juice, and lemon zest into broth; add chicken. Cook until chicken and orzo are heated through, about 5 minutes. Add baby spinach; cook until spinach wilts into broth and orzo is tender, 2 to 3 minutes.
Ladle soup into bowls; garnish with lemon slices and Parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

lemon-chicken-salad-lezzet.name: Lemon Chicken Salad
instructions: 1. Tüm sos malzemelerini bir kaba alıp karıştırın.
2.  Yarısını ayrı bir kaba koyup buzdolabında bekletin.
3.  Kalan sosa jülyen kesilmiş tavuk etlerini ekleyip 20 dakika marine edin.
4. Tüm salata malzemelerini doğrayıp geniş bir kaba alın ve karıştırın.
5.  Zeytinyağını bir tavaya alıp, marine ettiğiniz tavuk etlerini soteleyerek pişirin.
6.  Üzerine buzdolabında beklettiğiniz sosu gezdirin ve servis yapın.
7. Salata yerine ana yemek tarifi arıyorsanız, pratik limonlu tavuk tarifini deneyebilirsiniz.

lemon-chicken-skewers-recipe-comedera.name: Lemon Chicken Skewers Recipe
lemon-chicken-skewers-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de brochetas de pollo al limón
instructions: Toma las pechugas de pollo, corta en cubos o en trozos del tamaño que gustes y ponlas en un bol.
Agrega al bol el zumo de limón, la sal y pimienta al gusto, las hierbas aromáticas y el aceite de oliva.
Mezcla muy bien y deja marinar por 10 minutos.
Terminado el marinado, calienta un sartén, plancha o grill.
Arma las brochetas insertando el pollo en los palillos.
Cuando la plancha esté a temperatura, coloca las brochetas y cocina las brochetas por 7 minutos de cada lado.
Mientras se cocina, barniza las brochetas con el marinado para que queden jugosas.
Una vez listas, retira de la plancha y degusta con tus guarniciones favoritas.

lemon-chicken-step-by-step-comedera.name: Lemon Chicken Step By Step
lemon-chicken-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Pollo al limón paso a paso
instructions: Hay que asegurarnos de que las pechugas de pollo estén bien limpias. Luego, vamos a acomodarlas sobre una tabla de cortar, y con un mazo vamos a aplanarlas para que queden parejas en textura y consistencia.
Después, vamos a salar un poco cada pieza y a meterlas en un molde, para cubrirlas con algunas cucharadas de salsa de soja, de forma tal que el líquido alcance toda la carne.
Ahora el molde de pechugas irá directo al refrigerador. Allí lo dejaremos entre media hora y una hora, dependiendo de nuestra disponibilidad de tiempo.
Mientras el pollo se está marinando, puedes aprovechar para preparar la salsa.
En una licuadora, verter el jugo de un limón, el caldo de pollo, cuatro cucharadas de maicena y el azúcar. Batir bien para formar un líquido homogéneo. Reservar.
Ahora, en un plato hondo, mezclaremos los huevos con lo que resta de maicena.
Sacaremos el pollo marinado del refrigerador, para pasar cada pieza (de ambos lados) por la mezcla de huevos y maicena.
Calentaremos un sartén u olla de buen tamaño, con aceite, a fuego alto, para freír las piezas de pollo.
Freiremos cada pieza hasta lograr el efecto de rebosado.

Mientras el pollo se fríe, vamos a picar el otro limón en rodajas muy delgadas, que vamos a acomodar en otra cacerola, con la salsa que habíamos preparado en la licuadora. Todo esto a fuego bajo, y moviendo con frecuencia.
Al sacar cada pieza de pollo del sartén, vamos a acomodarla sobre un plato cubierto con papel absorbente, para retirar el exceso de grasa.

En el caso de la salsa, la dejaremos cocinar unos minutos más, lo suficiente para asegurarnos de que esté caliente. Es opcional, al gusto del cocinero, sumergir las piezas de pollo en la salsa mientras esta se cocina, o servirlas directamente en seco, y luego bañarlas con el líquido. Esto depende de cómo prefieran la textura del pollo. Lo que sí vale la pena es rescatar las rebanadas de limón de la salsa, para aprovecharlas para la decoración.

lemon-chicken-thighs.name: Lemon Chicken Thighs
instructions: Pat chicken thighs dry and season well with salt and black pepper. Place in a large resealable plastic bag and add vinegar. Seal bag and gently massage chicken to ensure all thighs are coated in vinegar. Chill 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 400°. Remove chicken thighs from bag and pat dry with paper towels. The drier the skin, the crispier it will be when cooked.

Place chicken thighs, skin side down, in a dry large cast-iron skillet and set over medium heat. Cook undisturbed until they easily release from the pan, about 4 minutes. Continue to cook, moving chicken around occasionally to ensure the skin is cooking evenly, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Add garlic and transfer skillet to oven. Bake until chicken is cooked through, 10–12 minutes. Transfer chicken and garlic to a plate.

Set skillet over medium-high heat and cook lemons, cut side down, until edges are deeply charred (they should be almost black), about 5 minutes. Transfer to plate with chicken and garlic and let cool slightly.

Squeeze lemon juice into a small bowl; add garlic, honey, and Aleppo-style pepper and whisk to combine. Whisk in oil and any accumulated juices on plate with chicken. Season vinaigrette with salt and black pepper.

Drizzle half of vinaigrette on a platter and set chicken on top. Serve with remaining vinaigrette alongside.
Read More: The 29 New Essential Recipes from the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen

lemon-chiffon-cake-lezzet.name: Lemon Chiffon Cake

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı az yağlı krema

instructions: 1. Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  20 cm’lik yuvarlak kelepçeli kek kalıbını yağlayın.
3.  Yumurta, şeker ve rendelenmiş limon kabuğunu köpük köpük oluncaya kadar çırpın.
4.  Unu azar azar ilave ederek karıştırın.
5.  Kek kalıbına aktarın.
6.  20-25 dakika pişirin.
7.  Keki, ızgara teli üzerine alıp soğumaya bırakın.
8.  Keki enlemesine ikiye kesin.
9.  Ara dolgusu için, yumurta sarıları, şeker, limon kabuğu ve limon suyunu bir kaba alın.
10.  Krema kıvamına gelinceye kadar çırpın.
11.  Jelatini az miktar su ile karıştırın.
12.  Jelatin suyu iyice emince üzerine kaynar su döküp çözülene kadar karıştırın.
13.  Soğuyunca yumurta sarılı karışıma ilave edip çırpın.
14.  Kremayı da ekleyip karıştırın.
15.  Karışım hafif katılaşmaya başlayınca yumurta aklarını hemen ilave edip çırpın.
16.  Katılığını gidermek için bir kaşık kadarını limonlu mus karışımına ekleyip kalanını yumurta sarılı karışıma ilave edip karıştırın.
17.  Limonlu musu kalıptaki yarım pasta kekinin üzerine yayın.
18.  Diğer keki üzerine kapatıp soğuması için buzdolabına alın.
19.  Sos için, limon suyu ile pudra şekeri iyice çırpın.
20.  Pastanın üzerine yayıp rendelenmiş limon kabuğu ve Antep fıstığı ile süsleyip servis yapın.

lemon-cloud-cake-recipe-lezzet.name: Lemon Cloud Cake Recipe
instructions: 1. Limonun kabuğunu rendeleyin ve suyunu sıkın.
2.  Hem kabuk hem de limon suyu kekin aromasını artıracaktır.
3. Yumurtaları, toz şekeri, sütü, sıvı yağı, limon suyu ve rendesini blendera alın.
4.  Blender ile birkaç saniye karıştırarak malzemelerin homojen bir şekilde birleşmesini sağlayın.
5. Elenmiş un, kabartma tozu ve vanilyayı ekleyin.
6.  Blenderı düşük hızda çalıştırarak, tüm malzemeler tamamen karışana kadar karıştırın.
7.  Kek harcı çok fazla çırpılmamalı, böylece kek daha kabarık ve yumuşak olur.
8. Kek kalıbınızı hafifçe yağlayın veya tabanına yağlı kağıt serin.
9.  Hazırladığınız kek harcını kalıba dökün ve yüzeyini spatula ile düzeltin.
10. Önceden ısıtılmış 160°C fırına kekinizi yerleştirin.
11.  Yaklaşık 45–50 dakika boyunca pişirin.
12.  İlk 30 dakika boyunca fırın kapağını açmayın; bu, kekin sönmesini önler.
13. Kekin pişip pişmediğini kürdan testi ile kontrol edebilirsiniz.
14.  Kürdan temiz çıkarsa kekiniz hazır demektir.
15.  Fırından aldıktan sonra kalıbın içinde 10 dakika kadar bekletip ardından tel ızgara üzerinde soğutun ve servis edin.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-cod-in-the-pot-argiro.name: Lemon Cod In The Pot
instructions: Ξαλμυρίζουμε πρώτα καλά το μπακαλιάρο. Εναλλακτικά, χρησιμοποιήστε άλλο φρέσκο ψάρι με παχιά σάρκα, κομμένο σε φιλέτα.
Καθαρίζουμε και κόβουμε τα κρεμμύδια σε λεπτές φέτες (δαχτυλίδια).
Καθαρίζουμε και κόβουμε τις πατάτες σε φέτες, με πάχος περίπου 1 εκ.
Σε ρηχή και φαρδιά κατσαρόλα που να χωράει τα φιλέτα μπακαλιάρου, στρώνουμε μια στρώση τα κρεμμύδια που είναι κομμένα σε φέτες (δαχτυλίδια).
Από πάνω στρώνουμε σε μια στρώση τις κομμένες σε φέτες πατάτες.
Ακουμπάμε επάνω τα φιλέτα ξαλμυρισμένου μπακαλιάρου.
Ακουμπάμε κλωνάρια από σέλινο ή μαϊντανό στην επιφάνεια του φαγητού.
Τρίβουμε πιπέρι και πασπαλίζουμε λίγο αλάτι σε νιφάδες.

lemon-cold-souffle-lezzet.name: Lemon Cold Soufflé
instructions: 1. Limon suyunu küçük bir tencereye alın.
2.  Toz jelatini ekleyip 5 dakika bekletin.
3.  Jelatin eriyene kadar kısık ateşte karıştırarak pişirin ve ocaktan alın.
4.  Isıya dayanıklı bir kabın içerisine yumurtaların sadece sarılarını, şekeri ve limon kabuğu rendesini alıp benmari usulü pişirin.
5.  Karışımı bir mikser yardımı ile krema kıvamına gelinceye kadar çırpın.
6.  Ilınan jelatinli karışımı ekleyip, çırpmaya devam edin.
7.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
8.  Ayırdığınız yumurta aklarını ayrı bir kaba alın ve bir mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
9.  Yumurta aklarını tahta bir kaşık yardımıyla limonlu karışıma havalandırarark yedirin.
10.  Kremayı ayrı bir karıştırma kabına alın.
11.  Bir mikser yardımıyla çırptıktan sonra limonlu karışıma ekleyin.
12.  Karışımı yağladığınız sufle kaplarına paylaştırın.
13.  Buzdolabında 3 saat dinlendirin.
14.  Rendelenmiş limon kabuğu ve hafif kavrulmuş Hindistan cevizi rendesi ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

lemon-compote-teleculinaria.name: Lemon Compote
instructions: Lave os limões e corte-os em rodelas. Deite-as num tacho, adicione a água e deixe ferver, em lume brando, durante 30 minutos.

Após esse tempo, pese a calda que ficou no tacho, volte a colocar no tacho e junte 1 kg de açúcar por cada litro de calda. Leve novamente ao lume e deixe ferver por mais 30 a 40 minutos. Distribua por frascos.

lemon-cookies-argiro.name: Lemon Cookies

ingredients.item: 170 grβούτυρο ή μαργαρίνη σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου
170 grβούτυρο ή μαργαρίνη σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου

instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε τον φούρνο στους 160–170°C στον αέρα. Κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι, το μπέικιν πάουντερ και το αλάτι.
Πλένουμε τα λεμόνια και, αφού τα σκουπίσουμε, παίρνουμε 1 κουταλάκι του γλυκού ξύσμα και 2 κουταλιές της σούπας χυμό λεμονιού.
Με μίξερ χειρός χτυπάμε σε μπολ το βούτυρο, τη ζάχαρη (110 γρ.) και την άχνη για λίγα λεπτά, μέχρι να γίνουν κρέμα.
Προσθέτουμε το ξύσμα λεμονιού, τον χυμό και τη βανίλια και είτε χαμηλώνουμε πολύ το μίξερ είτε ανακατεύουμε με σπάτουλα, ενσωματώνοντας σταδιακά τα στερεά υλικά στο μείγμα.
Μοιράζουμε τη ζύμη σε δύο ίσα μέρη και την τυλίγουμε με μεμβράνη, δίνοντάς της σχήμα ρολού.
Παγώνουμε τη ζύμη στην κατάψυξη αν βιαζόμαστε ή στο ψυγείο αν έχουμε περισσότερο χρόνο.
Όταν παγώσει καλά ώστε να κόβεται, αφαιρούμε τη μεμβράνη και, με κοφτερό μαχαίρι, κόβουμε φέτες πάχους περίπου 0,5 εκ.

Στρώνουμε λαδόκολλα ή φύλλο σιλικόνης στις λαμαρίνες και αραδιάζουμε τα μπισκότα αφήνοντας αρκετή απόσταση μεταξύ τους, γιατί απλώνουν. Τα πασπαλίζουμε με την υπόλοιπη ζάχαρη (2 κουταλιές της σούπας).
Ψήνουμε για περίπου 12–15 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσουν ελαφρά οι άκρες.
Αφαιρούμε από τον φούρνο και, μετά από 5 λεπτά, τα μεταφέρουμε προσεκτικά σε σχάρα για να κρυώσουν καλά.
Τα μπισκότα λεμονιού ταιριάζουν τέλεια με αυτή την κρέμα λεμονιού .

lemon-cookies-with-glaze.name: Lemon Cookies With Glaze
instructions: Whisk flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl.

Cream sugar and butter together with an electric mixer on medium speed until fluffy. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing until incorporated. Reduce speed to low and beat in sour cream and lemon zest. Add flour mixture and mix until combined.
Refrigerate dough until slightly firm, about 1 hour.
Adjust oven racks to upper-middle and lower-middle positions and preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto the prepared baking sheets, spacing cookies 2 inches apart.

Bake until just golden around the edges, about 15 minutes, switching and rotating sheets halfway through baking time (one sheet of cookies took about 12 minutes, the other sheet ended up taking 16 minutes). Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool, 8 to 10 minutes more.
While cookies cool, mix powdered sugar, lemon juice, milk, and lemon zest for glaze together and lightly drizzle cookies when they are almost completely cooled.

lemon-cookies-with-mastic-argiro.name: Lemon Cookies With Mastic
instructions: Κοσκινίζουμε πρώτα το αλεύρι με το μπέικιν πάουντερ.
Στον κάδο του μίξερ χτυπάμε το βούτυρο με τη ζάχαρη για 4 λεπτά σε δυνατή ταχύτητα μέχρι να γίνει σχεδόν κρέμα.
Ρίχνουμε ένα ένα τα αυγά να τα πίνει το μείγμα για τα κουλουράκια λεμονιού.
Προσθέτουμε τη βανίλια και λίγο λίγο το γάλα, το ξύσμα λεμονιού και την αμμωνία.
Τέλος προσθέτουμε το αλεύρι και αφού μαζευτεί η ζύμη σε μπάλα, αρχίζουμε και πλάθουμε φιτίλια και δίνουμε ό,τι σχήμα θέλουμε στα κουλουράκια. Αυτά συνήθως τα πλέκουμε κοτσίδα.
Τα αραδιάζουμε σε λαμαρίνες με λαδόκολλα.
Βάζουμε τα υλικά για το διάλυμα αυγού σε ένα μπολ και ανακατεύουμε με πιρούνι.
Αλείφουμε δύο φορές τα κουλουράκια με το διάλυμα αυγού.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 160-170°C στον αέρα για 25 λεπτά περίπου να ροδίσουν.

lemon-cornmeal-cake-with-lemon-glaze-and.name: Lemon Cornmeal Cake With Lemon Glaze And Crushed Blueberry Sauce
instructions: Combine powdered sugar and 2 tablespoons lemon juice in small bowl. Stir with spoon until smooth and paste-like, adding more lemon juice by 1/2 teaspoonfuls if glaze is too thick to spread. Set aside.

Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Butter 9-inch-diameter cake pan with 2-inch-high sides; line bottom with parchment. Combine flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt in large bowl; whisk to blend. Whisk buttermilk, eggs, lemon peel, and vanilla in small bowl. Pour buttermilk mixture and melted butter into flour mixture. Using rubber spatula, gently fold liquids into flour mixture until just blended (do not stir). Scrape batter into pan; spread evenly.
Bake cake until tester inserted into center comes out clean and cake pulls away from sides of pan, about 30 minutes.

Immediately run knife around sides of cake. Place rack atop cake in pan. Using oven mitts, hold pan and rack firmly together and invert cake onto rack. Remove pan from cake. Place another rack on bottom of cake; invert 1 more time so that cake is top side up. Stir glaze until blended. While cake is still very hot, drop glaze by tablespoonfuls onto cake; spread to within 1/2 inch of edge (some glaze may drip down sides of cake). Cool completely. Serve with Crushed-Blueberry Sauce.

lemon-crackle-cookies-pequerecetas.name: Lemon Crackle Cookies

ingredients.item: Robot de cocina o batidora de varillas

instructions: Mezclamos la harina, la la levadura química y la sal en un bol y reservar. En otro bol batimos a velocidad media-alta la mantequilla a temperatura ambiente con el azúcar durante 3-4 minutos, hasta que quede cremosa y espumosa. Añadimos el huevo, el zumo y la ralladura de limón y el extracto de vainilla y mezclamos bien. Añadimos los ingredientes secos reservados a los húmedos. Batimos a velocidad media brevemente, lo justo para que los ingredientes queden integrados.
Cubrimos bien la masa y la refrigeramos durante al menos 2 horas.

Pasado el tiempo sacamos la masa del frigorífico y precalentamos el horno a 180°C (calor arriba y abajo). Forramos dos bandejas con papel de hornear y reservamos. Con una cuchara para helado o dos cucharas de postre, tomamos porciones de masa de aproximadamente 20 g. Formamos bolas con las manos. Rebozamos cada bola primero en azúcar granulado y luego generosamente en azúcar glass.
Colocamos las bolas de masa en las bandejas, dejando 2-3 cm de separación entre ellas.   Horneamos durante 11-12 minutos a 180°C.
Dejamos reposar las galletas de limón en la bandeja durante 5 minutos.   Las transferimos a una rejilla para enfriar.   Repetimos el proceso de horneado con la segunda bandeja.

lemon-cranberry-florentines.name: Lemon Cranberry Florentines
instructions: Place butter, sugar, whipping cream, and honey in medium saucepan. Attach candy thermometer to side of pan. Bring mixture to boil over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Reduce heat to low and boil without stirring until candy thermometer registers 110°C, about 4 minutes. Remove pan from heat. Immediately add chopped almonds, 1/2 cup Candied Lemon Peel, cranberries, and flour; stir until evenly distributed. Cool to room temperature (dough will thicken as it cools).

Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven and preheat to 177°C. Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper. Spoon generous rounded teaspoonfuls dough (about 1-inch-diameter rounds) onto prepared baking sheets, spacing about 4 inches apart. Bake until cookies spread out, bubble, and are golden brown, rotating baking sheets halfway during baking, about 16 minutes total. Place baking sheets on rack. If cookies are misshapen, use butter knife to push irregular edges in, forming round cookies. Slide parchment paper with cookies onto racks; cool completely. Let baking sheets cool completely, then repeat process with remaining dough, lining baking sheets with fresh parchment paper between batches.

Stir finely chopped chocolate in metal bowl set over saucepan of simmering water until melted and smooth. Using fork, drizzle melted chocolate over cookies. Decorate with remaining 1/2 cup finely chopped Candied Lemon Peel. Chill to set chocolate, about 20 minutes. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Store layered between sheets of parchment paper in airtight containers in refrigerator.
Feel free to use thinly sliced candied lemon peel (instead of finely chopped) to garnish the cookies.

lemon-cream-lezzet.name: Lemon Cream

ingredients.item: 3 adet büyük boy yumurta sarısı (gezen tavuk veya organik)
2 adet büyük boy limon (hem kabuğu hem suyu kullanılacak)

instructions: 1. Limonların sarı kabuklarını ince rendeleyip suyunu sıkın.
2.  Yumurta sarılarını güzelce çırpın.
3.  Limon kabuğu rendesi, limon suyu, toz şeker, tuz ve yumurta sarılarını karıştırıp bir sos tavasına alın.
4.  Kısık ateşte koyulaşana kadar sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
5.  Koyulaşıp kıvam aldığında ocaktan alıp tereyağını ekleyin.
6.  Tereyağı eriyene kadar karıştırmaya devam edin.
7.  Limon kremasını ara ara karıştırarak hem oda sıcaklığına getirin hem de kabuk yapmasını önleyin.
8.  Kremayı süzgece alıp bastırarak orta boy cam bir kavanoza süzün.
9.  Buzdolabında ağzı kapalı olarak 6-7 gün muhafaza edebilirsiniz.

lemon-cream-dip.name: Lemon Cream Dip
instructions: Beat heavy cream in a small bowl to medium peaks; fold in lemon curd.
Grind lavender and 1 Tbsp. sugar in a spice mill or a mortar and pestle. Mix with ⅓ cup sugar in a small bowl.
Serve lemon cream and lavender sugar with strawberries.

lemon-cream-ice-cream-lezzet.name: Lemon Cream Ice Cream
instructions: 1. Sütü geniş bir tencerede kaynatın.
2.  Limonların kabuklarını rendeleyip sularını sıkın ve bir karıştırma kabına alın.
3. Salep, toz şeker ve kremayı ilave edip pürüzsüz bir kıvam elde edinceye kadar bir mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
4. Limonlu karışımı hafif ılındırıp kaynayan süte ekleyin ve 10-12 dakika kaynatın.
5.  Ocaktan alıp ılınmaya bırakın.
6. Ilınan karışımı bir kaba alın ve dondurucuda 8 saat dinlendirin.
7.  Dondurmayı servis kuplarına paylaştırın.
8. Üzerini limon kabuğu rendesi ve Antep fıstığı ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

lemon-cream-in-puff-pastry-dish-lezzet.name: Lemon Cream In Puff Pastry Dish
instructions: 1. Milföy hamurlarını derin dondurucudan çıkartıp yumuşayıncaya kadar yaklaşık 15-20 dakika oda ısısında bekletin.
2.  Isıya dayanıklı kaselerin içine yağlı kağıt serip milföy hamurlarını kase şeklini alacak şekilde yerleştirin ve 200 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
3.  Nişasta, şeker, rendelenmiş limon kabuğu, su, limon suyu ve portakal suyunu tencereye alıp karıştırın.
4.  Orta ateşte pişirin.
5.  Tencereyi ocaktan alarak margarini ekleyin ve eriyinceye kadar pişirin.
6.  Yumurta sarılarını bir kasede çırpın ve karışıma ilave edin.
7.  Tekrar orta ateşte iyice katılaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
8.  Milföy çanaklarının içini limonlu krema ile doldurun.
9.  Kenarlarına pudra şeker serpiştirip üzerini orman meyveleri ile süsleyin.
10.  Servis yapın.

lemon-cream-milk-teleculinaria.name: Lemon Cream Milk
instructions: Prepare este leite de creme e leve ao lume um tacho com o leite, a raspa de limão e os paus de canela e deixe ferver. Numa tigela, misture o açúcar com a farinha, adicione depois as gemas e bata bem.
Junte o leite, em fio e mexendo sempre, verta novamente para o tacho e leve ao lume, mexendo continuamente até engrossar.
Retire do lume, rejeite os paus de canela, divida por taças e deixe arrefecer. Na hora de servir, polvilhe com açúcar em pó e decore a gosto, por exemplo com rodelas de limão, como vê na foto.

lemon-cream-or-lemon-curd-comedera.name: Lemon Cream Or Lemon Curd
lemon-cream-or-lemon-curd-comedera.original_name: Crema de limón o lemon curd
instructions: ¿Cómo hacer crema de limón?
Vamos a comenzar por encargarnos de los limones. Escogeremos el más bonito, lo lavaremos bien y luego, rallaremos su cáscara lo más finamente posible. Resérvala, momentáneamente.
Cortaremos por la mitad el mismo limón, para exprimirlo. Haremos lo mismo con los otros dos. Asegúrate de que las semillas o la pulpa no se mezclen con el jugo. De momento, reservaremos este líquido.

Ahora nos ocuparemos de la mantequilla. Para usarla en esta receta, tenemos que prestar atención a que siempre esté fría. De entrada, esto permitirá que mantenga la consistencia necesaria para que podamos cortarla en cuadritos pequeños, que reservaremos posteriormente.

Luego, vamos a buscar una olla de buen tamaño, con la cual realizaremos el baño de María necesario para preparar la crema de limón. Agregamos suficiente agua y la pondremos a calentar. No la llenes de líquido haya arriba para que no se desborde cuando coloquemos adentro el otro recipiente con la crema.

El segundo recipiente que utilizaremos, tiene que ser apto para un baño de María y por supuesto, más pequeño que la olla. Allí vamos a agregar el contenido de un huevo completo y las yemas de otros cuatros huevos. Cuando separes las yemas de las claras, conserva estas últimas para preparar otras recetas.
En el mismo recipiente, vamos a agregar el azúcar y enseguida vamos a batir lo suficiente hasta que la mezcla se convierta en una crema.
Una vez que hayamos obtenido la crema, vamos a agregar el jugo del limón que hemos reservado previamente. Todavía no tocaremos la ralladura.También vamos a agregar a la mezcla una pizca de sal.
Enseguida, revolveremos bien todo hasta la obtención de una crema homogénea.
Lo siguiente será colocar el recipiente con esta crema en el centro del baño de María. El agua de la olla para este tipo de cocción ya debería estar caliente.

De inmediato, comenzaremos a revolver la crema que está en baño de María (de manera manual, con la ayuda de una espátula o cuchara de cocina). Con la influencia del calor, la mezcla va a comenzar a volverse más espesa, poco a poco. Mantendremos siempre el calor entre medio y bajo, para controlar que el agua no vaya a romper en ebullición.
Revolveremos la crema durante unos 8 minutos. Este tiempo debe ser suficiente para que tome una buena consistencia espesa. Entonces la retiraremos del fuego, con cuidado de no quemarnos.

Una vez que hayamos sacado la crema de limón del calor, vamos a añadir la mantequilla y también la piel rallada del limón. Batiremos hasta que la mezcla se vuelva homogénea y después, dejaremos reposar la preparación hasta que se enfríe.
Cúbrela con un film plástico o con una tapa, para que no se deshidrate.

lemon-cream-pie-bars.name: Lemon Cream Pie Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine flour, oil, and sugar in a bowl. Pat into a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden around the edges, about 20 minutes. Cool on a wire rack.
Meanwhile, beat sweetened condensed milk, eggs, lemon juice, sugar, lemon zest, and baking powder together until just blended. Pour over the cooled crust.
Return to the oven and bake until the filling is set, 13 to 17 minutes. Cool on a wire rack.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before cutting into 24 bars.

lemon-cream-tart-lezzet.name: Lemon Cream Tart
instructions: 1. Derin bir kapta un ve vanilyayı karıştırın.
2.  Tereyağı, şeker, süt ve yumurta sarısını ekleyip iyice yoğurun.
3.  Streç filme sarıp buzdolabında 30 dakika dinlendirin.
4.  Limonlu krema için tencereye süt ve şekeri ekleyip kaynatın.
5.  Ayrı bir yerde yumurtaları çırpın.
6.  Üzerine nişastayı ekleyip karıştırın.
7.  Kaynayan şekerli süte nişastalı yumurtayı yavaş yavaş ilave edip hızlı bir şekilde karıştırın.
8.  Son olarak limon suyunu ve rendelenmiş kabukları ekleyip karıştırın ve ocaktan alın.
9.  Mikser ile 3-4 dakika çırpıp soğumaya bırakın.
10.  Tart kalıbını tereyağı ile yağlayıp unlayın.
11.  Hamurun üzerine un serperek tart kalıbı büyüklüğünde açıp kalıba yerleştirin.
12.  Limonlu krema soğuduktan sonra tekrar mikser ile çırpın ve tart hamurunun üzerine dökün.
13.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 dereceye ayarlı fırında 25-35 dakika pişirin.
14.  Soğuduktan sonra buzdolabında 1 gece dinlendirin.
15.  Üzerini süsleyip servis yapın.

lemon-cream-with-3-ingredients-like-lemo.name: Lemon Cream With 3 Ingredients, Like Lemon Mousse
lemon-cream-with-3-ingredients-like-lemo.original_name: Κρέμα λεμονιού με 3 υλικά, σαν μους λεμόνι
instructions: Χτυπάμε την κρέμα γάλακτος στο μίξερ μέχρι να πήξει.
Σε ένα μπολ χτυπάμε το ζαχαρούχο γάλα και στη συνέχεια προσθέτουμε το ξύσμα και το χυμό λεμονιού σταδιακά.
Κατόπιν, ενσωματώνουμε τη χτυπημένη κρέμα γάλακτος και αναδεύουμε απαλά ώστε να ομογενοποιηθεί στο μείγμα.
Μοιράζουμε την κρέμα λεμονιού σε ατομικά μπολάκια ή ποτήρια και τα παγώνουμε στο ψυγείο.
Αν θέλουμε, λίγο πριν σερβίρουμε την κρέμα λεμονιού με 3 υλικά, πασπαλίζουμε με θρυμματισμένα φιστίκια Αιγίνης.

lemon-cream-with-biscuit-teleculinaria.name: Lemon Cream With Biscuit
instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água. Deite o sumo de limão numa tigela, junte o leite condensado e mexa bem.

Numa tigela à parte, bata as natas em chantilly bem firme. Escorra as folhas de gelatina, leve-as derreter em banho-maria ou no microondas sem deixar ferver e junte ao chantilly, em fio e batendo mais um pouco. Adicione depois a mistura do leite condensado e envolva suavemente até ficar cremoso.
Pique finamente as bolachas na picadora. Numa tigela funda, disponha camadas alternadas do creme anterior e de bolacha, sendo que a última deve ser de creme. Decore a gosto e sirva de seguida.

lemon-cream-with-raspberries-teleculinar.name: Lemon Cream With Raspberries
instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com as natas, o sumo e a raspa do limão e deixe ferver.
Deite o açúcar, a farinha maisena e as gemas numa tigela e envolva tudo.
Adicione o preparado das natas, mexa bem e leve novamente ao lume, mexendo sempre, até engrossar.
Distribua o creme por taças e deixe arrefecer. Decore com framboesas e sirva fresco.

lemon-crinkle-cake-mix-cookies.name: Lemon Crinkle Cake Mix Cookies
instructions: Combine cake mix, oil, and eggs in a mixing bowl.
Using an ice cream scoop or your hand, form golf ball-sized balls of cookie dough and transfer to a bowl of powdered sugar.
Cover dough ball in powdered sugar and transfer to a parchment paper-lined baking sheet.
Bake at 177°C (180°C) for 10-12 minutes.
Enjoy!

lemon-cupcakes-argiro.name: Lemon Cupcakes
instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε πρώτα το φούρνο στους 170 βαθμούς C.
Σε ένα μικρό μπολ ρίχνουμε το αλεύρι και το μπέικιν πάουντερ.
Σε ένα μεσαίο μπολ ρίχνουμε το βούτυρο και τη ζάχαρη και χτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός μέχρι να αφρατέψουν.
Προσθέτουμε το αυγό και χτυπάμε σε χαμηλή ταχύτητα, μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθούν.
Τέλος, ρίχνουμε εναλλάξ το αλεύρι, το γάλα και το ξύσμα από λεμόνι.
Χτυπάμε με το μίξερ σε μέτρια ταχύτητα, μέχρι να απορροφηθούν τα υλικά.
Χρησιμοποιώντας μία σπάτουλα σιλικόνης, ανακατεύουμε από κάτω προς τα πάνω, ώστε να αναμιχθούν καλά τα υλικά.
Ετοιμάζουμε τις θήκες για τα cupcakes και ρίχνουμε το μείγμα με τη βοήθεια ενός σκουπ, γεμίζοντάς τα περίπου κατά τα 3/4.
Βάζουμε τις φόρμες στην τελευταία σχάρα και ψήνουμε στις αντιστάσεις για 23-25′.
Τα βγάζουμε και τα αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.
Γεμίζουμε ένα κορνέ με το frosting λεμόνι και στολίζουμε το καθένα ξεχωριστά. Πασπαλίζουμε με ξύσμα λεμονιού.

lemon-cupcakes-or-muffins-with-icing-peq.name: Lemon Cupcakes Or Muffins With Icing
lemon-cupcakes-or-muffins-with-icing-peq.original_name: Magdalenas o muffins de limón con glaseado

ingredients.item: 150 g de buttermilk o suero de mantequilla
110 g de mantequilla a temperatura ambiente

instructions: Precalentamos el horno a 220 °C (calor arriba y abajo) y preparamos un bandeja para muffins con 12 cápsulas de papel.

Batimos la mantequilla con el azúcar en un bol hasta que quede esponjosa. Añadimos los huevos de uno en uno, mezclando bien después de cada incorporación. Agregamos el suero de mantequilla (buttermilk), el zumo y la ralladura de limón, así como el azúcar de vainilla, y mezclamos todo bien.
Tamizamos la harina junto con la levadura en polvo y la sal, incorporamos a los ingredientes húmedos y removemos brevemente hasta integrar
Vertemos la masa en los moldes, llenándolos aproximadamente hasta 2/3 de su capacidad.
Primero horneamos los muffins durante 5 minutos a 220 °C, luego bajamos la temperatura a 180 °C y horneamos 15 minutos más.
Para el glaseado, tamizamos unos 200 g de azúcar glas y mezclamos poco a poco con 4 cucharadas de zumo de limón hasta obtener una mezcla homogénea.
Con ayuda de un pincel, repartimos sobre los muffins de limón y espolvoreamos un poco de ralladura de limón sobre el glaseado aún húmedo.

lemon-curd.name: Lemon Curd
instructions: Bring a medium pot of water to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-high. Whisk lemon juice, sugar, and eggs, in a medium heatproof bowl; place over pot of simmering water and cook, whisking constantly, until mixture has thickened, 5–6 minutes.
Remove mixture from heat and transfer to a blender. With blender running, slowly add butter, 1 piece at a time; blend until butter is completely incorporated.
Transfer lemon curd to a small bowl and place a piece of plastic wrap directly on the surface of the curd. Chill for at least 3 hours before serving.

lemon-curd-television-teleculinaria.name: Lemon Curd - Television
instructions: Pique finamente as cascas de limão, coloque numa caçarola, junte o sumo de limão, o açúcar e os ovos, leve ao lume e mexa.
Adicione a manteiga e deixe cozinhar, em lume baixo, mexendo sempre, até obter um creme espesso. Retire e deixe arrefecer. Se quiser, sirva polvilhado com amêndoa granulada.

lemon-curd-tarts.name: Lemon Curd Tarts
instructions: Spoon 1 teaspoon lemon curd into the bottom of each phyllo shell; top with whipped topping. Sprinkle a light dusting of cinnamon over the top.

lemon-curd-with-berries.name: Lemon Curd With Berries
instructions: Bring lemon zest, lemon juice, and ¼ cup sugar to a bare simmer in a large heavy saucepan over medium heat, whisking to dissolve sugar, then remove from heat.

Whisk eggs, salt, and ½ cup sugar in a large bowl until light and thick, about 1 minute. Whisking constantly, gradually pour about one-quarter of hot lemon mixture into egg mixture, then, whisking constantly, incorporate egg mixture into remaining lemon mixture in saucepan. Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until lemon curd is opaque and thick enough to hold the marks of the whisk, about 2 minutes.

Scrape lemon curd into a blender. With motor on medium speed, add butter a piece at a time, waiting until each piece is fully incorporated before adding the next, until the butter is emulsified and curd is light and thick.
Transfer lemon curd to a large nonreactive bowl and cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly against surface so a skin doesn’t form. Chill until cold, at least 2 hours.
Toss berries and remaining 1–2 Tbsp. sugar in another large bowl. Let sit until some juices have accumulated, 25–30 minutes. Spoon curd into bowls and top with berries and their juices.
Do Ahead: Lemon curd can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

lemon-custard-recipe-lezzet.name: Lemon Custard Recipe

ingredients.item: Daha hafif bir tatlı için yarım yağlı veya light süt tercih edebilirsiniz.
Şeker miktarını damak zevkine göre azaltabilirsiniz.
Nişasta miktarını hafifçe azaltarak daha yumuşak bir kıvam elde edebilirsiniz.
Aromayı artırmak için taze limon yerine organik limon esansı de eklenebilir.

instructions: 1. Tencereye un, nişasta ve şekeri alın.
2.  Yavaş yavaş sütü ekleyip topaklanmaması için çırpıcıyla karıştırın.
3. Orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak kaynayana kadar pişirin.
4. Koyulaşınca ocaktan almadan önce tereyağını, vanilini, limon kabuğu rendesini ve limon suyunu ekleyin.
5. Karışımı kaselere paylaştırın.
6.  Oda sıcaklığına gelince buzdolabında en az 2 saat dinlendirin.
7. Üzerini limon kabuğu rendesi, nane yaprakları ile süsleyebilirsiniz.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-delights.name: Lemon Delights
instructions: Combine all ingredients except egg white, flour, nuts and Lemon Cheese Filling. With mixer, beat until well blended. Beat in flour. Wrap dough in plastic wrap.
Chill at least 1 hour.

Shape into 1-inch balls. With mixer, beat egg white lightly. Dip balls in egg white; roll in nuts. Place 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets. Press thumb deep into center of each cookie; fill with Lemon Cheese Filling (recipe below).
Bake in preheated 375 degrees oven 10 minutes or until filling is set. Cool slightly; remove from baking sheets. Store tightly covered in refrigerator.
Lemon Cheese Filling Directions: Beat cream cheese, sugar, egg yolk, ReaLemon® and 1 drop of yellow food coloring, if desired, until well blended and smooth.

lemon-dill-salmon-fillet.name: Lemon Dill Salmon Fillet
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Place a steamer insert into a saucepan and fill with water to just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring water to a boil. Add potatoes and green beans, cover, and steam until tender, about 10 minutes. Drain.

Brush the shiny side of 2 large pieces of aluminum foil with 1 teaspoon olive oil each. Place salmon skin-side down in the center. Brush remaining olive oil and garlic over salmon. Sprinkle dill on top. Divide lemon slices over salmon; squeeze 1/2 lemon on top. Season with 1/2 teaspoon pepper and 1/3 teaspoon salt.
Cover salmon with 2 pieces of aluminum foil, shiny-side down. Roll aluminum foil inwards on all sides to create a pouch. Transfer pouches to a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until salmon flakes easily with a fork, 10 to 12 minutes.
Mix mayonnaise and capers together in a small bowl to make a tartar sauce. Stir in juice from 1 lemon, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
Serve steamed potatoes, green beans, and tartar sauce alongside salmon.

lemon-drizzle-cake.name: Lemon Drizzle Cake

ingredients.item: Nonstick vegetable oil spray or room-temperature butter
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Generously coat an 8½x4½" loaf pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray or room-temperature butter (no need to line; doing so will prevent the syrup from absorbing evenly). Whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl to combine. Finely grate 2–3 large lemons to yield 2 Tbsp. zest; set aside. Cut lemons in half and squeeze out juice to yield ½ cup. Cook lemon juice, ½ cup (100 g) granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, about 1 minute. Let lemon syrup cool.

Beat ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, remaining 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar, and reserved lemon zest in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium speed until very light and creamy, about 5 minutes. Add 2 large eggs, one at a time, mixing to incorporate after each addition (don’t worry if batter looks curdled). Scrape down sides of bowl, add half of dry ingredients, and beat on low speed just to combine. Add ½ cup whole milk and remaining dry ingredients and beat until batter is smooth and creamy, about 1 minute. Using rubber spatula, scrape bottom and sides of bowl and fold batter a few times to ensure it’s evenly mixed. Scrape into prepared pan and smooth surface.

Generously coat the blade of a small paring knife with nonstick spray; run knife lengthwise through center of batter to create a shallow cut (this will help cake split cleanly along the line as it bakes rather than cracking randomly). Bake cake until golden brown, it springs back when gently pressed, and a tester inserted into the center comes out with only a few moist crumbs attached, 40–50 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool 10 minutes.

Gradually and evenly pour lemon syrup over cake (it should be warm but not hot at this point). Syrup may pool on the sides but will absorb as the cake sits. Let cake cool completely. It should sit at least 2 hours, but preferably 8 hours before glazing. Cover tightly with plastic wrap if sitting longer than 2 hours.

Sift 1 cup (110 g) powdered sugar into a small bowl and stir in 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice and a pinch of kosher salt, adding up to 1 Tbsp. more lemon juice as needed to make a thick but pourable glaze.
Carefully run an offset spatula or butter knife around sides of cake; invert cake onto wire rack to turn out of pan. Turn cake right side up.

Pour glaze over cake, letting it drip down the sides. Let cake sit until glaze is set before serving, at least 45 minutes.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

lemon-drop-blueberry-scones.name: Lemon Drop Blueberry Scones
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a large baking sheet.
Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, 1 teaspoon lemon zest, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
Mix together lemon yogurt, butter, and egg in a separate bowl. Stir yogurt mixture into flour mixture until just moistened. Fold blueberries into mixture.
Drop batter by heaping tablespoons 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 15 to 18 minutes.
Meanwhile, stir together confectioners' sugar, lemon juice, and 1/2 teaspoon lemon zest in a small bowl until glaze is smooth.
Drizzle glaze over warm scones and serve.

lemon-drop-cocktail.name: Lemon Drop Cocktail
instructions: Run lemon wedge around the rim of a cocktail glass to dampen, then dip in sugar to coat.
Combine vodka, lemon juice, lemon simple syrup, and orange-flavored liqueur in a cocktail shaker. Fill with ice, seal, and shake until shaker frosts over. Pour into a martini glass to serve.

lemon-drop-martini.name: Lemon Drop Martini
instructions:
Combine ½ cup sugar and ½ cup water in a small jar, cover, and shake until sugar is dissolved.
Do ahead: Simple syrup can be made 3 months ahead. Cover and chill. (Makes about 6 ounces.)

Combine 2 oz. vodka, ¾ oz. Cointreau, 1 oz. fresh lemon juice, and ½ oz. simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold, about 20 seconds. Strain cocktail into a chilled martini glass and garnish with a lemon twist.
Editor’s note: This lemon drop martini recipe was first printed in November 2022. Head this way for more of our best vodka cocktails →

lemon-drop-shots.name: Lemon Drop Shots
instructions: Combine vodka and lemon juice in a shot glass.
Sprinkle 1/2 teaspoon sugar on top.
Place remaining 2 teaspoons sugar on a small plate; dip lemon wedges in sugar.
Suck on a sugared lemon after drinking the shot.

lemon-drops-lezzet.name: Lemon Drops

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı ince çekilmiş badem

instructions: 1. Fırını 160 derecede ısıtın.
2.  İki fırın tepsisine yağlı kağıt serin.
3.  Tereyağı ve şekeri büyük bir cam kaseye alın.
4.  Mikserle krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
5.  Yumurta sarılarını ilave edin.
6.  Rendelenmiş limon ve portakal kabuğu, badem ve unu ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
7.  Hamuru 20 eşit bezeye ayırın.
8.  Yuvarlayarak fırın tepsilerine dizin.
9.  Ortalarına hafifçe bastırarak çukurlaşt��rın.
10.  Çukurların içine limon marmeladı doldurun.
11.  Kenarlarına süt sürüp file badem serpin.
12.  Sıcak fırında 20 dakika pişirin.
13.  Ilık olarak servis yapın.

lemon-filled-cookie-recipe-lezzet.name: Lemon Filled Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı taze sıkılmış limon suyu

instructions: 1. Küçük bir tencerede yumurta, şeker ve unu çırpın.
2.  Limon suyu ve kabuğunu ekleyip kısık ateşte koyulaşana kadar pişirin.
3.  Ocaktan alın, tereyağını ekleyip eriyene kadar karıştırın.
4.  Soğumaya bırakın.
5. Oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağı, pudra şekeri, yumurta, vanilin ve kabartma tozunu karıştırın.
6.  Unu yavaş yavaş ekleyerek yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edin.
7. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın.
8.  Ortalarına parmağınızla hafifçe çukur açın.
9.  Çukur kısımlara soğumuş limon dolgusundan doldurun.
10. Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 15–18 dakika, kenarları hafifçe kızarana kadar pişirin.
11. Ilıyınca üzerine pudra şekeri serpip servis edebilirsiniz.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-flavored-chocolate-souffle-lezzet.name: Lemon Flavored Chocolate Soufflé
instructions: 1. Sufle kalıplarının içini tereyağı ile yağlayıp toz şeker serpin.
2.  Buzdolabında bekletin.
3.  Yeşil limonu yıkayın.
4.  Kabuğunun beyaz kısmına değmeden kabuğunu rendeleyin.
5.  Çikolata, şeker, tuz ve tereyağını büyük bir cam kaseye alıp benmari usulü eritin.
6.  Kaseyi kaynar su üzerinden alıp soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Yumurtaları başka bir cam kaseye kırın.
8.  Mikserle 5 dakika çırpın.
9.  Soğuttuğunuz çikolatalı harca çırpılmış yumurtayı ilave edip tahta kaşıkla karıştırın.
10.  Un ve rendelenmiş yeşil limon kabuğunu ekleyip spatula yardımıyla karıştırın.
11.  Sufle kalıplarına üstten birer parmak boşluk kalacak şekilde malzemeyi paylaştırın.
12.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
13.  Sıcak olarak servis yapın.

lemon-flavored-yogurt-sauce-lezzet.name: Lemon Flavored Yogurt Sauce

ingredients.item: 1 çay kaşığı kuru fesleğen veya reyhan

instructions: 1. Makarnayı dilerseniz 3’e bölün.
2.  Bir bölümünü irice doğranmış pancar, 1 tatlı kaşığı sıvı yağ ve tuz ilave edilmiş kaynar suda haşlayın.
3.  Bir bölümünü biber salçası ve 1 tatlı kaşığı sıvı yağ ilave edilmiş kaynar suda haşlayın.
4.  Kalan bölümünü de sade su ve kalan 1 tatlı kaşığı sıvı yağla haşlayıp süzün.
5. Sosu için tüm malzemeyi bir kapta karıştırın.
6. Hazırladığınız sosla haşlayıp süzdüğünüz makarnaları karıştırın.
7.  Hemen servis yapın.

lemon-freezies.name: Lemon Freezies
instructions: Pour ¾ cup lemonade into each ice pop cavity, leaving ½-inch clear at top.
Freeze for 1 ½ hours.
Insert a popsicle stick into each ice pop.
Freeze until solid, about 1 ½ hours more.

lemon-garlic-shrimp-recipe-comedera.name: Lemon Garlic Shrimp Recipe
lemon-garlic-shrimp-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de camarones con limón y ajo
instructions: En un sartén a fuego medio, derrite la mantequilla.
Cuando ya esté totalmente derretida agrega el ajo laminado finamente y sofríe el con el perejil.
Mezcla y cocina durante 3 minutos.
Incorpora los camarones y cocina de 3 a 4 minutos, hasta que hayan cambiado su color a un tono rosado.
Agrega el jugo de limón, y sazona con sal y pimienta.
Mezcla y cocina durante 1 a 2 minutos.
Sirve y disfruta.

lemon-ginger-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Lemon Ginger Cookies
instructions: Unte um tabuleiro com manteiga e polvilhe com farinha. Reserve.
Bata a manteiga com o açúcar e os ovos. Adicione a farinha, o gengibre, o fermento, uma pitada de sal e raspa de limão a gosto e misture tudo muito bem.
Coloque a massa dentro de um saco de pasteleiro com boquilha e forme bolachas sobre o tabuleiro, um pouco afastadas entre si.
Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 190ºC, por cerca de 7 a 10 minutos ou até ganharem cor. Retire as bolachas do forno e descole-as do tabuleiro. Deixe arrefecer e sirva.

lemon-ginger-cranberry-applesauce.name: Lemon Ginger Cranberry Applesauce
instructions: Stir cranberries, apples, water, sugar, and lemonade concentrate together in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally, and reduce heat to medium low.
Stir ginger and salt into cranberry mixture and simmer until cranberries burst and apples are tender, 20 minutes. Chill in the refrigerator.

lemon-ginger-water.name: Lemon Ginger Water
instructions: Combine lemon juice, 1/2 cup water, ginger, and honey in a blender; blend for 20 to 30 seconds.
Strain the mixture evenly into 4 quart-sized mason jars or a 1-gallon pitcher.
Top off with remaining water and stir. Place lids on the jars or cover pitcher and store in the refrigerator.

lemon-glaze-argiro.name: Lemon Glaze
instructions: Σε ένα μπολ με ένα πιρούνι ανακατεύουμε την ζάχαρη άχνη με το λεμόνι.
Προσθέτουμε το μέλι και τη βανίλια κι ανακατεύουμε με το κουτάλι να γυαλίσει.
Αν το θέλουμε πιο σφιχτό, προσθέτουμε λίγη ζάχαρη άχνη κοσκινισμένη και ανακατεύουμε να ενσωματωθεί.
Αν το θέλουμε πιο ρευστό, προσθέτουμε λίγο επιπλέον χυμό λεμονιού ή λίγο νερό.
Χρωματίζουμε με όποιο χρώμα ζαχαροπλαστικής επιθυμούμε.
Διακοσμούμε μπισκότο ή όποιο άλλο γλυκό θέλουμε.
Αν επιθυμείτε πιο ρευστή υφή προσθέστε λίγο μέλι ή λίγο νερό ή χυμό λεμονιού.
Η συγκεκριμένη δόση για γλάσο  φτάνει για 20 με 25 μπισκότου.
Αν προσθέσεις επιπλέον ζάχαρη άχνη θα βγει πιο σφικτό και θα έχεις πιο σταθερό αποτέλεσμα.
Με το ωραίο λευκό χρώμα, είναι ιδανικό για να διακοσμήσεις όλα σου τα γλυκά

lemon-gluten-free-cookies-lezzet.name: Lemon Gluten-free Cookies
instructions: 1. Diyet yapanlara iyi gelecek limonlu glütensiz kurabiye tarifiLimonların kabuğunu rendeleyip suyunu sıkın.
2.  Öğütülmüş fındık içini, kabartma tozunu, karabuğday ununu ve mısır ununu derin bir kapta karıştırarak harmanlayın.
3.  Ayrı bir cam kasede önce yumurta aklarını şekerle birlikte köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın.
4.  Sonra da yumurta sarılarını ekleyip biraz daha çırpın ve kuru malzemeleri ilave edin.
5.  Mikser yardımı ile yoğurmaya başlayın.
6.  Yoğurma işlemi devam ederken limon suyunu da yavaş yavaş ekleyin.
7.  Hamur istenilen kıvama geldiğinde streç filme sarın ve buzdolabında 6-8 saat kadar dinlendirin.
8. Dinlenmiş hamuru mısır nişastası serpilmiş tezgahın üzerinde, merdane yardımıyla açın.
9.  Açılan hamuru bir çay bardağı yardımıyla yuvarlak formlarda kesin ve yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
10.  Önceden ısıtılmış 120-150 derece fırında 20-25 dakika pişirin.
11.  Kurabiyeler piştikten sonra soğumaya bırakın.
12. Yağlı kağıdın üzerine önceden rendelediğiniz limon kabuklarını serpin.
13.  Sıcak fırında 5 dakika kadar kurutun.
14.  Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin.
15.  Limonlu glütensiz kurabiyelerin yarısını çikolataya batırın ve yağlı kağıt serili bir tepsiye dizin.
16.  Çikolatalı kısma kuruttuğunuz limon kabuklarından serpin ve çikolata donduktan sonra servis yapın.

lemon-goat-cheese-cheesecake-bites-glute.name: Lemon Goat Cheese Cheesecake Bites (gluten Free Optional)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Place 12 standard-size silicone muffin cups on a baking sheet or line a standard 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
With a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, beat the flour(s), sugars, butter, vanilla, and lemon together on medium-low speed until a cohesive dough forms.
Roll the dough into 1-inch balls and place in the muffin cups. With the back of a spoon, press the balls into the bottom of each cup to form a disk.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, just until the crust is matte (no longer shiny and raw-looking) on top--it will still be puffy and soft. Remove from the oven and cool while you make the filling.
With an electric hand mixer or stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, beat the cream cheese, goat cheese, sugar, flour, egg, applesauce, and lemon zest and juice together on medium-low speed.
Spoon the filling on top of the crust in each cup, dividing it evenly and filling each cup to the brim.
Bake for about 30 minutes, or until the filling is set and slightly browned. Transfer to a wire cooling rack and cool completely before serving.

lemon-green-beans.name: Lemon Green Beans
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic and green beans and season with salt. Sauté for 2 minutes, just until the garlic is fragrant.
Add the chicken stock, cover, and steam for 5–7 minutes, until the green beans are tender, but still bright green. Add the lemon zest and juice and toss to combine. Season with more salt to taste.
Transfer to a bowl and serve warm.
Enjoy!

lemon-gummy-dessert-lezzet.name: Lemon Gummy Dessert

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağından bir parmak eksik toz şeker
1 tatlı kaşığı sakız reçeli (sakız reçeli yoksa 2-3 tane damla sakız dövülür eklenir)

instructions: 1. @lavantalimon11.
2. 7 bin takipçiFerhan KaraSütü tencereye alın, nişastayı, unu ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Kaynamaya başlayınca şekeri ekleyin.
4.  Kıvam alan muhallebiyi ocaktan alıp içine 1 tatlı kaşığı damla sakızı, 1 tatlı kaşığı tereyağı ekleyin ve 5-6 dakika mikserle çırpın.
5.  Cam bir kabı suyla ıslatıp süzün.
6.  Tabanına bisküvileri aralıklı olarak dizin, üzerine muhallebiyi dökün.
7.  Limon sos için; 2-3 limon suyunu sıkın, 1.
8. 5 su bardağı su ekleyip tencereye alın.
9.  7-8 yemek kaşığı şeker, 4 tatlı kaşığı tepeleme nişasta ekleyin.
10.  Limon ve portakal kabuğu rendesini de ilave edip karıştırın ve pişirmeye başlayın.
11.  Kıvam alınca ocaktan alın.
12.  1 tatlı kaşığı tereyağı ekleyip iyice karıştırın ve muhallebinin üzerine dökün.

lemon-herb-butter.name: Lemon Herb Butter

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mash butter in a bowl until smooth and creamy.
Mix lemon zest, lemon juice, rosemary, thyme, sage, salt, and black pepper into butter until thoroughly combined.

lemon-ice.name: Lemon Ice
instructions: Combine the sugar, lemon zest, and water in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Remove the mixture from the heat, pour into a large bowl, and allow to cool completely. Add the Cointreau or Grand Marnier and lemon juice and stir to mix thoroughly. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled, at least 4 hours.

Churn the mixture in the ice cream maker according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
Transfer to an airtight container and freeze until firm, at least 1 hour.
Serve the ice in paper cups or small bowls.

lemon-ice-cream-argiro.name: Lemon Ice Cream
instructions: Βάζουμε πρώτα το εβαπορέ στην κατάψυξη για 30΄.
Τα λεμόνια θέλω να είναι φρέσκα και ακέρωτα.
Αφού πάρουμε το ξύσμα τους το βάζουμε σε ένα μπολάκι και ρίχνουμε 3 κ.σ. από τη συνολική ζάχαρη και ανακατεύουμε.
Σκεπάζουμε το μπολ με μεμβράνη και το βάζουμε στο ψυγείο να λιώσει καλά, περίπου 30΄.
Όταν το βγάλουμε  θα έχει γίνει κίτρινο σιρόπι.
Σε μπολ βάζουμε το φρέσκο γάλα, και την υπόλοιπη ζάχαρη, το ξύσμα και το χυμό.
Τα ανακατεύουμε με σύρμα να λιώσει.
Σε μπολ βάζουμε την κρέμα γάλακτος και τη χτυπάμε σε παχύρρευστη μορφή.
Πρώτα προσθέτουμε το γιαούρτι και ανακατεύουμε με σύρμα.
Βάζουμε και το παγωμένο εβαπορέ και ανακατεύουμε.
Τέλος ενώνουμε τα δύο μείγματα.
Βάζουμε το υλικό να παγώσει στην κατάψυξη.
Μόλις αρχίσει και σφίγγει λίγο, μετά από 1 ώρα, το χτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός να αφρατέψει και το ξαναπαγώνουμε.
Όσο πιο πολλές φορές επαναλάβουμε τη διαδικασία αυτή τόσο πιο αφράτο παγωτό θα έχουμε στο τέλος.

lemon-jam-3-recipes-pequerecetas.name: Lemon Jam (3 Recipes)
lemon-jam-3-recipes-pequerecetas.original_name: Mermelada de limón casera (3 recetas fáciles)

ingredients.item: 1 trozo de jengibre fresco (unos 5 cm), pelado y rallado (opcional)
Pectina (opcional, si prefieres una textura más firme)

instructions: Lava bien los limones con agua tibia para eliminar cualquier residuo. Pela los limones, asegurándote de eliminar la mayor cantidad de parte blanca posible, ya que puede amargar la mermelada. Corta la pulpa de los limones en trozos pequeños, quitando las semillas
Coloca los trozos de limón en una cacerola grande. Añade el litro de agua y lleva a ebullición a fuego medio-alto. Deja hervir durante 30 minutos, removiendo de vez en cuando para que no se pegue.
Añade el jengibre rallado y las ramas de canela a la cacerola con los limones. Remueve bien para que los sabores se integren.

Después de los 30 minutos, añade los 600 g de azúcar a la cacerola. Remueve bien hasta que el azúcar se disuelva completamente. Si decides usar pectina, este es el momento de añadirla siguiendo las instrucciones del paquete.

Reduce el fuego a medio-bajo y deja cocinar la mezcla durante 1 hora, removiendo ocasionalmente. La mermelada estará lista cuando haya espesado y tenga una consistencia gelatinosa. Puedes probarla colocando una pequeña cantidad en un plato frío; si se arruga al empujarla con el dedo, está lista.
Esteriliza los frascos de vidrio hirviéndolos en agua durante al menos 10 minutos. Llena los frascos con la mermelada caliente, dejando un pequeño espacio en la parte superior.
Cierra los frascos herméticamente y colócalos boca abajo durante 10 minutos para crear un vacío.

lemon-jam-recipe-lezzet.name: Lemon Jam Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tatlı kaşığı limon suyu (isteğe bağlı, renk ve kıvam için)
Limon yerine yeşil lime, mandalina veya portakal kullanarak farklı aromalı reçeller hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Karışık narenciye reçeli yapmak için limon ve portakal birlikte de kullanılabilir.
Toz şeker yerine esmer şeker, hindistan cevizi şekeri veya bal kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha sağlıklı ve hafif bir reçel için şeker miktarını azaltabilirsiniz; tatlılık limonun ekşiliği ile dengelenir.
Su yerine portakal suyu veya limon suyu ile seyreltilmiş su kullanarak aromayı güçlendirebilirsiniz.
Daha koyu ve yoğun kıvam isteyenler, su miktarını biraz azaltabilir.
Limon kabukları ile birlikte vanilya çubuğu, tarçın çubuğu veya karanfil ekleyerek farklı tatlar yaratabilirsiniz.
Limon reçeline birkaç damla limon suyu eklemek, renginin daha parlak olmasını sağlar.

instructions: 1. Limonları iyice yıkayın, kabuklarını rendeleyin veya ince dilimler halinde doğrayın.
2.  Limonların çekirdeklerini ayırmayı unutmayın.
3. Orta boy bir tencerede su ve şekeri karıştırıp kaynamaya bırakın.
4.  Şeker tamamen eridikten sonra limonları ekleyin.
5. Karışımı orta ateşte 30–40 dakika kaynatın, limonlar yumuşayınca ve reçel kıvamına gelince ocaktan alın.
6. Birkaç damla soğuk suya damlatıp reçelin akış hızını kontrol edebilirsiniz; damla yavaş akıyorsa kıvam tamamdır.
7. Reçeli temiz cam kavanozlara aktarın ve soğuduktan sonra kapağını kapatıp buzdolabında muhafaza edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-jasmine-rice-recipe-lezzet.name: Lemon Jasmine Rice Recipe

ingredients.item: 2,5 su bardağı sıcak su (veya tavuk suyu)
Yasemin pirinci yerine baldo pirinç kullanılabilir.
Daha aromatik bir tat için basmati pirinci tercih edilebilir.
Daha farklı bir doku için pirincin bir kısmı arpa şehriye ile değiştirilebilir.
Sıcak su yerine tamamen tavuk suyu kullanılarak daha yoğun bir lezzet elde edilebilir.
Daha hafif bir aroma için sebze suyu tercih edilebilir.
Daha yoğun aroma için tereyağı miktarı biraz artırılabilir.
Limon yerine az miktarda lime suyu kullanılabilir.
Daha belirgin aroma için limon suyu miktarı artırılabilir.
Serviste ekstra limon kabuğu rendesi eklenebilir.
İnce doğranmış taze fesleğen ile farklı bir aroma sağlanabilir.
İnce kıyılmış badem veya çam fıstığı eklenebilir.
Bir tutam karabiber ile hafif baharatlı bir tat verilebilir.

instructions: 1. Yasemin pirincini bol suyla birkaç kez yıkayın.
2.  Nişastası arınana kadar durulayıp süzün, ardından 15 dakika kadar ılık suda bekletip tekrar süzün.
3. Tencereye tereyağı ve zeytinyağını alın, yağlar eriyince pirinci ekleyin.
4.  Orta ateşte 2–3 dakika boyunca nazikçe karıştırarak kavurun.
5. Sıcak suyu ve tuzu ilave edin.
6.  Kaynamaya başlayınca ocağın altını kısın ve kapağını kapatarak suyunu çekene kadar yaklaşık 10–12 dakika pişirin.
7. Ocaktan almaya yakın limon kabuğu rendesi ve limon suyunu ekleyin, hafifçe karıştırın.
8. Ocağı kapattıktan sonra pilavı kapağı kapalı şekilde 10 dakika demlendirin.
9. Servis öncesi ince doğranmış maydanozu ekleyin ve çatal yardımıyla havalandırarak karıştırın ve servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-jelly-lezzet.name: Lemon Jelly
instructions: 1. Nişastayı 1 su bardağı su ile çözün ve tencereye alın.
2.  Kalan suyu, şekeri, rendelenmiş limon kabuğu ve limon suyunu ekleyip orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
3.  Ocaktan alıp kaselere ya da şekilli kalıba paylaştırın.
4.  1 gece buzdolabında beklettikten sonra servis tabağına ters çevirin ve üzerini süsleyerek servis yapın.

lemon-labneh-pasta-recipe-lezzet.name: Lemon Labneh Pasta Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet limonun suyu ve rendelenmiş kabuğu
2 yemek kaşığı rendelenmiş parmesan peyniri (isteğe bağlı)
Normal makarna yerine tam buğday, kepekli veya glutensiz makarna kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha farklı bir dokusu için shirataki makarna veya kabak/spagetti kabak makarna tercih edilebilir.
Labne yerine krem peynir, ricotta veya mascarpone kullanılabilir.
Vegan seçenek için fıstık veya badem bazlı vegan peynir kullanılabilir.
Limon yerine lime (yeşil limon) kullanarak hafif farklı bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Daha yoğun limon aroması için limon suyu ile birlikte bir çay kaşığı limon kabuğu yağı da eklenebilir.
Zeytinyağı yerine avokado yağı veya hafif tatlılık için tereyağı kullanılabilir.
Taze sarımsak yerine sarımsak tozu veya kavrulmuş sarımsak püresi de kullanılabilir.
Parmesan yerine pecorino, grana padano veya vegan parmesan alternatifleri kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir seçenek için peynir miktarını azaltabilirsiniz.
Fesleğen yerine maydanoz, roka veya taze kekik kullanılabilir.
Servis sırasında ekstra limon kabuğu rendesi ekleyerek ferah aromayı artırabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Makarnayı paketin üzerinde belirtilen süreye göre tuzlu suda haşlayın ve süzün.
2. Bu arada geniş bir tavada zeytinyağını ısıtın, sarımsağı hafifçe kavurun.
3. Ocaktan alıp labne peynirini, limon suyu ve rendesini ekleyin; karıştırarak krema kıvamına gelmesini sağlayın.
4. Haşlanmış makarnayı sosun içine ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
5. Tuz ve karabiber ile tatlandırın.
6. Servis tabağına alıp üzerine parmesan ve taze otlarla süsleyin ve servis edin.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-lamb-argiro.name: Lemon Lamb
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε πρώτα σε μία πλασωτέ κατσαρόλα το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το αρνί μέχρι να πάρει ένα έντονο χρώμα ολόγυρα.
Προσθέτουμε και το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι και σοτάρουμε για λίγα λεπτά να γίνει διάφανο.
Προσθέτουμε νερό ίσα να σκεπαστεί το κρέας μας.
Αλατίζουμε και σκεπάζουμε με το καπάκι της κατσαρόλας.
Μαγειρεύουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά μέχρι να μαλακώσει καλά το αρνάκι.
Προς το τέλος ρίχνουμε και το χυμό λεμονιού.
Αφήνουμε να πάρει μια βράση και να πήξει η σάλτσα η οποία πρέπει να είναι πυκνή και μελωμένη.
Αποσύρουμε από την φωτιά και σερβίρουμε με τηγανητές πατάτες Νάξου.
Τη μοναδική αυτή παραδοσιακή συνταγή του Αιγαίου, μοιράστηκε μαζί μας η κυρία Ματίνα.

lemon-lavender-cake.name: Lemon Lavender Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a fluted tube pan (such as Bundt®) generously.
Measure 5 tablespoons milk into a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in the microwave until warmed through, 30 to 45 seconds. Add lavender buds. Let steep to release their flavor, 10 to 15 minutes.

Whisk white sugar and butter together in a large bowl until creamy. Whisk in eggs, 1 at a time, whisking well after each addition. Add 1/2 cup lemon juice and lemon zest; mix until well-blended. Stir milk and lavender buds into the batter.
Sift cake flour and baking powder together in a bowl. Slowly fold into the batter, stirring well to prevent lumps. Pour into the greased tube pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 45 to 55 minutes. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes. Invert onto a wire rack to cool completely, at least 30 minutes.
Whisk remaining 5 tablespoons milk, 1/4 cup lemon juice, and confectioners' sugar together in a small bowl to make glaze; drizzle over the cooled cake. Let stand until glaze is set, about 30 minutes.

lemon-loaf-cake.name: Lemon Loaf Cake
instructions: Make the cake: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Grease a 9x5-inch (22 x  12 cm) loaf pan with nonstick spray and line with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, cream the butter and sugar with an electric hand mixer until light and fluffy, 3–4 minutes.
Add the eggs, 1 at a time, and beat to incorporate, scraping down the side of the bowl between additions.
In a medium bowl, mix together the sour cream, lemon juice and zest, and vanilla until smooth.
In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Alternately add the dry and wet ingredients to the batter, about ⅓ at a time, starting and ending with the dry ingredients. Beat between each addition until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and smooth the top. Bake for 50–60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Let cool completely in the pan, about 1 hour.
Make the lemon icing: Sift the powdered sugar into a medium bowl. Add the lemon juice and milk and whisk until smooth.
Pour the icing evenly over the top of the cake, spreading to reach the edges of the pan. Let the glaze set completely, about 30 minutes.
Transfer to a serving platter, slice, and serve.
Enjoy!

lemon-loin-and-juicy-comedera.name: Lemon Loin, And Juicy
lemon-loin-and-juicy-comedera.original_name: Lomo al limón, fácil y jugoso
instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180°C (177°C).
Lava y seca el lomo de cerdo.
Exprime el jugo de un limón y reserva.
Corta el otro limón en rodajas finas.
En un mortero, machaca los dientes de ajo con sal y pimienta hasta obtener una pasta.
Unta la pasta de ajo sobre el lomo y coloca las rodajas de limón en la parte superior.
Coloca las ramitas de romero y tomillo fresco sobre el lomo.
Riega con un generoso chorrito de aceite de oliva y el jugo de limón reservado.
Cubre la bandeja con papel de aluminio y hornea durante 1 hora.
Retira el papel de aluminio y continúa horneando por otros 30 minutos o hasta que el lomo esté dorado y cocido por dentro (la temperatura interna debe ser de al menos 63°C / 63°C).
Retira del horno y deja reposar unos minutos antes de cortar en rodajas.

lemon-macarons-lezzet.name: Lemon Macarons
instructions: 1. Derin bir kapta tüm malzemeleri iyice yoğurun.
2.  Mutfak tezgahına pudra şeker serpin.
3.  Hamuru pudra şeker üzerine yayıp rulo haline getirin.
4.  İki parmak kalınlığında kesin.
5.  Üç parmağınızla hafifçe bastırarak üçgen şekli verin.
6.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 10 dakika pişirin.
7.  Soğuduktan sonra isteğe göre üzerine pudra şeker serpip servis yapın.

lemon-madeleines-teleculinaria.name: Lemon Madeleines
instructions: Derreta a manteiga no micro-ondas. Numa tigela, misture o açúcar com a farinha, a pitada de sal e o fermento. Adicione a raspa de limão e os ovos e mexa bem.
Junte depois a manteiga derretida e bata até obter uma massa homogénea. Cubra com película aderente e leve ao frigorífico durante 1 hora.

Após o tempo indicado, ligue o forno a 200ºc. Unte com manteiga 12 forminhas para madalenas, polvilhe-as com farinha e distribua por elas a mistura anterior, utilizando um saco de pasteleiro (sem encher demasiado).
Disponha as forminhas num tabuleiro e leve ao forno durante 7 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer um pouco, desenforme e sirva.

lemon-marmalade-argiro.name: Lemon Marmalade

ingredients.item: Ζάχαρη (όσο πάρει ανάλογα με το μείγμα που θα μετρήσουμε)
Ζάχαρη (όσο πάρει ανάλογα με το μείγμα που θα μετρήσουμε)

instructions: Διαλέγουμε λεμόνια χωρίς χτυπήματα, με έντονο χρώμα και όχι πολύ μαλακά.
Ξύνουμε ελαφρά την κίτρινη φλούδα και τα κόβουμε σε λεπτές φέτες (φλούδα και σάρκα ολόκληρα).
Αφαιρούμε τις λευκές μεμβράνες και τα κουκούτσια (τα κρατάμε για αργότερα).
Κόβουμε κάθε φέτα λεμονιού σε πολύ μικρά κομματάκια.
Μαζεύουμε όλα τα κουκούτσια και τις μεμβράνες που καθαρίσαμε από τα λεμόνια και τα βάζουμε σε διπλωμένο τούλι ή σε διπλωμένο τουλπάνι.
Στη συνέχεια, δένουμε το τούλι.
Σε κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση τοποθετούμε τα ψιλοκομμένα λεμόνια, το δεματάκι με τα κουκούτσια και τις μεμβράνες.
Τα καλύπτουμε με το νερό.
Τα βράζουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά για 30 λεπτά από την ώρα που θα πάρουν βράση, έως ότου μαλακώσουν οι λεμονόφλουδες.
Αφαιρούμε το δεματάκι με τα κουκούτσια.
Το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει και το πιέζουμε για να πάρουμε όσο περισσότερη πηκτίνη-ζελέ μπορούμε.
Φροντίζουμε η πηκτίνη αυτή να πέφτει μέσα στα λεμόνια.

Μετράμε τώρα με ένα φλιτζάνι τα υλικά της μαρμελάδας. Όσα φλιτζάνια βγουν τα υλικά που βράσαμε τόσα φλιτζάνια ζάχαρη θα προσθέσουμε. (Περίπου 3,5 φλιτζάνια βγαίνει, ανάλογα με το πόσο υγρό εξατμίζεται κατά το βρασμό.)
Βάζουμε τα υλικά με τη ζάχαρη να βράσουν σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά, ξαφρίζοντας όποτε εμφανίζεται αφρός στην επιφάνεια.
Βράζουμε για περίπου 25-30 λεπτά μέχρι να δέσει η μαρμελάδα.
Η μαρμελάδα έχει δέσει όταν μένει παχύ στρώμα στην ανάποδη της κουτάλας.

lemon-marquise-recipe-comedera.name: Lemon Marquise Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 taza de leche entera  (para remojar las galletas)

instructions: En un bol grande, incorpora la leche condensada y la crema de leche.
Vierte el zumo de limón junto a la ralladura de limón y la esencia de vainilla. Mezcla muy bien. Debe quedarte con textura cremosa
En un molde redondo o rectangular, vierte un poco de la crema de limón y esparce.
Haz una capa de galletas. Pero antes, debes remojarlas por unos segundos en la leche, no deben quedar blandas.
Una vez tengas lista la capa de galletas, coloca otra capa de la crema de limón y repites el proceso hasta tener completamente armada la marquesa.
Esparce por encima ralladura de limón o más leche condensada.
Tapa con papel film y refrigera en la parte baja de la nevera de 4 a 6 horas hasta que enfríe y compacte.
Cuando esté fría, podrás cortar en porciones y disfrutarla.

lemon-marshmallow-pie.name: Lemon Marshmallow Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Using an electric mixer on low speed, beat butter, sugar, and salt in a medium bowl until butter is almost completely smooth, about 2 minutes. Increase speed to medium and beat until butter is creamy, about 2 minutes more. Mix in egg yolk and vanilla. Reduce speed to low, add flour and poppy seeds, if using, and mix until no dry spots remain.

Firmly press dough into a 9" pie dish (the firmer you press, the easier it will be to cut the baked crust). Bake until crust is golden brown on bottom and a shade or two darker at the edges, 25−35 minutes.

Just before crust is finished baking, combine lemon juice, salt, and ¼ cup sugar in a small saucepan. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean and add pod. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Whisk egg yolks, egg, and remaining ½ cup sugar in a medium bowl until no longer grainy and slightly lightened in color, about 2 minutes.

Whisking constantly, gradually stream hot lemon mixture into eggs, then transfer mixture back to saucepan. Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until thickened and marks from whisk are just visible, 5–7 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in butter until smooth, adding a couple of pieces at a time and whisking until incorporated before adding more.
Reduce oven temperature to 300˚. Strain warm curd through a fine-mesh sieve into warm crust, filling right to top of crust (do not overfill; you may have a tablespoon or so extra).
Bake pie until curd is set around the edges (filling should still wobble when dish is jiggled; it will continue to set as it cools), 15−20 minutes. Do not overbake or filling may curdle.
Transfer pie to a wire rack and let cool, about 2 hours, then chill until cold, at least 1 hour.
Do ahead: Pie can be baked 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.
Make sure curd is chilled and set before preparing marshmallow topping. Place ¼ cup cold water in a small bowl and sprinkle gelatin over top. Let sit 10 minutes to soften.
Beat egg whites and salt to soft peaks in the bowl of stand mixer fitted with whisk attachment.

Meanwhile, bring sugar, corn syrup, and ¼ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium heat, swirling pan until sugar is dissolved. Attach thermometer to side of saucepan and continue to cook over medium heat until thermometer registers 250°.

Remove syrup from heat and add gelatin mixture, stirring to dissolve. With mixer on medium-high, carefully pour syrup into beaten egg whites in a slow, steady stream, aiming for the space between the side of the bowl and the whisk (avoid hitting whisk directly to prevent hot sugar from splattering all over). Continue to beat until mixture is dense and fluffy and very stiff peaks have formed (side of bowl will be cool to the touch), 5–10 minutes. Beat in vanilla.

Marshmallow topping will become difficult to work with if given time to set up, so immediately (and quickly) dollop spoonfuls of marshmallow over curd, swirling and making decorative swoops as you go (make sure to extend topping all the way to edge of crust). Let sit until marshmallow is set and firm, at least 2 hours and up to 6 hours.
Just before serving, heat broiler. Broil pie until marshmallow is toasted and golden brown in spots (keep a close eye on it to keep it from burning), about 2 minutes.

lemon-meringue-bars.name: Lemon Meringue Bars
instructions: Preheat oven to 325˚F (170˚C). Grease and line a 9-inch (23 cm) square baking dish with parchment paper and place on a baking sheet.
Make the crust: combine the flour, powdered sugar, salt, and butter in a medium bowl, and use your hands to mix until a crumbly dough forms.
Transfer the dough to the prepared pan, and use your hands to press it against the bottom and about 1 inch (2 cm) up the sides. Poke the bottom all over with a fork.
Bake for 20 minutes, until light golden brown.

While the crust is baking, make the lemon filling: In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and egg yolk. Add the granulated sugar, lemon juice, zest, and a pinch of salt, and whisk to combine. Whisk in the flour until just combined.

When the crust is done baking, remove it from the oven. Pour the lemon filling over the crust and carefully return it to the oven for 25 minutes, until the filling no longer jiggles and the center is mostly set.

While the filling bakes, make the meringue: In a clean, dry medium bowl, use an electric hand mixer to beat the egg white until stiff peaks form. Add about half of the sugar, whip for 30 seconds, then add the rest of the sugar and whip until combined. Transfer the meringue to a pastry bag fitted with a large tip or zip-top bag with a corner snipped off.
Pipe 9 evenly-spaced dollops of meringue on top of the lemon bars.
Return to the oven for 10-12 minutes, until the meringues are lightly browned.
Let cool completely, then refrigerate for 1-2 hours.
Slice into 9 bars. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
Enjoy!

lemon-meringue-bread.name: Lemon Meringue Bread

ingredients.item: A few drops of lemon juice

instructions: Position an oven rack in the middle of the oven and preheat to 163°C. Grease a 9 by 4 by 4 inch Pullman pan and line with a parchment sling.

In a small bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and baking soda. In a medium bowl, combine the sugar and lemon zest and use your fingers to rub the zest into the sugar until evenly distributed and fragrant.

Transfer the granulated sugar and zest to the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a paddle. Add the cream cheese and beat on low speed until combined and fluffy, 2 to 3 minutes. Scrape down the sides of the bowl and, with the mixer still on low, add the oil and beat until completely combined.

Add the eggs, one at a time, mixing for about 30 seconds on medium speed after each addition and scraping down the bottom and sides of the bowl. Beat in the vanilla. On low speed, add half the flour mixture, followed by the lemon juice, and then the remaining flour mixture, beating after each addition until just combined. Remove the bowl from the mixer and give the batter a few more turns with a spatula to make sure the ingredients have been incorporated. Add the lemon curd and swirl it into the batter with the spatula, using four or five strokes. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and set aside.

Pour 1 inch of water into a medium saucepan and bring to a gentle boil. Pour a few drops of lemon juice into the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a whisk, and use a paper towel to wipe the juice around the inside of the bowl (this helps remove any traces of grease, which can hinder the whites from whipping properly). Add the granulated sugar, egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt to the mixing bowl and stir gently with a rubber spatula until completely combined.

Place the bowl over the saucepan, being careful not to let the water touch the bottom of the bowl. Stir with the spatula until the sugar is completely dissolved and the mixture registers 71°C on an instant-read thermometer, scraping down the sides of the bowl with the spatula (to ensure no sugar crystals are lurking, which can cook the egg whites), 4 to 5 minutes.

Place the bowl in the stand mixer fitted with a whisk and whisk the egg whites on low speed for 1 minute. Slowly increase the speed to medium-high, and beat until stiff, glossy peaks form, 8 to 10 minutes. The bowl should feel cool to the touch at this point.

Working quickly, spoon all the meringue over the bread batter, and fold it into the batter gently with a rubber spatula six or seven times, starting at the top and dragging the meringue into the batter almost to the bottom of the pan and back up again. There should still be a visible amount of meringue on the top, which will bake up as a topping.

Bake the bread until the top of the meringue is browned and a wooden skewer or toothpick inserted into the center of the loaf comes out clean, 75 to 90 minutes. Let the bread cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then carefully remove it from the pan using the parchment sling, peel off the paper, and transfer to a wire rack. Cool completely before slicing. The bread can be stored in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 4 days, but it is best on the second and third days.

lemon-meringue-cheesecake.name: Lemon Meringue Cheesecake
instructions: To make the crust: Mix cookie crumbs and melted butter together in a bowl until evenly combined.
Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
To make the filling: Beat cream cheese, sour cream, and sugar together in a bowl with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy.
Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in lemon juice, lemon zest, and vanilla until smooth, scraping the bottom and sides of the bowl as needed.
Spread mixture over crust in the springform pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are puffed and surface of cheesecake is firm except for a small spot in the center that will jiggle when the pan is gently shaken, about 1 hour.
Let cool to room temperature, about 1 hour, then refrigerate until completely cooled, at least 3 to 4 hours.
To make the meringue topping: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Beat egg whites in a bowl with an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
Beat in sugar and cream of tartar until mixture is glossy and stiff peaks form.
Spread lemon curd over chilled cheesecake.
Mound whipped egg whites over top and spread until curd is completely covered.
Bake in the preheated oven until meringue is golden brown, about 10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and chill, uncovered, in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour or up to 1 day before serving. It's best not to cover the meringue or it may collapse.

lemon-meringue-ice-cream-pie-in-toasted-.name: Lemon Meringue Ice Cream Pie In Toasted Pecan Crust
instructions: Whisk eggs and egg yolks in medium bowl. Melt butter in medium metal bowl set over large saucepan of simmering water. Whisk in sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, and salt; gradually whisk in egg mixture. Whisk until thick and thermometer inserted into curd registers 81°C to 82°C, about 8 minutes. Transfer to small bowl. Press plastic wrap on top of curd; chill 4 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 204°C. Mix pecans, sugar, and butter in medium bowl until moistened. Press pecan mixture onto bottom and up sides of 9-inch-diameter glass pie dish (mixture will be crumbly). Bake until crust is lightly toasted, about 12 minutes (crust will slip down sides of dish). Use back of spoon to press crust back into place. Cool crust on rack. Freeze crust 30 minutes.

Dollop 1 1/2 cups ice cream over crust; spread into even layer. Spread lemon curd over ice cream; freeze until firm, about 2 hours. Dollop 1 1/2 cups softened ice cream over lemon curd; spread into even layer. Cover and freeze until firm, about 2 hours.

Using electric mixer, beat egg whites in medium bowl until frothy. Beat in cream of tartar. With mixer running, gradually add sugar. Beat until stiff peaks form. Spoon meringue over pie, spreading to seal at edges and swirling decoratively. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Freeze pie. Using kitchen butane torch, toast meringue until golden in spots or place pie in a preheated 260°C oven until meringue is golden in spots, watching to prevent burning, about 3 minutes. Cut pie into wedges; serve immediately.

lemon-meringue-icebox-cake.name: Lemon Meringue Icebox Cake

ingredients.item: Heavy cream 1 tablespoon superfine or granulated sugar
Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume

homemade or store-bought128g Ritz crackers (4 1/2 ounces; about 32 Ritz crackers)For the Italian Meringue:4 large egg whites (about 5 ounces; 140g), at room temperature200g granulated sugar (7 ounces; 1 cup)1/2 cup water

instructions: Line a 9- by 4-inch loaf pan with plastic wrap. In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment, combine heavy cream, sugar, and salt. Whip on medium-high speed until medium-stiff peaks form, about 2 minutes. (Alternatively, combine cream, sugar, and salt in a large mixing bowl. Using a hand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment, beat on medium speed until medium stiff peaks form, about 3 minutes.)
